Ritchie is working _tirelessly_ to help his Democratic colleagues take back the House, but with Republicans _hellbent_ on protecting their razor-thin majority and _squashing_ our momentum, this will take all of us:

[So Peter, if you actually read this email, I'm sure you now understand how important it is that we meet tonight’s fundraising deadline. www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

With fundraising numbers this low, we have to ask: = | = Peter, Trump has put some of our greatest priorities on the chopping block, from affordable housing to LGBTQ+ rights to Medicare to and more. We’re fighting an uphill battle, and falling short tonight is simply not an option. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. subject: URGENT: Trump invokes Alien Enemies Act
body:
We need your voice with us in this critical moment. | | | Peter, Trump and his Department of Justice have just invoked the _Alien Enemies Act_ , a Mass Kidnapping wartime law from the 18th-century that would give Trump the power to unilaterally pick and choose any person he wants to deport. **No process. No checks on his actions. Just his word****.****Just inhumane targeting.** The courts have temporarily blocked this move, but that doesn’t mean the administration will give up their push to enable Trump access to an unprecedented authoritarian power to pick, choose, kidnap, detain, and deport anyone he does not want in this country — _solely because he is President_. **We need people to speak out against this horrifying violation of our basic human rights.** We are on a fast track towards fascism, and we need everyone to show our opposition against it. **[Can you rush a $25 donation today to help us fight Trump’s unmitigated power grab and continue our work to defend our immigrant communities? clean_body: We need your voice with us in this critical moment. | | | Peter, Trump and his Department of Justice have just invoked the Alien Enemies Act , a Mass Kidnapping wartime law from the 18th-century that would give Trump the power to unilaterally pick and choose any person he wants to deport. No process. No checks on his actions. Just his word.Just inhumane targeting. The courts have temporarily blocked this move, but that doesn’t mean the administration will give up their push to enable Trump access to an unprecedented authoritarian power to pick, choose, kidnap, detain, and deport anyone he does not want in this country — solely because he is President. We need people to speak out against this horrifying violation of our basic human rights. We are on a fast track towards fascism, and we need everyone to show our opposition against it. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to United We Dream Action are not tax deductible. Thank you for being there, Carolina, United We Dream Action Follow us on: | | | | |

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

# [Did Pilgrims Really Wear Buckled Hats?](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st71e4&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st71e4&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st71e4&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| W hen the Pilgrims began their 66-day journey aboard the Mayflower in 1620, they weren’t wearing the buckled hats and black suits and dresses they’re known for today. Sailing from Plymouth, England, to their settlement near Cape Cod, Massachusetts, the Saints, as they called themselves, actually wore clothing more tailored to their arduous voyage.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zke76vd2ee2el3q9j2sv1oum5fc1i1kou04q2pfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chi69oj2clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgjrb1pu5ggk9p68g85o09viq3rc1pfasiooq8b0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chi69oj2clh2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlgkb1e928nh7rnkk3adrerahqtnbul9d2h4ov88_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chi69oj2clh2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z24dg2l1h0mur8819t6do55bbne8hk5f8jnvjhl0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chi69oj2clh2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk6g216gqifch725bd029nuofnu55637j4b24h58_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chi69oj2clh2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf2fpfnp4hqka15653rmpmbjvc7kj5qqbu8k3jcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chi69oj3cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhfbbk70u9nh8sjgjt56a9d3g1c6k9a6pc7u1h20_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chi69oj3cth2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zegm1557o74gc5vkg8apumn0b1qdutapv760eld0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chi69oj3cth2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Closing the curtains on my campaign.

I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

They've just dumped in $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
_**[Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. _**In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.**_

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

_**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zehcsreumlk0tjdokre5do7l38p9ev0ouclcv67o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chi69oj6c9h2bs "But if you can chip in just $5 right now")**_ , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

Ryan Zinke

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Misunderstanding American citizenship
body:
Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zagg2p0iglhbocu6h5hb617ff6eiqijmlvjmpji0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p36c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen?

This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation.

I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship.

**In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn:**

* Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace
* How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years
* What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship

Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate.

And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this _Imprimis_ issue with them.

You can receive your FREE copy of **" Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/birthright-citizenship-imprimis](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1j5hu05u2sbrs7tmt6usp3uecidvmm4pgm5ncsg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p36c1h2bs)

Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

---

name: AMAC Action
subject: Help us counter radical leftists
body:
As a strong conservative senior, I’m hoping that you will side with AMAC Action rather than with the left-leaning AARP...

| |
---
| | Soros has channeled millions into electing hand-picked radicals.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztl5lruvipeuueq8pmc4q8137t6dbusgriftvmp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p36c3h2bs)
---
| | Friend,As a strong conservative senior, I’m hoping that you will side with AMAC Action rather than with _the left-leaning AARP..._ By now you’ve probably heard of **billionaire globalist George Soros** and his support for the most radical leftist ideas on the planet.He’s injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, and our justice system. In the past few years, Soros has channeled millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys—including New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. What I’m about to tell you will make your blood boil—**[**but I hope it will inspire you to take action!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrqb4jrpgssqm7u8gjh5087hm268t1jp1lsdd3oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p36c3h2bs)** According to public tax filings, the left-leaning AARP accepted over **10 MILLION DOLLARS** —in just three years—from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.” **You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’** And the AARP is taking multi-millions from this group funded by the man whose life mission is to destroy our nation. It’s not hard to see why the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine, calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s “changing the world, $100 million at a time.”Friend, it makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.And listen to this...Of all age groups (including 18-29-year-olds!), when asked **“Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of Donald Trump?”** —seniors aged 65 and older are the ONLY age group in America with a decreasing approval rating of President Trump.**Coincidence or Soros-backed AARP influence?****And so today I’m writing to sound the alarm.** To help President Trump usher in the **Golden Age of America** , AMAC Action must double and even triple our efforts against these radicals and George Soros’ network of prosecutors and Attorneys General who are obstructing President Trump’s America First Agenda.**_We can’t do it without brave patriots like you._** **[That’s why I’m asking you to follow this link to make a critical one-time donation today.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztsr0c5j1rqdi3ge03bvtfmcmvbmnb9loe1taicg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p36c3h2bs)****My friend, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action.** With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to the left-leaning AARP. And our 82 chapters and 348 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. With the support of conservative seniors like you, AMAC Action has confronted the radical left at every turn. And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him. And I know that together, we can counter the poisonous ideas he’s spreading through groups like the Tides Foundation and the AARP. **Just look at what we accomplished together in 2024 alone:**
---
* **We bombarded** members of Congress, state legislators, corporate executives, and the White House with a tidal wave of emails, comments, and phone calls showing that America’s conservative seniors would not back down in the face of an overreaching Biden Admin.
* **We mobilized** seniors to get out and vote early in the battleground states, resulting in a win for President Trump in all seven swing states.
* **We organized** a massive “Hands Off My Medicare” Petition Drive to stop the Democrats’ horrible “Medicare for All” scheme from giving undocumented immigrants the same healthcare you get.
* **Together with Donald Trump, Jr.,** we united thousands of Americans around our **“Make America Strong Again”**
* **In Missouri and Kentucky,** we helped pass commonsense measures to stop non-citizens from voting in our elections.
* **We defeated** a radical pro-abortion amendment in Florida.
* **In Ohio,** we protected young girls from boys in their sports and in their bathrooms.
* **We stopped** left-wing financial institutions from “de-banking” conservatives in Tennessee simply because they don’t like their politics.

---
And our efforts are so effective that President Trump himself has put out the call for seniors to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who are ruining our country! AMAC Action isn’t going to back down and let the Left obstruct President Trump’s America First agenda. If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But we’re going to shout it from the rooftops so unsuspecting seniors know the truth!** We can’t do any of this critical work without you. **[Today—right now—when so much is at stake—will you please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500 or more?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr5tciip1t2ach5mmua71k5via2ff8tfa4ab6em0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p36c3h2bs)** The radical Left isn’t letting up for one minute, and neither are we.**Your AMAC Action is taking every step possible to protect the interests of you and your family—but we can’t do it without you.** We already have a full agenda for the rest of this critical year that needs financing. And now that Soros has unleashed his radical D.A.s, our fights will multiply across the nation. But please know that **ANY amount** that you can contribute, whether it’s smaller or larger, is greatly appreciated. **[**Whatever you decide, please donate within the next 72 hours so we know what resources we have to work with.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj8de2e5h4e04ja1ddnkg5oose32rrosu2cmom3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p36c3h2bs)** If we allow radical leftists like George Soros to continue without opposition, every one of us will suffer. Thank you for standing with us.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcqjfrd9fp88cu0abunueovco1im6rql6416aubo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p36c3h2bs)
---
| |
---
[ **Renew Your Support**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zelfab0j2c7vrjsar3o9fnco644m0lvl66kgskd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p36c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zoc4e2kuf8pcll0fvb0e2jiasf0bv8pim33r6v8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p36c3h2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo08u3jpglvniofbd62ll8jof70eka3lmqbs37eo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p36c3h2bs)**_**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---
| | [ **Support AMAC Action**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zca4auf2qu31ke7hkp1f75ml52a614mjelknsdb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p36c3h2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4bkhp1ebfkhermbmeuffjqibhevq38k9fs75fg0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p32c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvoossnlhq0dt3iqbii4ffpkc8i8u30oa9kdbo40_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p32c3h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7d5ahcl78lf6eiihts7q81t9h7a26j2ik9rppn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p32c3h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[**href="https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer?sc=00711N0242L15DODEES &utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ancientchristianity_dvd&utm_content=TRAILER_PA-AAN-20250316">https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zce1q2b5fn9p9le26ai56a60aoi9p8sf1hog3hdg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh60p32c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Official Senate Republican Strategy Survey
subject: THREE OPEN SEATS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
_**[Jeanne Shaheen won't run for re-election, opening another Democratic Senate seat in 2026](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zi53ojpcl7op7769mjt9d0dq5pllalur5knmoeqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh68o32cdh2bs)**_

_[-NBC News](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z2jbqrodb33rce8b4l8m06ucfgj5k515thg89mvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh68o32cdh2bs)_
That's THREE - count 'em THREE Democrat-held Senate seats that will be OPEN in 2026.

_**[Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire.](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zt8lgb2qum7slb9rha6klcg8248mmktpo64rqeq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh68o32cdh2bs)**_

These three seats are critical to expanding our Senate majority.

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcbjg23r3eor2lls7n9p0d1ee7nibqb310lfcdkg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh68p72c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr35umubea3jp1tk6b10lqqmj4ejds678cuhl6vo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh68p72c5h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkgo65jj74fsupvtlmerg2n59nt5r2k9354rch9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh68p72c5h2bs)

body:

| |

---

**Closing the curtains on my campaign.**

I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat and DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrats impeaching Trump and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
**[Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt0n3docfhpurrrjmhp790f86v1v6bfo4r31sip8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh64o76c3h2bs "Friend,this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.")**
_**In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.**_

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

_**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1mj9loodao6e586ofaum8cpgqahtt12b60msghg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh64o76c3h2bs "But if you can chip in just $5 right now")**_ , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

_****_

clean_body: I'm at my wits' end | | | | | | Closing the curtains on my campaign. I'm at my wits' end, Friend. The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest. Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue. In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat and DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrats impeaching Trump and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again. "Friend,this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6." In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party. If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. "But if you can chip in just $5 right now" , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out? | | You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, I'll always serve you proudly. name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: Support Ancient Christianity
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3j68nleb6gvmmhfgbsqs9uimfedu81914thj6bg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh6cpr4c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi0eiv1kvg9m1kjemr0ossg9ovi29cbjv2ajpj5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh6cpr4c9h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgcuqi7fn827888gln40ckf0fcc283q7tokrvrdo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh6cpr4c9h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znu54emp7dmvapliiu9qqe7menmv74760mb25m08_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh6cpr4c9h2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmm608g06derf3oos6ahp9jrhoaqbdccncirmc08_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh6cpr4c9h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Senator Mike Lee
subject: My friend, Vivek –
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I'm excited to endorse Vivek Ramaswamy for Governor of Ohio. Will you join me in supporting his critical campaign?

| |
---
| | | Friend,

As the fight rages against the managerial bureaucracy, government waste, and the Deep State, we can't lose sight of the fact that states play an essential role.

President Trump needs strategic partners in key states across the country in order to win once and for all.

As one of the co-founders of DOGE, I can't think of a better man for the job than my buddy Vivek Ramaswamy. **[That's why I'm excited to endorse Vivek Ramaswamy for Governor of Ohio. Will you join me in supporting his critical campaign?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0hft7b9sa4p116n161hgrk73ile7jvrl0ks88h8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh6cpr4c9h2bs "That's why I'm excited to endorse Vivek Ramaswamy for Governor of Ohio. Will you join me in supporting his critical campaign?")**

---
| | [**PLEASE JOIN US HERE**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqpua9gip8a9ra5p7tm9mrv85s58ue9b6t6ug94g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh6cpr4c9h2bs)
---

I could talk your ear off about the importance of limited government, balanced budgets, and individual rights, but I'll spare you today...

All I'll say is Vivek is uniquely qualified for this fight. He gets it, and his policy chops are excellent.

You can trust that he'll be a wrecking ball to our bloated, wasteful system that is squandering your tax dollars. As Governor, the Deep State's days are numbered.

_[You don't have to take my word for it.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2i5rs3t9nu935huummoqj5cl54uqore3vp7t1qg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh6cpr4c9h2bs "You don’t have to take my word for it.")_

**President Trump trusts him to get the job done. Elon Musk also endorsed his campaign. I trust him too. **

So, will you join us in supporting Vivek's campaign? I urge you to become a Founding Donor today. Every dollar makes a tremendous impact in these early days.

---
| | [**PLEASE JOIN US HERE**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgvire18vg5q75ibdn66r6amqq1pcb0qeu7st9s8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh6cpr4c9h2bs)
---

For freedom,
Senator Mike Lee

name: Ryan Zinke
subject: Closing the curtains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
I'm at my wits' end

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zq43e2carbefid50hppaanqrmjtstr98e5ms0q9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh62or2chh2bs)
---

**Closing the curtains on my campaign.**

I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat and DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrats impeaching Trump and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
**[Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zkeep8dqi0ghadtncr6b2ueijr9o44kf18vq8o98_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh62or2chh2bs "Friend,this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.")**
_**In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.**_

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

_**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z3jsj5pn6fusllkm310t9v1sg7dmgu55t3274520_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh62or2chh2bs "But if you can chip in just $5 right now")**_ , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

_****_
---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zndnfid7pfbc0e0d7om06997va9mhp3fjtoidc2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh62or2chh2bs)
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, I'll always serve you proudly.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z2i8h9tne8nffjvgm3a1oiebngf4pcknon5tvv3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh62or2c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zqqam521gpk1jb0dai63eb89ce6tkfgucujqfs0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh62or2c5h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zfvjgd90a1k4i78rncib4q0s3ejajh9gvtkd1v08_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh62or2c5h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z4bp8vq6pi6vejplplqtc8ve0mgjvmgl82tjh0n8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh62or2c5h2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zuevfcivb7c0vbuef0qsjf2pilsncm4kh3kbln1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh62or2c5h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: This is Steve Scalise =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=80=93?=
subject: I’m sorry. Really, I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate.

| |
---
| | | I am genuinely sorry, Friend.

Really, I am.

I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.

I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.

I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.

_It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages._

**This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. _[You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement- and we only won with your hard work and support.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlmhsk2hov3k1hlvhb2as0vqrjc1541ort0sg0m8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh66ob6cph2bs "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support.")_ **

Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.

Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.

They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court.

_**[In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrbgo5ca6csrppg26s2s1gak9qm4aq1qrb9g24mo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh66ob6cph2bs "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.")**_

_If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. _

BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now.

Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda.

_**[So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final March deadline?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkjhaapqnbloj1lavad5l9s7lh9td5f4595ql978_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh66ob6cph2bs "So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final February deadline?")**_

It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help.
| | [IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk8a0f8699r6oo82qeaiu8ha3nmvhl8eg0hfnvrg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh66ob6cph2bs "IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE")
---

Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.

God bless you,
_- Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0j4blou11ar1ch65hvecskfdqd8d2761ihpv6e0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh66ob6cph2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zblu6709k0qeu8jha0s8kbfjk89ks7dpe54b162o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh66ob6cph2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmndibc369iqd0cdfmb6akqfjufblu2p1tq017co_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh66ob6cph2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

[Privacy Policy](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkt0e6s0kk1a48k9kn7a1icc2eif683ph30k8tcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh66ob6cph2bs)

name: This is Steve Scalise =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=80=93?=
subject: I’m sorry. Really, I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate.

| |
---
| | | I am genuinely sorry, Friend.

Really, I am.

I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.

I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.

I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.

_It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages._

**This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. _[You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement- and we only won with your hard work and support.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zln2i67mnf2ejvsn3rfckjkn7q2edlt8au4a0ga0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh66ob6cph2bs "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support.")_ **

Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.

Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.

They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court.

_**[In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj7fg8avbrcqgmcjtghtd46596nlcjiphhmvam68_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh66ob6cph2bs "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.")**_

_If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. _

BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now.

Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda.

_**[So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final March deadline?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8084p91f9jsi91n2i2aoqif60uo7t74hscu9pl0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh66ob6cph2bs "So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final February deadline?")**_

It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help.
| | [IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv32qksopejq5va0ql750pbk31u93gmof10tur2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh66ob6cph2bs "IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE")
---

Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.

God bless you,
_- Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuokn7tqlc97btb25h1vcemvuplp6sm7tc810oeg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh66ob6cph2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5hdf7iu9qhoarnlvu9huolgr8gqdakil69vdg68_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh66ob6cph2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

subject: Dems called me vile racial slurs for supporting Trump
body:
Soon, they’ll call me Governor of Florida

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6hggaqd95l2cga18k5hs1ntv7h4ui4d8dud7uoo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh6epj2cdh2bs)
---
|
---
During the height of the 2024 election when I was on the campaign trail with President Trump, the radical-left tried every petty tactic imaginable to get under my skin.
Some went so far as to call me a “ _groomed coon_ ”, and even a “ _white supremacist_ ” for being the loudest advocate of Trump’s MAGA Agenda.
It’s disgusting to see their “diversity” and “tolerance” fly out the window when they find out I’m a Black Man who supports President Trump.
Look, they can call me all the slurs they want, **but soon they’ll have to call me the Governor of Florida.**

|
---
[HELP ME WIN THIS!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3lhhggvpn3ngvbeptofij0m9h1r91v6lsn1bgi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2chh6epj2cdh2bs)

You know just as well as I do that Democrats are a relentless and unforgiving bunch.
They know Florida is the **Freest State in the Nation** , and stealing the Governorship could seriously hamper the MAGA Movement.
The brutal truth is that they’re going to pour millions of dollars into this race just to get back at President Trump.
I need to level with you. This is going to be the most difficult challenge of my life. But I know with you by my side, I have nothing to worry about.

clean_body: Soon, they’ll call me Governor of Florida | | | | | During the height of the 2024 election when I was on the campaign trail with President Trump, the radical-left tried every petty tactic imaginable to get under my skin. Some went so far as to call me a “ groomed coon ”, and even a “ white supremacist ” for being the loudest advocate of Trump’s MAGA Agenda. It’s disgusting to see their “diversity” and “tolerance” fly out the window when they find out I’m a Black Man who supports President Trump. Look, they can call me all the slurs they want, but soon they’ll have to call me the Governor of Florida. | | | You know just as well as I do that Democrats are a relentless and unforgiving bunch. They know Florida is the Freest State in the Nation , and stealing the Governorship could seriously hamper the MAGA Movement. The brutal truth is that they’re going to pour millions of dollars into this race just to get back at President Trump. I need to level with you. This is going to be the most difficult challenge of my life. But I know with you by my side, I have nothing to worry about. | | Thank you and God Bless, Byron Donalds | | | | | | | | | | | Paid by Byron Donalds, Republican, for Governor 10941 Harmony Park Drive, Suite 4 Bonita Springs, FL 34135 Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

As the fight rages against the managerial bureaucracy, government waste, and the Deep State, we can't lose sight of the fact that states play an essential role.

_[You don't have to take my word for it.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTE4ODYyNjYsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMzYyMy1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDc1LWYyMjc4NzY5ZTZiNDQyZDc5NTI3ZTA0YWQ1MjUxYmE0IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdml2ZWstcmFtYXN3YW15LWZvci1vaGlvL2xlZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDMxNl9QWC1GRC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MTQ5MDgtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTAzMTZfUFgtRkQuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjE0OTA4LTM2MjMifQ/HAtmjQhWMcRQgyelOLGUqg "You don’t have to take my word for it.")_

subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity” on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/iaowa18OX87oXQfSu8XIf2nqsVDVAqnBQM-4tOsFQYzCC8a14tc9Yid4LQuTBjOmLAUmj5kc-MbzFdgOxWk6axBLjhFOL2jD3bGKlHp-1b1mHuFtwN4tyiwcrHssqPw0OcqPH9kLIRRqsz5tZjx5P6RN9gg19acrk_Yj_8zvLkM-lDwbbFo9hV4zhh4m5EEdKkx-zGf6c6XXsh8wLr7F1hpkChKxr7aecxRdP_6ODufLo6ZesI_usNXYQiu-QVN_qnmoNAkRn9UhGuXG9kMD7gJftrsaPQ0Nol4C3ad_ACPflajFQ6bJHEuHxMulCZJrTCXoZIiUZOUtRRanZZ9zOWDP3nM-HSimttzlIJQA6UKwDX_IACBwDVHTvimKLn0-1Ef_qXXaROkFWxhtMirI8qJFueeKGBnjnMidrv9wHw8xhiyMNEStY2_7CjMiRDCj6twRLHEvWeAePnyb-1mdXXqFqkvpcExnfo7POSOCmvmumGCCaSdWHWSTcA/7mPLCKd7gsxxjuZ__kBtAxXG7vyIj4TF/7)

| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/d8maW9a4goa7s3VaBJ64NOproixhKI2Ql9xXmmvhyQMFpp5JR2T7ul0qR2J70IPcC9u2xGa3Dl25LgMmCFmZyrWuZORQGOsnNRzq5OcTgoQi7QZ3o6mFVuRAehEo-JB_8BVuhC8wQB_zO3eO9kYHr14Nfu6RNE-x4WbWRRpHKvA5nlWSe2BPD8nqlImsCmwCvtzg5otDNmkBW8LbtQ4X-L60VZuY2Kky4QxyIM5c0w54gm7XFsXMXdF-aaC02Z2NOcpPdXw8v5-e7HgVcKa-6nV2RHcO_gRo5QCyU3pMjETcVtelC_cJtU3-Hfar2mmpiNgeUZF2XUDPVu1afxZ0KN4TtIEFw5iPguBruNPmGsc83avU9wN-mjgOFW7pdyjcZ2Y3GDBokzN9YyV1NQQhe2kuSfDoqKeY7Z9eEQcWXBnPoZxLsWhYoG9TLuecyOwmZr2bkwu4FT5_uNwH_oW05tqKec0b3xtdIz9ah04Vcpcj-Q7MCOmfnrYSBg/ZaEopVgtmACYclCIz3fEAzcDfc-6NDdj/7)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/yeigALD5vjlMhWzOvTan-MZqJBgWoLGdVl73E51d8np9M6Qrfz7Jx11lgot1Red2qW30jV0-Xb8djqPQFTPePH3PYC8hFFylnZDuI4h867EJ95RA8MbbXnrVIZh4g_8cTM00yHcsRlpTDhaaWt6LZTpEbBlyFUQgw_cz6OJoWFTBSOdVHed4_bn5UqwqYRcx9OuUBPaIosFhD4CCZ9SVSjuWlZLcNylO-cKshdvbYInjuR0qtJ7vrznEjZbMPh88NFY7h1N5o3ah8RdI6JENEkqc9ivPhPj-vhtsKIdlt9K02gEFoBPni-1TIkDDIHdTLLPURzr0mSjTd-MEeZCanJv6xnJtU8_jcpXz0IDgz88CfkdjejRpNrp3xva0YAw6PPqZ-uUtf2IvKgaK3DdIckViV609fcnk2BzHvzvYBf8_XgODjF_vn-iv82ALKuFRVM-Mb-0DyQRxv9YQsMtw8L5xBkcGm9_fNEqVrB_SqGViS3fWj1XlFSD7mA/vWrz6mNTNQ40o7We2OL7p2cZab-0WF4_/7)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: More Violent Threats
body:
They hate me because I am fighting for you

| | | | |
---
Fellow patriot– Jasmine Crockett just uploaded a _**sickening**_ and _**depraved**_ video depicting her, and Rep. AOC, towering over **a helpless, incapacitated Republican,** and beating him with their fists and feet while **he lays defenseless on the ground. **
_**This is another grotesque celebration of violence from the party that burned and looted our country in 2020, that tried to murder President Trump twice, and that sends me violent threats almost every day.**_
Almost every single day, **I’m bombarded with death threats,** all fueled by the relentless, **hateful rhetoric spewed by the media** and amplified by **unhinged politicians like Crockett and AOC.**
I’ve had sitting members of Congress go on live television, and openly call for “ _actual weapons_ ” to be turned against me – just like what we saw in Butler, PA where a radical leftist claimed the life of Corey Comperatore, seriously wounded two others, and came less than an inch from ending President Trump’s life: **Real _guns_ , real _violence_ , real _blood_.**
**AOC herself said it best: “When we incite violence with depictions against our colleagues, that trickles down into violence in this country, and that is where we must draw the line.”**
That’s a far cry from her being depicted in this video beating a Republican senseless. **These people are all vicious hypocrites.**
I have a family. I was a very successful businesswoman before I ran for Congress. I’ve got loved ones who rely on me. I had a good life before all of this and I left that peace and privacy behind because I love this country, and I knew that Congress needed a fighter.
**I am under constant threats due to the violent rhetoric constantly pushed out by the left.**
_**[I’ve had to dig into my savings to pay for private security, I’ve had to take resources away from my re-election fights to fund my protection, and honestly I need your help](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abbb/?__vbtrk=MjgwMzIzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMzIzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_**.**
If you’re able, please chip in whatever you can so I can keep myself, my loved ones, and my staff safe.
_**[I hate to ask, but I truly need the help right now](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abbb/?__vbtrk=MjgwMzIzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMzIzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_**.**
[DONATE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abbb/?__vbtrk=MjgwMzIzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMzIzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_In Liberty,_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abbb/?__vbtrk=MjgwMzIzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMzIzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**_Marjorie Taylor Greene_**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abbb/?__vbtrk=MjgwMzIzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMzIzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

## Violent Tornadoes Pound South
Violent tornadoes [killed at least 20 people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFuwyAYBOCnwRsW_BhsBoYu3tK1o0Xgd0yFTQTEKG9fuera7ZNOupPu67bcbIjheHzaHU1d0wIMJGWCcrV4G-J7GTpvVkRA0aHh4wCc62mEbjPcczkBCuWsUAxHN8lp1Mp5671are6CudqY4IozNg26t-BADgq41RL9nZOBoQ815f47haNuuMZ3OjH3Lu1dNFutz0LEB4GZwNxa64-7O7CVKycwXyQwvwr9Uwwn0ntMDwJzwRMz0oa2bphpSa-60T34hqXS7A7LtZJKdNn4ZwsxhqJGMrDHbkP83a___XEa-AkAAP__0v1i5Q) and decimated homes in the Mississippi Valley and Deep South on Saturday. The death toll is expected to rise. Hundreds of thousands of people were without power across the region, and 10 million are under a "tornado watch" from Tennessee to Louisiana. Photos of the tornado damage [can be seen here. ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3SpCAQRZ8GM6ymBX8Cgk3IZtMNrXZoR7ZUpoAZy7ffYvMv6-D0ubfun8f8oLCH8_WbDrZljTMCGgmdVP3sKez3rBtvV2bkrmGrBo1KTeOAzWbBm2Fg3evVkOlhMKx5XfxiPCwLQd8EW23QqV4BjHpqCZ9odI-KJsN-UUID-1Biav_GcJaN1_2OX07tMx7NbrdS3ll0vwQ6ge66rvaTqURPdwUEulxiugW6k69cCaaycRLoaq5AB51Ap-pVYjrJR86y_hxZHiHn-ElBHsFfnIvM8VM26emgF8v3FkusyhG17mAaAQaBrknWv6-w7yH3g9DwOijs_8uWn8b7WvwXAAD__wxJcCY) The federal Storm Prediction Center issued the [rare “high risk” designation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp_G3ojg8uuBoUu2dO1oXZtLTItNBChR3r5y946fPuno6Hzd5humnI77J-7keywzcNCMSybMHDDl96zG4CMRkBzJC6tAiMlZGDcfhBUrLkDWokUnrdCTFiZoA2jkhGPyJ41LYQTnTk0XhBW0MiBw0hQWMShOIfVSL98lHX2jmN_lSfWyln3Mfuv90Qb5McB1gCs-Dnq18zpH7WnNNMC10ZMqsRdh36iyXuqBoVBjrZe6N7al-8Zqaj8MVSTkDskoSauJUS2rs0sI0XDntBmrD49Xyjk1YwfF7zum_KfS_0vz9PAbAAD__7HxZZQ) on Saturday, an indication that “numerous intense and long-tracked tornadoes” were expected.
## U.S., Iraq Kill ISIS Leader
U.S. Central Command and the Iraqi prime minister announced on Friday that they [killed the head of the Islamic State](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFurDAQRb_GdEb2YAwuXLyGbl-bEg142J3E4I1tLeLvo02f7kpXOkc6H7f5hhz5uP_HnXzd0gwKeqk6qe0ckOM1myb4jQioa8jrwYDWbhygeXhj0MDorF3VGpy14HDYgltGEzbXq6Vh_6apTlut1Ghci7BCbyxodD2FRQujKHBNuf1MfNQHbfFKL8rtmvYm-ketzyK6fwImAdN5nu26lIPO8v4FTO8pYIqEgbJMm-TCRXLGb1muzCi_OEYKkg-5c-SK-ZLpSRkrp0PA1GQfnifHyMUOwqj7jhx_3fWvFi8PPwEAAP__PtBiIg) for Iraq and Syria in a targeted operation. CENTCOM reported in [a social media post](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71OwzAUQOGnsbdW1_f6d_CAKrKlLEiMkWM7jZHTVIkp9O1R2VnP8Ennox_6UGq5Xs5hyb5N64CA6gB0EHpIodTHIHnyU86YiWcvjEQhnDXIZ28xRUvWjTlKla0mkpZiJDBujIYcL_6pAQktAKx0x4ARldQoglM5jYJJyKm0dTt-ruXa5jzVx3rP2zGuC69-bu22M3ph2DHsfp6VYXd6Pb-f3nqG3d5C-9oZdsIBGDLklBNKSkANfPPp9l1qLbs2TMJlCaX-ue2_z7vH3wAAAP__hqZP7g) that Abu Khadija was killed in a "precision airstrike" Thursday in Iraq's Al Anbar Province. A second ISIS operative was also killed in the strike. Abu Khadija served as ISIS [second-in-command and chief of global operations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kMFutCAURp8Gdxi4ouiCxZ_8cTfdNE2XBuGit0UxQGYyb99M911_yZdzzudtuVmKdG5v9kBTQ1pAQM9Fx-WweEvxuajGm4AI2DVopFYg5TRqaHbjOxCTXpUKVvvJ6XEVIJ0MdhRayzE0ZF5vopODFGJUU2vBQa8GkHbq0a-SKYGeasrtV6Kz7hjiM90xty4dTTR7rVdh3T8GM4PZru7ER2m39JoZzB_vDGaHZ3Xp4CFlh4V_U4ycChXudsLAt5hWG3m6MNtK6Sz8yuioUDoZzKWm_GTdTJ51_19e0MM4Ntn460ExUhk0U2I7LMVfpPpXoruBnwAAAP___k5oRw). He was identified through a DNA match from evidence collected on a previous raid where the terrorist narrowly escaped, officials said.
## SpaceX Launches Mission to Return Astronauts
The replacements for [NASA’s two stuck astronauts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1v8yAURn-NvRHB5csMDO-SLe_a0bqGS0JLjGVI0vz7yt07Pnqko6PzcZkvmEter__xTr6nOgMHzbhkwswRc3nPaow-EQHJkbywCoRwk4Xx5ilpMMIYKzFORmjlJhNQSuPcIjBNY_YHjUthBOeTcieEAFoZEOg0xUUMilPMve6nz5rXfqNU3vVJ-ynU-1j8rfetDfLfAOcBzrit9GrHdYy951BogPOKDVnrj_DFsPW9rvjojbUNA32zpVJer4wgAdlE0SAno7WWtFhwIBcntQ123H3cXrmU3IwdFL_eMZdfif5XlKeHnwAAAP__07FiWw) launched for the International Space Station on Friday night, with a scheduled arrival set for late Saturday night. SpaceX’s Falcon 9 rocket lifted off from NASA’s Kennedy Space Center in Florida carrying [four astronauts who will replace Butch Wilmore and Suni Williams](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L1urDAQxfGnMZ2RPTZfhYvb0O1tU6LBDIsTYyM8u2TfPtr0qY_009H_4zbdMMSQ7v9xJ8drnkBBI5WRup0WDPE12WpxKxGQqcjpzoLWQ99BtTnq-27QvgXdNs3crRppWJVthtmYmXRXBffWlNGtVqq3Q43gobEtaBwaWmYtrKIlcD7rzxwSb7TGV37SWfu8V9FtzEcR5p-AUcB4XVft0-zfo4DxTQsYlREwaitgTFhQYlpkOdDTtyzEcs2n3EMpISfJWZYLD5kfLAs__JfEwmdO-OBSb7zH6nTLcYUYQ2k7YdV9xxB_r_BfaZ4OfgIAAP__z-xlRA), who have been in orbit for nine months now.

Problems with the Boeing Starliner's propulsion system during their initial flight made it to risky to fly home on the craft. There will be [a two-day handover](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z72OhCAUxfGngW7M5YIMFhTb2M22Wxo-riMTlImSIb79xu23O8lJfsn_5zE9XMppe367lWydy4SA_Q3kTegpupTPSfFoZyIkycmKu0IhBnNHvtjgZ0kSfIwCYjBIGkyIvg-DgrkHw5O9NJBCCwCjhs5hwF5pFG7oKXrBFFBMtezdq6StLjTns3xo70JZebZLre-DyS-GI8OxtdZ5H66P4bhROxiObq8pZLpmIHNqfO3t2QrfbXy3lHM69J0peK4u5T-1_lf5sfgbAAD__5T6VAo) before the old crew are due to begin their journey back to Earth. That would put them on course for a splashdown off the Florida coast late next week.

On this day in 1802, Congress approved legislation establishing the United States Military Academy at West Point, one of the oldest military service academies in the world. () Perhaps you never liked eating your vegetables as a kid. Did you consider playing them like musical instruments instead? This orchestra specializes in it--. We're sponsored today by , offering affordable hearing ads with crystal clear sound. | Violent Tornadoes Pound South Violent tornadoes and decimated homes in the Mississippi Valley and Deep South on Saturday. The death toll is expected to rise. Hundreds of thousands of people were without power across the region, and 10 million are under a "tornado watch" from Tennessee to Louisiana. Photos of the tornado damage The federal Storm Prediction Center issued the on Saturday, an indication that “numerous intense and long-tracked tornadoes” were expected. U.S., Iraq Kill ISIS Leader U.S. Central Command and the Iraqi prime minister announced on Friday that they for Iraq and Syria in a targeted operation. CENTCOM reported in that Abu Khadija was killed in a "precision airstrike" Thursday in Iraq's Al Anbar Province. A second ISIS operative was also killed in the strike. Abu Khadija served as ISIS . He was identified through a DNA match from evidence collected on a previous raid where the terrorist narrowly escaped, officials said. SpaceX Launches Mission to Return Astronauts The replacements for launched for the International Space Station on Friday night, with a scheduled arrival set for late Saturday night. SpaceX’s Falcon 9 rocket lifted off from NASA’s Kennedy Space Center in Florida carrying , who have been in orbit for nine months now. Problems with the Boeing Starliner's propulsion system during their initial flight made it to risky to fly home on the craft. There will be before the old crew are due to begin their journey back to Earth. That would put them on course for a splashdown off the Florida coast late next week. name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Around the World: March 16th, 2025
body:
Trump’s Economic Sabotage: Higher Prices, Lost Jobs, and Global Chaos.
| | | | | |
---
**_Around the World_**
---
Hello, friend! Welcome back to Around the World, No Dem Left Behind’s email series exploring global events that shape U.S. politics. These aren’t just headlines—they impact policy, elections, and the future of our democracy. Every Sunday, join me, Olya Makarova, as I break down the latest in foreign policy. From major world events to shifting voter sentiments, Around the World will give you the insights you need to stay informed and ahead of the curve. This week, we’re diving into Trump’s reckless trade war—how it’s driving up costs for working families, straining our alliances, and threatening America’s global leadership.
---
| | | | **Trump’s Trade War**
---
|
---
Trump’s reckless trade war is alienating America’s closest allies and hitting working families with higher costs. He has imposed **25% tariffs on all imports from Canada and Mexico, 10% tariffs on all imports from China, and raised tariffs on steel and aluminum to 25% for all countries** —a dramatic escalation from previous targeted tariffs. The result? Prices on everyday goods—**groceries, cars, and appliances—are rising** , and experts warn the average household will pay over **$1,200 more per year**. Small businesses and manufacturers are already feeling the squeeze, with one industry leader warning that layoffs could start “within weeks.” But this isn’t just an economic disaster—it’s a diplomatic crisis. **European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen condemned the tariffs as “unjustified” and vowed, “Europe will not sit idly by while the U.S. attacks free and fair trade.”** German Chancellor Olaf Scholz warned, “If the U.S. leaves us no choice, we will respond as one.” Even Canada—our closest ally—has accused Trump of launching a **“trade war against its friends”** and is retaliating with **billions in tariffs on U.S. goods**. Instead of uniting with our allies against real threats, **Trump is pushing them away—while adversaries like Russia and China take advantage of the chaos**. Democrats are working to block these reckless tariffs, but **Republican leaders refuse to act**. If this continues, the damage will be **irreversible** —American consumers will keep paying more, small businesses will be forced to cut jobs, and our global leadership will erode even further. [**_We cannot afford to let Trump continue sabotaging our economy and isolating our allies. We must fight back, stand with our international partners, and demand leadership that strengthens—not weakens—America’s standing in the world._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wsqgr-vntgpz-kyd76rh0/) **Join us next week for the latest updates and stay informed with NDLB!**
---
|
---
-Olya Makarova
---

We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. | | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/WmVPgUqhWJD1bTLXLKBmUlOYgnNIxiWsJUtow0miDvhAOlOLUDX76qtD4jRP87qzsp390WFIzLcKyIFHnSbPj2QD2gaxcPPtape1wCtsE72cp19GbjZ0ihdVbIcShxfYkDgulEavhw63-2pLoYcvaVin3qoBI9KYPCC9qEJgVwT1Zvlxk19KhaxeOkbX9VxBuXRBa3oFNOV8IAodMPiGwIZZajxdJZDpW2M08BwfRrnSmFxKq_hr2nFumBsIv40k0v51SKluGr-u2barnGkdMmBoXWDIitW0dqWOydwrvYSUTaQnDfRc4uLFMveydv6PEV1EtN7F7qCMs4dKi6uIsVH29V7UahbsgT2XTpVzGyNJMLxmdruHmTVn-J6LheLxhTV1zXto9GpiZw2DlD-nJIQy-pPzw6MICWdoI0IeKf_4WoJPcuUtaZxecS1HkPbrYhO53NV4EQaea8WgyxlUxfsFPPywUf_D6-Rz8BEB8nDBcow9LEH-eni1rg/qP9y1exRF88f0mpZOpslY_yycgTJHLSb/7)," now available on DVD.

name: History Facts
subject: Did prehistoric humans eat magic mushrooms?
body:
Though research into the therapeutic effects of psilocybin is a relatively modern development, people have experimented with magic mushrooms
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dho35c59c2k4x23459qv34135q56ru70j9h6h4g0vyma837a343d6ynpzqpmfgifi1b5ewptm6yc0ojiql18xiyybe24p8cc0kgkt4qqlkpgsw1vjkpg8vs8otdqzsii98abtiq1w3m2d1o&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st7qt7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Magic mushrooms have been used since prehistoric times.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st7qt7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st7qt7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st7qt7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T hough research into the therapeutic effects of psilocybin**** is a relatively modern development, people have experimented with magic mushrooms (fungi with hallucinogenic effects) since the early days of human civilization. Following the discovery of a mural in northern Australia depicting mushroom-like figures and psychedelic drawings, archaeologists surmised that mushrooms likely played a social and cultural role in [Sandawe and Bradshaw](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st7qt7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) cultures as far back as 10,000 BCE. Similar mushroom-headed figures [have also been found](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st7qt7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in prehistoric caves in North Africa and Spain.
---
While little is known about these early psychedelic dabblings, the Aztecs’ ritual use of magic mushrooms has been well documented. Known in that culture as “teonanacatl,” or “flesh of the gods,” the fungi were used in religious ceremonies to induce trances, produce visions, and communicate with gods. Magic mushrooms were later outlawed by 16th-century Spanish colonizers, who cited their use as barbaric and anti-Catholic. As a result, the Spanish destroyed all records and evidence of psilocybin (the hallucinogenic chemical found in psilocybe mushrooms), and drove the ritual use of mushrooms underground, where it stayed for centuries.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st7qt7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st7qt7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---

---

---

---

| Species of magic mushrooms on the planet

| | | Did you know?
---|---|---
## Magic mushrooms were stigmatized because of the hippie movement.
If it weren’t for the 1960s “hippie” counterculture, the West’s relationship with magic mushrooms might be a lot less controversial today. In 1957, [Swiss chemist Albert Hoffmann](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st7qt7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) isolated psilocybin from the fungi and began to use the compound in medical trials — albeit briefly. The early research was promising, but the rampant use of psychedelics within the hippie movement led to federal backlash against the drug in the U.S., discouraging medical studies. Much of the decade’s social and political turbulence was attributed to psychedelic drug use, and this fueled the DEA’s push to ban the use of magic mushrooms and their hallucinogenic counterparts. As a result, psilocybin was outlawed under the Controlled Substances Act of 1970, and research didn’t pick back up until the turn of the 21st century.

clean_body: Though research into the therapeutic effects of psilocybin is a relatively modern development, people have experimented with magic mushrooms | T hough research into the therapeutic effects of psilocybin** is a relatively modern development, people have experimented with magic mushrooms (fungi with hallucinogenic effects) since the early days of human civilization. Following the discovery of a mural in northern Australia depicting mushroom-like figures and psychedelic drawings, archaeologists surmised that mushrooms likely played a social and cultural role in cultures as far back as 10,000 BCE. Similar mushroom-headed figures in prehistoric caves in North Africa and Spain. While little is known about these early psychedelic dabblings, the Aztecs’ ritual use of magic mushrooms has been well documented. Known in that culture as “teonanacatl,” or “flesh of the gods,” the fungi were used in religious ceremonies to induce trances, produce visions, and communicate with gods. Magic mushrooms were later outlawed by 16th-century Spanish colonizers, who cited their use as barbaric and anti-Catholic. As a result, the Spanish destroyed all records and evidence of psilocybin (the hallucinogenic chemical found in psilocybe mushrooms), and drove the ritual use of mushrooms underground, where it stayed for centuries. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . By the Numbers | | Typical percentage of psilocybin in magic mushrooms today 0.2%-0.4% | | Year Tenochtitlan, capital of the Aztec Empire, was founded 1325 | Year Tenochtitlan, capital of the Aztec Empire, was founded 1325 | | Americans who reportedly used hallucinogens in 2021 7.4 million | | Species of magic mushrooms on the planet 180 | Species of magic mushrooms on the planet 180 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Magic mushrooms were stigmatized because of the hippie movement. If it weren’t for the 1960s “hippie” counterculture, the West’s relationship with magic mushrooms might be a lot less controversial today. In 1957, isolated psilocybin from the fungi and began to use the compound in medical trials — albeit briefly. The early research was promising, but the rampant use of psychedelics within the hippie movement led to federal backlash against the drug in the U.S., discouraging medical studies. Much of the decade’s social and political turbulence was attributed to psychedelic drug use, and this fueled the DEA’s push to ban the use of magic mushrooms and their hallucinogenic counterparts. As a result, psilocybin was outlawed under the Controlled Substances Act of 1970, and research didn’t pick back up until the turn of the 21st century. | |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/l7ivG1SyioIHvSlYUSB_VXmp7V0mbL6dUDs6yoN3YeK8UEf97qtyuPt1YREgyEWKYZ_26RXehkSukmeLq7aaxroz4YDEhmLnen4Et8sTQiygcEi0IzdigNnTXeMYkkyubtg2UvhIvB5ok25FHdcYk6U4ETl1dCzj78Z15P5LJl1AhgtcqV0HzNje8o8JcvD6jMv7SR0S3rqc5QagdKfe8GKIQVTLXr8eRXmZgFzABefZDpLN9dXM5dIYdUV9NH-tGuB-sfcOH6SiYsT6nF2ejd3ICLuTy0aYyoFzHlq-azUUr-EIdYUs6_G33lFDy5gSp-AK1SJZSPoNNiDF4GpEOjpVHSYu70hkj5nGJJy2ei2VN1dEYJuu6ZizxA1K_mj4X4cuA7q8v7-h__xi5LuedEOSZnWS65cu-70T9Xr7fFosenP6hSptd2cmmxy57cY/ETCAyeIXqqB6vvz2GAbIj0SomDLt1-Sa/7).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/talpRr2N1g3xULmD3PqlGfk1YV4ep4yEWntDerx_Cx7W47RTWgXF-v63w8FHmNn8uFZGuEioAg95MN2wwc_OOmbX2iEfaZnycpUHGcSP8-UDn7ZaXH0oiRgiX8RiZ3GLF-nlHqVlwJEKOXLn879h0uRhZF48atum_Q-EPXTo4oMlPauu1V4Vzagz5QD9lgtboIxqw-h3bni8eSVdjhsh1wmjgdr8cA2fY-CNKNH_rl4hyzre6_Kc90dYYI1-ZuZXQ6EvUvWGfC4tvX-dblfpHga7sful0HcaJfYDhO6Cmmci6mM15Rr1j3yHDPs3cxoIwvxCPUqzyxIMfkdTuKPh0qc8wLWXdBr0E2g2R-QGBbzkvaN5QwDlRxU2h-Xdkxz5Qn0vyhCSZ4IX3LMw_p0VWiIq1mpx6IcFTNUhyUNxJp1VyH0Owaqaf905-9tSZ1M/z0jIg12Wy395ie9mJPumOjykEJgo4IPy/7)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

subject: For the cost of a monthly streaming service…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is a message for everyone who dreams of a country free from the epidemic of gun violence.
#

Friends -
This is a message for everyone who dreams of a country free from the epidemic of gun violence.
We're humbly asking you to make a donation to GIFFORDS today.
Here's why:
For the cost of a monthly streaming service, you can directly impact our work by strengthening our gun laws where we can, and protecting them where we must.
There is no organization like GIFFORDS working with state legislatures, governors and Congress who is able to put the human and financial resources where they are needed and when they are needed most when it comes to this work.
Every time we strengthen a gun law, we save a life. Every time we stop Republicans from weakening a gun law, we save more.
These next few years are going to be our biggest challenge yet, and Gabby can't do this work alone.
[**If making our communities safer from gun violence is worth a few dollars to you, we're asking you to contribute today. Our average online donation is around $30. Many give more, some give less. We're just asking you to chip-in what feels right today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar25.KlmT7F&refcode=em250316-1-b&t=1&akid=10116%2E3935704%2Eh4B_bL)

If we’re able to flip WI-03 blue next year by electing Rebecca, it would go a long way toward taking back control of the House and ending the national elites’ war on workers. That’s why the powers that be are trying to undercut this campaign before it begins, _and it’s why we have to keep going even stronger._ **We have a chance to send a message to Walker and the establishment that we’re not going anywhere, and we need your help to do it:** [**If you haven’t yet, please chip in whatever you can today. name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Emails vanish in Shapiro admin scandal
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=98ee6589a2&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
