### **1.[Shapiro admin can’t locate key emails in sexual harassment case — “zero emails on the server...is preposterous”](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=03ad79ffb4&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
A week’s worth of emails from a former Shapiro administration deputy cabinet secretary no longer exist. That’s what an attorney conceded in court last month as he represented Gov. Josh Shapiro’s attempt to suppress Broad + Liberty’s legal effort to obtain more documents on the biggest scandal Shapiro has confronted in his first term. The employee in question, a young woman who claimed she was sexually harassed by a top Shapiro aide in 2023, no longer works for the commonwealth. The revelation made in court on February 12th raises the specter that the emails were purposefully deleted because they could shed new light on the scandal. The government’s lawyer seemed to suggest, instead, that they were merely deleted for matters of good digital hygiene. But government regulations indicate the emails should have been preserved a minimum of three years, if not longer. In this case, however, the emails were deleted substantially sooner. **Why It Matters.** Many regard the Vereb scandal as the most important and[ threatening development](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f85d74aedc&e=b7b3eddce2) thus far to Shapiro’s reputation, and it quickly became a focal point for national political reporters last summer when Shapiro was considered to be one of two finalists to be the vice-presidential running mate to Kamala Harris’ nascent presidential campaign. For example, as the “Veepstakes” speculation was reaching its peak last July, a political reporter for the New York Times filed a Right to Know with the governor’s office that was a duplicate of the original Right to Know filed by Broad + Liberty in December of 2023, according to the RTK log from the governor’s office. **Quotable.** Rep. Abby Major, who has been a confidant to the deputy who resigned, and who herself was also the[ subject of sexual harassment](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2ac441a752&e=b7b3eddce2) at the capitol, excoriated the idea of missing emails. "The idea that there are zero emails on the server for an employee is preposterous. Even after someone’s account is removed, there are still records of emails that were sent and received in other inboxes,” Major said.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bcd243bf1d&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Did Larry Krasner cause an armed standoff in Bucks County?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=324e5b51f5&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Ben Mannes_
A deadly January 24, 2025, car chase and armed standoff at a Bensalem gas station serve as yet another example of how Philadelphia District Attorney Larry Krasner’s policies continue to endanger both law enforcement and the public.

Court records show that the standoff that resulted in the fatal shooting of Zachiry Derrek Kerschner was entirely avoidable, had the Philadelphia District Attorney’s Office followed lawful protocols to properly ensure that repeat offenders on release for recent offenses remain behind bars where the law dictated they should be. Instead, Kerschner, a convicted felon with a history of firearms offenses, was allowed to remain free despite a legally mandated prison sentence.

His unlawful release and subsequent lack of supervision set the stage for the dangerous confrontation that unfolded in neighboring Bucks County, where Philadelphians have relocated to escape the lawlessness of Krasner’s policies.

**Why It Matters**. The consequences of Krasner’s policies extend beyond repeat offenders like Kerschner — they directly endanger law enforcement officers who are forced to deal with individuals who should never have been released in the first place. The five officers involved in the Bensalem standoff were placed in immediate, life-threatening danger because of a failure by the Philadelphia District Attorney’s Office to enforce the law as written.

“Every day, law enforcement officers put their lives on the line when they go out and perform their duties.” said McVey “What should have been a simple traffic stop ended in tragedy. Kerschner should have been behind bars that evening, not roaming the streets unsupervised with a gun.”

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bb8b5c6f0a&e=b7b3eddce2)

# **5\. Having an impact**
Today we begin [Sunshine Week](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d64610e5c5&e=b7b3eddce2), a non–partisan celebration of the importance of open records and transparency in government. So it is fitting that the lead story of this week’s email details [_Broad + Liberty_ ’s continuing investigation](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e9d95ea1ec&e=b7b3eddce2) into the Shapiro administrations coverup of a sexual harassment scandal and the disappearance of government emails connected with that misconduct. That coverup, like the offence itself, would have never come to light without the diligent efforts of investigative reporter Todd Shepherd — and the support of readers like you.
---
|
# **6\. What we're reading**
Greenland? Panama? A 51st state? Many have wondered what is behind Trump’s turn toward old-style expansionism. [In the _Wall Street Journal_ this week](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=658484a6a3&e=b7b3eddce2), reporters try to answer the question by examining Trump’s recent focus on one of his predecessors: James K. Polk. Our eleventh president, Polk served a single term, nearly doubled the size of the country, and retired. Part of his legacy comes from being in the right place at the right time, but part of it was also inspired leadership of a young nation with the vigor to overtake the continent. But is it possible to have a Polk-like president in the 21st century?****

Time To Rein In Universities’ Unchecked Power Over Funding

Universities have unchecked power in how they spend their funding that
seems to be growing each year through larger endowments, receiving
large sums of federal funding and increasing tuition for students.

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Fellow American – I’m counting on you right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=60ae33899c6d4af98b197d066fab9f70&_e=WbGKqAsG5tmn4Vsq_pctcK-Lu5HISN4FsnQmLPN3UoyevZAOP4O73HHiPWudcirXKXp74tEsGCxdwNLAOqMg7MGg8ei84Vxa2u7-ED5pByeWQyjd6ptFhiTTey3-fu_-YrSyw2yXid8PpiI8Wklxula8aGkdKmyIlE1j8wmi5sv3YhasL_s-YnkEI5TQTPdjU4oKJZUSRNarF9fp4rsHwaND2gq6Z3uG6RxEuoatUc-LvHHdYW5AJCcXOhG_BZpGsS_xYc9DXAFrZPkcRZMH-ihHBDp4x4aHAJL3kzIsv4Tbl91B1YMwSiXFllUjSWUY73m3qpFEtUNMf6xVl3jWhEwOcu9GRDNDOqqGdJW7vWY0npQ6Wvq47VpGK67Nkpu91AOkUdp4JQTbhoWKdkUNUPtjnAQsk7znML4eUflqPd8R6d2iG_e3sOkpOAR8y1t-_0x0kjS8liqVP86fH_Ilkw%3D%3D)
---
My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I was working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
| | [ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=60ae33899c6d4af98b197d066fab9f70&_e=WbGKqAsG5tmn4Vsq_pctcK-Lu5HISN4FsnQmLPN3UoyevZAOP4O73HHiPWudcirXKXp74tEsGCxdwNLAOqMg7MGg8ei84Vxa2u7-ED5pByeWQyjd6ptFhiTTey3-fu_-YrSyw2yXid8PpiI8Wklxula8aGkdKmyIlE1j8wmi5sv3YhasL_s-YnkEI5TQTPdjU4oKJZUSRNarF9fp4rsHwaND2gq6Z3uG6RxEuoatUc-LvHHdYW5AJCcXOhG_BZpGsS_xYc9DXAFrZPkcRZMH-ihHBDp4x4aHAJL3kzIsv4RGw66HNzmFkETLuJWK3fJSQ7NQp-f_MhoYYPSgw37-nblZRfemVQWGflnv7vyPrvgEhqkUnRQb84KvL0K0U_P4DE_Y7BGij2NwWWpHRRuUFUs_VUXfohJPplzcrBSGClC4bH3R67F-yk0lh-LgiI9XRlLQNB6yIrLXX6Pmz8jSHA%3D%3D)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. clean_body: I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!| | | My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I was working hard in our capital. Seriously , a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage.If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! | | Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Fellow American, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: [RESPONSE REQUESTED] Add your name and personally endorse Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
As a team, we want to make sure we never lose sight of how important you are to Mark’s work — and how grateful we are that you have his back.
#

Team —
As a team, we want to make sure we never lose sight of how important you are to Mark’s work — and how grateful we are that you have his back.
In 2020, hundreds of thousands of people signed on to say they were with Mark. Thousands more did the same in 2022.
It meant the world to us, and to Mark.
Now, he needs our help again. He’s got a new mission: _Holding the Trump Administration accountable, combatting Elon Musk’s illegal actions, and getting the next generation of leaders elected to the United States Senate._
**And today, we’re respectfully asking you to sign on and personally endorse Mark Kelly.**
[**Will you add your name to say you personally support Mark Kelly? It’s important for Mark to know that he’s got a big team backing him up.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_mark_kelly_march25/?source=em250316-1-90&akid=6008%2E6688874%2EXGm-QC)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_mark_kelly_march25/?source=em250316-1-90&akid=6008%2E6688874%2EXGm-QC)**
With so much happening now this might seem like an insignificant action. But in times like these, everything we do matters.
When you join the thousands of others who have endorsed Mark it helps us put together a team from coast to coast that can do incredible things. It’s bigger than any one of us, and it sends an important message.
Actions like this are how we’ll get through this — how we’ll turn the tide.
Together.
[**So, please, hit this link and personally endorse Mark.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_mark_kelly_march25/?source=em250316-1-90&akid=6008%2E6688874%2EXGm-QC)
Thank you!
Team Kelly
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/endorse_mark_kelly_march25/?source=em250316-1-90&akid=6008%2E6688874%2EXGm-QC)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6008%2E6688874%2EXGm-QC).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

body:
Last year, my race was one of the closest in the entire country. Now, I'm running to finish the job in 2026.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86969?refcode=em20250316-8824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8824%2E614464%2E9JfPcr)
**I wanted you to be the first to know that I just launched my campaign to unseat Derrick Van Orden and flip Wisconsin’s 3rd Congressional District.**
Last year, my race was one of the closest in the entire country as we united working folks from all stripes. When the nation shifted rightward, we still outperformed every other Democrat in this district in years.
Now, I’m running to finish the job in 2026.
**[If that’s all you need to hear, I’m asking you to split a donation of $10 with Heartland Patriots to become a Founding Donor of my 2026 campaign to flip WI-03. We set an ambitious goal of bringing in 2,026 contributions to launch with grassroots momentum, and your support today will go a long way.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86969?refcode=em20250316-8824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8824%2E614464%2E9JfPcr)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86970?refcode=em20250316-8824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=8824%2E614464%2E9JfPcr) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86970?refcode=em20250316-8824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=8824%2E614464%2E9JfPcr) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86969?refcode=em20250316-8824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=8824%2E614464%2E9JfPcr)
---
Here’s more about why I’m in this race:
We outperformed every Democratic race in our district in 2024, reaching more than five points better than the top of the ticket, and even outperforming the winning Senate race.
We did it with a coalition that united working Wisconsinites, ranging from labor unions, to farmers, to students, and even voters who went with Trump.
And since that time, our call to put real, working class Wisconsinites first has only become more critical.
These past couple of months have the American people reeling from crushing attacks from this administration – policies that have put billionaires first and hit working families the hardest.
I’m feeling it personally. I’m still waitressing at the _Good Wives_ in Eau Claire, and I hear the same ongoing concerns from folks in our community. Basic costs of living like groceries and utility costs are still on the rise, health care is less accessible and affordable, family farms are folding, and home ownership feels further and further out of reach.
We can’t sit on the sidelines as the elites take up every last resource and leave all of us behind. We need action to have public service that works for us.
**I know what working families need, because I’m part of one. And I wouldn’t be in this race if I wasn’t confident we could finish the job. But I can’t do this alone:**
**[Split a donation of $10 with Heartland Patriots today to become a Founding Donor of my campaign. Winning is going to take widespread, grassroots support, and I’m counting on you to be a part of this effort.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86969?refcode=em20250316-8824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=8824%2E614464%2E9JfPcr)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86970?refcode=em20250316-8824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=8824%2E614464%2E9JfPcr) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86970?refcode=em20250316-8824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=8824%2E614464%2E9JfPcr) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86970?refcode=em20250316-8824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=9&akid=8824%2E614464%2E9JfPcr) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86970?refcode=em20250316-8824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=10&akid=8824%2E614464%2E9JfPcr) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86970?refcode=em20250316-8824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=11&akid=8824%2E614464%2E9JfPcr) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86970?refcode=em20250316-8824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=12&akid=8824%2E614464%2E9JfPcr) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/86969?refcode=em20250316-8824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=8824%2E614464%2E9JfPcr)
---
Thank you for your support,
Rebecca

1️⃣ **_Minnesota:_ Democrats win key special election 🎉 **
On Tuesday, Democrats secured a win in Minnesota to restore the tie in the state House chamber. This puts Minnesota Dems a step closer to taking back the majority in 2026. [This is the fourth majority-deciding special election this year in which Democrats emerged victorious → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.A3cd-kVlFz1CzUMSYeTvVdk17YauWuavDsfzTP5GZep6RlU1dMzQ-JDZ2sI6_pI-BTAjoHCWCGpr4SGvQ_WxW9eo7wrkThbBivQj0B8fMp1udVEKREEZhbSmPkBKMaWQVISwpsLV8zH-DAFMfU2z8-rx59J0RIofRAf_B-Zq8vGdQAm8bztjwYksneHAy4nE4u1VlPbvFZ1ePSrcq7PS1PGP9VYvuQXWMyJ7ccMgG9TFh7H7OeLqd-v304yVxWcUDopI14hohIlMPHYOWSKo8ThEBJ64u2nmpTOJg1PwWzNEGlrLbiYJKq4LtMIx4zXCNKRyibp4BvO6qKTlX0bkVVSviKW4EbFRMQsT7Z0WaPLU9CntOmFknp7LtxY-UBgf3PsfCK8CWQ6AC7BO_7K0jxKTufZBAlmaY-2jHMLaMkijlG3gJHlR3esfYvTXRgHWqbjyQiTzo9BQEaHZwoFJEtLiITV1tI6yT5l92u22eLpupO9Wr6jxEZG-OfWiVZhYwBz3Y4gGvZaaE5wDF-cGqs_FgsRQ5pQkA2hWFKCPgiEL-TeF0qng1rMGETwAD74cx1RfYT7QXMyemFxXY0uJrneKTk9YBOIwTdbO4aVavcZQ5d6SOI94N8pExUhVDuysK_tTAFXGPfhFqAGZ8gi_vUB2IvEx8ivL1rnnnaBe6uw/4eu/6ufNcW8xTCe7a-ie3qrSPg/h1/h001.lK8itG_fnYxjpxfkzGUuaGv4wXQz9Rsmca13gRBHoTA)
2️⃣ **_Utah:_ Republicans ban fluoride in the public water supply **
The Republican-controlled Utah legislature made history this week as the first state legislature to ban fluoride in the state’s public water supply, a move that could embolden extreme state lawmakers across the nation. [Meanwhile, Democrats in state legislatures are finding solutions that promote health care accessibility and affordability → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pDgwcNPMeZGxdiUTj7FXe92Pl7IJlXYtJRcqdA9FN96DJ481gjyQPDd7A3YWPnWVpjY9rVAxj92pJvd8-3JUwbkOGO2v3GX07kywIQmvTBijUN0QanfRssopm77ug6Cse16PzWm0AemlCHwWqZl6Shhnw3uhbJk2OddJk2pd5G_WD9CXG4fupx_Bx9SfkC1JdHpK0w4AvlF8FMKRNCU2VAVr_UWtbHvRgGWa5226w0qkdnYJSC3Cj6Brl9lXj9fR9CTSOtYwNYjwsuUnmGij26m73t90LX62RjUkT20vE6CTF6H-eRvF-HQ2pdS65eXnRe_FLZR7c3OLNdo7MDEXuk6oDGsQNbOiA1OU9kRcyB6YqOn_eRBjiI7fyi2RRfokXp784_T9f8YWGSjgRwx2NGU9bMREWiAqpQqVI4qRUxDfb1tVJIP1Wvaftd2e67VMs1boCnahQO9nMxGFsT382YS27luIQD0kftAFhCN0UfLafzIwhfP5BNHh9tnxbxYSY8L4RWNoiv69Tdc5StwvU7C8b-ERP5xdNkEF_Hxr6Ur-Mduk6nW6rzcTpDA8QnUF7kuOukbsBtjVBsl-_vWwQrt7sRx2LT5990tVMvS0siGWAIfZQ6zL4rONYWA4XP1nwU/4eu/6ufNcW8xTCe7a-ie3qrSPg/h2/h001.YrLdSLhEoXny0ziZYtNPJQf6yPTzhVnBE0aZX6MgGgM)
3️⃣ **_DOGE Watch:_ State Republicans Eager to Climb on Slash and Burn Bandwagon **
The GOP is adopting 'DOGE-style' work in the states, and Democrats are calling out the Republican-led overspending. Rep. Cyndi Munson, the leader of her chamber’s Democratic caucus pointed out the hypocrisy by saying, _“Republicans have been in control of the state of Oklahoma for nearly 20 years, so whatever waste they find will be at their feet.”_[Learn more about the spread of ‘DOGE’ ideology in the states → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdUS12fSrk6MMZIR1Ut2K6fpQlOuZcA594iwltDGB0QH_9OUdwd56JJC_uP94fTMQv7J5wdf4r-BacxUF1iBB9LYq-JBw7bbAm2Je66Zb9p5o7yz_wixu0QxuwCUzshq_zKC5-dN-yso2FC-HjUs7HcySCPggriYd1G4UhLyjNpkr_NtthVot8VFEqS6fI8dCpBm3obGq9jPM9SkzMaOT2r2VgwG2fMRkiyz9o93o7KJqJuHntEL3yBEU6T9VkEQJkVyLquGQNIOeZ_ehDVc970YDVYrOaBTnMu7jORUuLRZi-bbPakLR5CjuKd_IoIKIpj6XgWMNvgikWpdfjF7mA8-XTMibcJSO9isNIc-1oBDMijn4aWBBZ3ZEdDvon5LizGOf-joWxHfADcgnQcn3ike8WSUq-1NjwLxabWsAFoxPI38vksRQqusnXzOh4EqXVoQa2yA370F_1NfpOKQJYlMBZuxsL5DX2QCCw2o7qFJSx2djWYTK1guWdDUbLVgFEMeLGrLAOQJlCHmAGVl5GnlafHDnFo-TNWf8gh9-yBfr-ZOCEXY-tScaZM7YCapJvyOCxQcR2LUInw-KR_UvBZPwvZMKYsFzHCh7n7yQuJ_scyf7RJg3TsZIgxNCuOqA8azkwBHdmyb6IKDEPVzxvo/4eu/6ufNcW8xTCe7a-ie3qrSPg/h3/h001.tfIKWXhxnrFRqmIv4pOaEIUPtuc8aT5ASx6AgrysIQY)

Trump’s slew of executive orders have led to chaos and confusion for millions of Americans. We know these actions have real consequences. clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, March 16th, 2025. | | | | | | 1️⃣ Minnesota: Democrats win key special election 🎉 On Tuesday, Democrats secured a win in Minnesota to restore the tie in the state House chamber. This puts Minnesota Dems a step closer to taking back the majority in 2026. 2️⃣ Utah: Republicans ban fluoride in the public water supply The Republican-controlled Utah legislature made history this week as the first state legislature to ban fluoride in the state’s public water supply, a move that could embolden extreme state lawmakers across the nation. 3️⃣ DOGE Watch: State Republicans Eager to Climb on Slash and Burn Bandwagon The GOP is adopting 'DOGE-style' work in the states, and Democrats are calling out the Republican-led overspending. Rep. Cyndi Munson, the leader of her chamber’s Democratic caucus pointed out the hypocrisy by saying, “Republicans have been in control of the state of Oklahoma for nearly 20 years, so whatever waste they find will be at their feet.” ✍️ Get involved: Will you share how the second Trump Administration has impacted you? Trump’s slew of executive orders have led to chaos and confusion for millions of Americans. We know these actions have real consequences. So we want to hear how Trump’s actions are impacting communities like yours. 🫏 Join the fight: Become an Official DLCC Member If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. body:

But they’re not stupid._ So they worked behind the scenes and under the radar to INFILTRATE our nation's schools! **_ONE SCHOOL BOARD AT A TIME._** **_Powerful leftist dark money groups connected to Obama, George Soros, and Hillary Clinton have been funneling cash to bankroll RADICAL leftist activists to run for and win school board seats in every state in the country._** And, now that they've lost the biggest election of the 21st century, **_they're trying to stab us in the back while we're focusing on saving our country._** How will they make MAGA extinct? **_They'll brainwash an entire generation of children to HATE America._** And then? **_Bye Bye MAGA._** When the children they've force-fed CRAZY leftist B.S. for 18 years straight come of age, they'll end America's Golden Age. _They'll kill off the remnants of the MAGA movement, and get their plans to destroy our country back on track..._ _**_[_**_But I know of a way to fight back and I am hoping and praying that you take a moment to read about it before it's too late._**_](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jzGT2yAQhX_NqpMGFgvsQkUSjVLkkibVpckgQDaOELoFWXf59Td4PC737bf73tNhnf300YH6CogXbxMggvgCiG-ve6DtGn58r6_jT1u_yV-hLVv89kBv-IQXo3kfL1Gtw0va_7__fvn3-ufGn3j-WN0Tfpg2Lmg_F1X1le3EZNmhch1XB-SCixNWl45JOx6VHDVTclJ8MnbUllklW3Y6KnOqfIcMWya45AIFa5tp4rYdj3ps5SQmq-HA7j6NDo680TzlXRPFGBoTQzV3l5zXdA82AA7JmY1cs_uFnC0E4MCVkvVK8epMrldtAAcblysZ8tkbPddBn7V7z34x2celvh-BGLYc_qa4kXEg-sXMgLJIwVm_BRD9SA8lOyrzThxQUklAfjmD6DNtDlDqkNeYfHkOoseKOrvufp59kgoO7HzvV9rcOvwMAAD___Pvk4s)_**_ I wouldn't ask if it weren't important, Patriot.

name: The Democrats
subject: What’s happening right now in Wisconsin →
disclaimer_text: paid for by an out-of-touch billionaire
body:
---
Derek, If you’re looking for a way to make an impact _right now_ , we’re here to tell you this is it. Let us explain: There are critical races happening right now in Wisconsin that are flying under the radar — but the outcome will directly impact people’s lives for the next decade. **On April 1, in one of those races, voters will elect a justice to the state Supreme Court for a 10-year term. The winner will be the swing vote in all Court decisions.** That’s why Republicans are laser-focused on this race, and we need to be, too. Take a look: [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-wi-split-march-2025?refcode=em_20250316_2971_fr&amount=10&refcode2=2971_22930333_X4AkAD&akid=2971%2E22930333%2EX4AkAD) Republicans are backing Brad Schimel, who once led a lawsuit to overturn the Affordable Care Act and rip health care away from hundreds of thousands of people. He also supported enforcing a dangerous abortion ban enacted in 1849 with no exceptions for rape or incest. If he becomes the deciding vote on the state Supreme Court, the consequences could be disastrous for people all over the state. Wisconsinites deserve better than an election bought and paid for by an out-of-touch billionaire. That’s why it’s so important we win this race — and it’s why we’re committed to investing as much as we can to ensure Democrats have the resources they’ll need in Wisconsin for this election and those to come. [**But we’ll need your help to do it. If you’re looking for a way to make an impact right now in important races like these, this is your opportunity. Can you split a $10 contribution now between the Wisconsin Democratic Party and the DNC to help power our work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-wi-split-march-2025?amount=10&refcode=em_20250316_2971_fr&refcode2=2971_22930333_X4AkAD&akid=2971%2E22930333%2EX4AkAD) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Wisconsin Democratic Party and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-wi-split-march-2025?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20250316_2971_fr&refcode2=2971_22930333_X4AkAD&akid=2971%2E22930333%2EX4AkAD)**

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: March is Women's History Month
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250316-1269-foote&t=1001&akid=1269%2E342411%2E66QMo3 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

This month is Women's History Month, a time to honor the incredible
contributions and impact of women around the world. This month also serves
as a reminder of the ongoing struggles women face in securing their
social, economic, and political freedom.

Right now in the U.S., women’s rights are under attack by the Trump
Administration. Since the U.S. Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade in
2022, we’ve seen horrific consequences: nearly 1 in 3 women are now
without legal access to abortion, and Republican-controlled states
continue to push for even more drastic restrictions on reproductive health
care.

This isn’t just a setback, Peter,
it is the start of a dangerous rollback of
rights that will directly impact millions of women – and the chaos doesn’t
stop there.

The Safeguarding American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act is one of the many
legislations being pushed with the goal of disenfranchising millions of
women, elderly Americans, and naturalized citizens. This bill would impose
unnecessary barriers to voter registration, particularly affecting women
who’ve changed their names after marriage, in a direct attack on their
right to vote.^1

Peter, in the
face of these and many other attacks, our Squad is not backing down.
Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are working to amplify critical
legislation that pushes back against the erosion of women’s rights,
combats harmful misinformation about reproductive health, and advocates
for policies that protect and expand women’s access to health care,
justice, and equality.

Our Squad is fighting for a future where women can make decisions about
their bodies, their health, and their futures without fear of government
overreach or political interference. But they can’t do this alone.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250316-movement.veFIq8&refcode=em20250316-1269&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1269%2E342411%2E66QMo3 ]This Women's History Month, please consider standing with the Squad and
supporting their work with a donation of $3 or more today.

Your contribution ensures that our Squad can continue to fight back
against this administration’s harmful agenda and work toward a future
where all women are truly free.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250316-movement.veFIq8&refcode=em20250316-1269&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1269%2E342411%2E66QMo3 ]Contribute ››

Together, we can protect the progress we’ve made and push forward toward
true justice and equality for all women.

In solidarity,

Squad Victory Fund

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

1 - [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19531?t=1022&akid=1269%2E342411%2E66QMo3 ]Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some
married women to vote. Here's who could be affected.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1269%2E342411%2E66QMo3

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: National Alerts
subject: Can't Sleep? Do This 20 Minutes Before Bed
body:
| | | | [](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
---
| | Tell me if this sounds familiar...

It's 2am and you're still staring at the ceiling...

You just can't seem to shut your brain off...

Your mind races a million miles an hour...

Maybe you can't stop thinking about money issues, health problems, or even something embarrassing you did or said...

Then, perhaps you finally DO fall asleep...

...only to jerk awake at 4am, knowing the next day you're going to feel tired, worn-out, and like a brain-dead zombie.

Does any of that ring a bell?

Well, just months ago... that was me...

I never slept more than 4 hours...

I felt exhausted, groggy, and dog-tired all the next day, downing pots of coffee to get through work...

And I turn into a cranky "you-know-what" when I don't catch my zzz's... so I was getting into all of these stupid little arguments with my wife.

I had to do something... or I would spend the rest of my nights on the couch.

And that's when I stumbled on a discovery from leading MIT sleep researchers... and it changed everything.

You see, this discovery led to my research team and I developing a technique we call the "sleep signal reset."

Just **[do this 20 minutes before you hop into bed...](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)**

And you'll gently activate your body's "go-to-sleep" hormones...

So you fall asleep faster than a baby riding in a car...

Sleep through the ENTIRE night...

...and wake up fully rested and chipper, ready to take on the day.

Best of all, it literally takes less than a minute...

It requires no dangerous drugs, meditation, valerian root, blackout shades, blue-blocking sunglasses, or any other weird stuff...

Just **[do this about 20 minutes before bedtime](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)** and you'll get the peaceful, restorative sleep you deserve.
---
[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
**== > **[**Can't Sleep? Do This 20 Minutes Before Bed...)**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
| |

Peter,

name: Katie Porter
subject: We don’t have to choose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39544%2E3422442%2EkvdCPI)
Derek,
Politics presents a lot of false choices.
Do we defend our values or tackle our challenges? Do we work with businesses to create good-paying jobs or hold corporations accountable? Do we keep communities safe or uphold civil rights?
**We don’t have to choose.**
What we need is leaders with the imagination to reject the false choices and see that more is possible.
I’m running for Governor to bring fresh blood and new ideas to our politics, and I would be honored to earn your support.
**[Will you chip in $5 to get this campaign off the ground?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250316_1_ak?refcode=em20250316-39544&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39544_3422442_kvdCPI&akid=39544%2E3422442%2EkvdCPI)**
Thanks,
Katie Porter
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250316_1_ak?refcode=em20250316-39544&refcode2=39544_3422442_kvdCPI&akid=39544%2E3422442%2EkvdCPI)

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250316-39544&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39544_3422442_kvdCPI&akid=39544%2E3422442%2EkvdCPI)**

Fellow American,
---
During President Trump’s joint address to Congress, he told the country, _“My fellow citizens, America is back.”_
---
Those words – and the strength of President Trump’s inspiring leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in what feels like the blink of an eye.
---
_But today, sadly, I’m reaching out for a far more somber reason._
---
**I’ve written this letter with a heavy heart, but I hope you’ll find it in __YOUR__ heart to read it in its entirety because every word is God’s honest truth.**
---
**While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is __NOT__ yet finished.**
---
**If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!**
---
And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus _state-level_ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---
I’m humble enough to admit it – but it’s true: _Right now, YOU are my only hope._
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – to help me fight for my freedom, justice, and ultimate vindication as the Democrats try to JAIL me for the rest of my life.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c52cfb529ce3485da3f561763accb940&_e=ujrtQ_UPLIUArAkwAtjBbOTl91DRKkEbIZFtReRsaUucfao45LDaLV-s7iy0JibTC_7r5wlzr1w9JgSaKm5OKN4aqfh9WpUdUR1mp_4kShvf-zGgza3cgwaRPbzD01yhhH7_ZHi15NSNNuAhcovfRes7o6rv9O5sXxX4lYh5LGd3edr6AWna0mPNeLxFyX3jXy-Mofp1gvTUpojUNqjCahuGcMFnXvAQGYFacFTOcAxbNnv6R3_qCGx66izZDnP7_Q5z0OarHqXPMSJPX_mj8yLNOb60xtCFYEOvIPYwspSe3m2pMKDbvqGwHREwixaFHptrBH8smJYPbc-NPJwYrujmBB4mM0JxYTGlbZhcZ56zY-ynVStgJPFqk3h3_tKW)
---
You see, even though the Democrats labeled me a **“ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,”** **RAIDED** my home, **ARRESTED** me, took a **MUGSHOT** of me, and forced me into **BANKRUPTCY** , the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
**_...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter._**
---
Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m __still__ FIGHTING BACK.
---
When these leftist crooks first had me BOOKED, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757...**
---

__
---
They had hoped that booking number would serve as a horrifying reminder of the price you must pay to stand on the side of truth, justice, and patriotism against the Radical Left.
---
_But today, we’re going to show these leftist crooks that number stands for something very different..._
---
To show them that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ are also fighters who refuse to stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m humbly asking **2,313,757 PATRIOTS** to stand with me by making a donation to my Legal Defense Trust to WIN the trial of my life and the fight for my freedom.

Peter, it's Congressman Troy Downing.

As a freshman Congressman, I'm facing a lot of pressure from The Establishment to conform to their way of doing things. _**But I didn't run for office to be a rubber stamp for the status quo**_.I ran to shake things up and fight for the conservative values and principles we hold dear, like _bolstering national security, shutting down the border invasion, supporting our veterans, and ending government waste. _

I'm eager to get to work for you and the rest of the America First Patriots around the country to execute this mandate, but I need your help to push through our agenda.

**Will you chip in to help me send a message to The Establishment and the Democrats that we won't back down from this fight for America.**

[**Every dollar counts, and with your support, we can show Washington that we are ready to take on the challenges ahead and defend the values that make this country great.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDMxNl9OTy1CRS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MTQwNjgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAzMTZfTk8tQkUuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjE0MDY4LTI4OTkifQ/k9_6gl-zfUUamnSkfTV3zg)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f257a4c-a364-4aee-bb8d-5dfb832092f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: Sorry to bother you on a Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
To be totally blunt with you, our fundraising has slowed to a crawl, and we’re falling behind on our projections this month. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click **[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103958587/533809900/29580466?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.03.16_Sunday_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTU5MTc2ZS03OTAyLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rdFQom46me0aSfRVGusaHUWGuTFZaVIsDM8_ezZt3i8=&emci=69e2fc06-e700-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=8e59176e-7902-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6576167)** If you want to unsubscribe, click **[here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/xijQj8Ub_ESyHtRt33sKYA2?unsubscribedata=yEeAQJ2QZwV%2FNkIRoKy7417zLHFUiqvhqHinvbK9ngVWr8nUF2L6eXLXOpK1TK%2FMQjoNIhCHqeb%2FwUfiSJyNOKDEmSOCEkMgFHqS0DXwS10BnLTJyPm7mxfkqgJDmYKSfbULQH0J8oTsQ%2FIDW0vePYLohAoWMH%2Bd%2FToO%2FkAA0NzTHE7Z2hPjegQtrOTjGFsdqBlUus04pW7H9n6mwk01SUwAnqI4fJ%2B4ABFPr54e143JN2T0NEf1cecS5Gr0%2FA8apvZerJCpVQ9dt9V02qI9mT%2BtPWdRBYK%2BpAsutGl4v2x7pIIWQNoxsyziCtkYc1693QLOLVYXMJZvPVOjqabUWVesxQY7G3OelcEriGEaeojI0IxlBz%2By4hf2VPD2xLw0u24FEoNYLoIUNuFLDIKqGb%2BScyauuyNC8jtNFkcJyWs%3D)**

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103958588/533809902/1141962486?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.03.16_Sunday_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTU5MTc2ZS03OTAyLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rdFQom46me0aSfRVGusaHUWGuTFZaVIsDM8_ezZt3i8=)
---
Folks, it’s Jared Moskowitz. 👋 I hate reaching out to you on a Sunday, so I'll keep this quick. I’ve been working hard in Congress to fight for all of the issues that matter most – standing up for Florida families, fighting extremism, and pushing for real solutions. name: Hurricane Milton
subject: Climate disasters are coming. The GOP is doing nothing.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend, we only have 15 days to make a difference.
Hurricane season is right around the corner, and Florida is not prepared.
You might be thinking “Gay we have until summer, that is months away.” Think about how much time it will take to rebuild the infrastructure Trump has wrecked. Republicans in Congress are blocking critical funding for disaster relief and infrastructure—all while climate change makes storms stronger and deadlier every year.
It’s not just reckless—it’s dangerous, and only we can shift our government’s gears towards helping instead of destroying. Let’s prevent this:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/785633775A67332B4C76397672446F344C6D674A58375764455644594344424C316E357264396E2B7A2B31563546583373626E6A376D59515A6636316A4A4844/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-16%20at%2011.21.02%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Floridians deserve better. In Congress, I’ll fight to:
🌊 Fully fund FEMA and disaster preparedness programs
🏡 Lower skyrocketing home insurance rates
🌱 Invest in long-term climate solutions to protect our coastal communities
Republicans are betting that Floridians will just accept their neglect. They’re wrong.
But I need your help to prove it. Rush $10, $25, or whatever you can today to build a campaign that fights for Florida’s future. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]

Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/785633775A67332B4C76397672446F344C6D674A58375764455644594344424C316E357264396E2B7A2B31563546583373626E6A376D59515A6636316A4A4844/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-02-12%20at%202.22.12%E2%80%AFPM.png]
We don’t have time for political games. Let’s get to work.
With determination,
Gay Valimont
Democrat for Congress, FL-1

clean_body: [] Friend, we only have 15 days to make a difference. Hurricane season is right around the corner, and Florida is not prepared. You might be thinking “Gay we have until summer, that is months away.” Think about how much time it will take to rebuild the infrastructure Trump has wrecked. Republicans in Congress are blocking critical funding for disaster relief and infrastructure—all while climate change makes storms stronger and deadlier every year. It’s not just reckless—it’s dangerous, and only we can shift our government’s gears towards helping instead of destroying. Let’s prevent this: [] Floridians deserve better. In Congress, I’ll fight to: 🌊 Fully fund FEMA and disaster preparedness programs 🏡 Lower skyrocketing home insurance rates 🌱 Invest in long-term climate solutions to protect our coastal communities Republicans are betting that Floridians will just accept their neglect. They’re wrong. But I need your help to prove it. Rush $10, $25, or whatever you can today to build a campaign that fights for Florida’s future. # Trump rains hellfire on Iran-backed Houthis in Yemen, watches air strikes from White House
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7044937c-9ca4-4634-8c7b-fa8376ac062b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Image posted by the White House on X
President Trump, dressed in golf attire and signature red MAGA hat, watched U.S. air strikes on the Iran-backed Houthis in Yemen, Saturday, from the White House.
Trump wrote in a Truth Social post that he had ordered the U.S. military to "launch decisive and powerful Military action against the Houthi terrorists in Yemen."
"Our brave Warfighters are right now carrying out aerial attacks on the terrorists' bases, leaders, and missile defenses to protect American shipping, air, and naval assets, and to restore Navigational Freedom," Trump wrote. "No terrorist force will stop American commercial and naval vessels from freely sailing the Waterways of the World."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/27dee397-5928-4404-9ce3-854d79c1c02f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Image posted by The White House on X
The White House's **[X account posted a statement](https://substack.com/redirect/11bbdf03-a10c-4ff1-978d-8fbf6322ba5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** along with pictures of Trump and Secretary of State Marco Rubio watching the air strikes, saying "For too long American economic & national threats have been under assault by the Houthis. Not under this presidency."

# JD Vance TEARS CNN clown Wolf Blitzer apart live on his own show

"I think this is disgraceful, I don't care what you call it Wolf!!" Vance snapped at Blitzer.

body:

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Peter, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism -- mostly the latter -- and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today 's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.
---
[ **Join the Sun for 1 ¢ ->**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2c089a2a971f42d4815118c7e8829489&_e=cBOzy-HacFU3Eu46ZG3yuQ7MfsxOueoXAaPatfnFpXVzTBWkjcBhzjAbSQziw7tq1W8ll398qCuykDvdbbjCAeAq0iaaFF3lfsZxOUaaycbedS0cb2NggETCfxiD8NIkQmxS-s0Atw49pwRmINylPKWs1SYBcex7wi_Rb6Uqhb4Kex21iundkNRFRnBEjBpn7Tkb4rLEr1SSy9DZ0fTO6wocTVlnduPooo_K5JD3dPBxgoxjhGC8BLh0wg1Ge0sqRAU-31jfnISKDysvWMu8TRnaDW-jrpSNLxBKcW-cXcsF6bUd2XG8WCmI5LQyV0EtcUx5MLNsSQBaY0i93vinUjIz-rU_CMDN6-6W_ZWJ_nVIev-MHb3G3qwgtD7L_Y54Z7cNK6_PCAKx6iLNgNUcGP_FOUylFg0NHMtjLh5HtHRWNMWdd7-dF7f-FTpma4Ot)
---
Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun 's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.

clean_body: The rare newspaper that still tells the truth For a limited time, join for just 1¢ | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ | | Dear Peter, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism -- mostly the latter -- and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today 's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun 's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. | | | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | The New York Sun Company, LLC, 300 Park Ave, 2nd Floor, New York, NY 10022, United States ****. ${Gears.unsubscribe\(\}) -

clean_body: | | | Here's the thing, team: Kamala Harris emailed you. Chuck Schumer emailed you. Kirsten Gillibrand emailed you. Chris Murphy emailed you. And now I've emailed you, too! We all emailed YOU because Trump's abuses of power are getting more and more nuts every day, and Republicans are just sitting on their easy chairs letting him do it! We HAVE to take back the Senate from those jokers ASAP, because nothing \-- not a damn thing -- is gonna be OK again until we do. But even though all of these Democratic all-stars warned you just how freakin' HUGE the stakes are, we're STILL short of our $50,000 midnight fundraising goal to answer their calls! I promise you, there's only one way to fight someone like Trump: By building an unbreakable coalition of Democrats ready to do whatever it takes to win. We need your help to fight for the Senate. Friend, We need leaders who are willing to stand up and fight back against the billionaires who are tearing apart our communities and our government. One of those leaders is my colleague Congressman Al Green. At Donald Trump’s recent joint address to Congress, Trump claimed that he had a mandate for his administration’s illegal actions. **Congressman Green fired back, stating that Trump did NOT have a mandate to cut Medicaid.** Right now, congressional Republicans are seeking to cut $880 billion from Medicaid―including through red-tape requirements that could kick roughly half of the 72 million Americans nationwide off Medicaid. At a time when Trump’s billionaire cabinet―including the richest man in the world Elon Musk―are seeking to destroy life-saving government programs that millions of Americans rely on in order to finance tax cuts for the rich and corporations, I’m proud to stand alongside leaders who are willing to fight back. **Al Green and I have been leading on impeaching Trump since I first got to Congress in January 2019, and we aren’t backing down now.** [**Split a contribution today between my and Congressman Al Green’s campaigns to power our fight against an authoritarian president who puts Please see my email from yesterday about how Congressman Green and I have been working together since my first months in Congress on everything from housing affordability to civil rights to holding Trump accountable. Despite pushback from Republicans and even Democrats at first, we succeeded in impeaching Trump—twice. We will continue fighting fascism and defending human rights, even if it means getting censured by Republicans in the House of Representatives.
Thank you for being by my side as we demand a future of, by, and for the people—not the billionaires.
In solidarity,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Mar 15, 2025
Subject: Congressman Al Green speaks truth to power. Let’s have his back
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
In the face of relentless attacks on our communities, the American people are looking for leaders who will stand up to this lawless administration.

This month, during his joint address to Congress, Donald Trump stated that he had a mandate for his administration’s illegal actions. And one Democrat had the guts to stand up and call him out.
**My colleague, Congressman Al Green spoke truth to power, interrupting Trump to make clear that Trump does not have a mandate to cut Medicaid.** Images of Al Green holding up his cane spread quickly around the Internet, with people demanding more Democrats stand up to Trump like he did.
But 10 Democrats joined Republicans in voting to censure Al Green for disrupting Trump, and then Democratic House leadership reprimanded him because he wasn’t simply silent in his protest of Trump. This is not how we fight fascism! The American people need Democrats to be a real opposition party that blocks Trump and his billionaire cronies like Elon Musk from stealing from the people and dismantling our federal government. We are in a crisis, and more Democrats need to act like it.
**In my first year in Congress in 2019, Al Green and I led on impeaching Trump.** We fought back against Trump’s illegal actions and impeachment efforts succeeded, despite months of pushback from Democratic leadership who didn’t want to rock the boat—even though Democrats controlled the House of Representatives back then. Now that Trump is back in office, I’m proud to stand with Al Green against Trump and in defense of the federal programs that millions of Americans rely on.
[**Let’s show Congressman Al Green that we have his back as he stands up to Trump and fights for the more than 72 million people nationwide who have Medicaid. Split a contribution between our campaigns today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJHt17w2hLKYBLDgljexSb0FE0JR07oOwizau2-yDazMXD7ve1zUQkHWS_7YfVJzpF7VfOmPgk733Am9iKdjUNr4Awrr-gZXAu6EfitHiRGh-nMVozYYEVXRiPs3UeB5INzPjI1P18lnoM_6XE8mOl54-ymUKqfxMjwhOK1QrA8qobwa0qWIwaPTZ8o-pl4Gp_SFfItxOOISwSRzWIbcyg9LMGzuycRCcVfuyTp1TAX-TqcYFZvyb1XVQzmMbaqh-JE-5e44cUJig95tDxMauqYee6WfZX8UfiLYuGyItgn8U2Urv7HDFEYZ9akMSBiCcjNycI0kVLDiGShYfHsyuK4y5GjjoRJC2ytO8ZhIJnAh7VSc6I5CMrWqVTIhX8bxq9bSR7KUOFErAyhP983uxFCQ/4eu/OnKoJidMTlCE1telgxAaRA/h8/h001.9KZUqcUSncdG9ZDqNp2zkKvAw-5sfo2KD96t_EtCLEE)

Last weekend marked 60 years since civil rights activists marched across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama in what became known as Bloody Sunday. **During the civil rights movement of the 1960s, Congressman Green marched with other leaders and got in “good trouble, necessary trouble” in our shared struggle for equal rights.**
When I reintroduced the _Justice for All Act_ to restore and expand our civil rights laws last month, Al Green joined as a co-sponsor of that legislation. And I was proud to co-sponsor his _Original Black History Month Resolution of 2025_ to recognize and celebrate Black History Month.
In my first year in Congress in 2019, as Chair of the U.S. House Financial Services Subcommittee on Oversight and Investigations, Congressman Green joined me in hosting a field hearing on equitable, safe, and affordable housing at Wayne County Community College in my home district. We are still fighting for affordable housing and pushing back against housing discrimination.
**From healthcare to housing to civil rights and beyond, Congressman Al Green is a leader who is always willing to stand up and fight back against injustice and oppression. We need more bold, courageous leadership like his in Congress so we can build a government that works for the people rather than billionaires.**

clean_body: I’m proud to stand with Al Green against Trump. | | | Friend, We need leaders who are willing to stand up and fight back against the billionaires who are tearing apart our communities and our government. One of those leaders is my colleague Congressman Al Green. At Donald Trump’s recent joint address to Congress, Trump claimed that he had a mandate for his administration’s illegal actions. Congressman Green fired back, stating that Trump did NOT have a mandate to cut Medicaid. Right now, congressional Republicans are seeking to cut $880 billion from Medicaid―including through red-tape requirements that could kick roughly half of the 72 million Americans nationwide off Medicaid. At a time when Trump’s billionaire cabinet―including the richest man in the world Elon Musk―are seeking to destroy life-saving government programs that millions of Americans rely on in order to finance tax cuts for the rich and corporations, I’m proud to stand alongside leaders who are willing to fight back. Al Green and I have been leading on impeaching Trump since I first got to Congress in January 2019, and we aren’t backing down now. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Al Green | | | | | | | | | | Please see my email from yesterday about how Congressman Green and I have been working together since my first months in Congress on everything from housing affordability to civil rights to holding Trump accountable. Despite pushback from Republicans and even Democrats at first, we succeeded in impeaching Trump—twice. We will continue fighting fascism and defending human rights, even if it means getting censured by Republicans in the House of Representatives. Thank you for being by my side as we demand a future of, by, and for the people—not the billionaires. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Mar 15, 2025 Subject: Congressman Al Green speaks truth to power. Let’s have his back To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, In the face of relentless attacks on our communities, the American people are looking for leaders who will stand up to this lawless administration. This month, during his joint address to Congress, Donald Trump stated that he had a mandate for his administration’s illegal actions. And one Democrat had the guts to stand up and call him out. My colleague, Congressman Al Green spoke truth to power, interrupting Trump to make clear that Trump does not have a mandate to cut Medicaid. Images of Al Green holding up his cane spread quickly around the Internet, with people demanding more Democrats stand up to Trump like he did. But 10 Democrats joined Republicans in voting to censure Al Green for disrupting Trump, and then Democratic House leadership reprimanded him because he wasn’t simply silent in his protest of Trump. This is not how we fight fascism! The American people need Democrats to be a real opposition party that blocks Trump and his billionaire cronies like Elon Musk from stealing from the people and dismantling our federal government. We are in a crisis, and more Democrats need to act like it. In my first year in Congress in 2019, Al Green and I led on impeaching Trump. We fought back against Trump’s illegal actions and impeachment efforts succeeded, despite months of pushback from Democratic leadership who didn’t want to rock the boat—even though Democrats controlled the House of Representatives back then. Now that Trump is back in office, I’m proud to stand with Al Green against Trump and in defense of the federal programs that millions of Americans rely on. Last weekend marked 60 years since civil rights activists marched across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama in what became known as Bloody Sunday. During the civil rights movement of the 1960s, Congressman Green marched with other leaders and got in “good trouble, necessary trouble” in our shared struggle for equal rights. When I reintroduced the Justice for All Act to restore and expand our civil rights laws last month, Al Green joined as a co-sponsor of that legislation. And I was proud to co-sponsor his Original Black History Month Resolution of 2025 to recognize and celebrate Black History Month. In my first year in Congress in 2019, as Chair of the U.S. House Financial Services Subcommittee on Oversight and Investigations, Congressman Green joined me in hosting a field hearing on equitable, safe, and affordable housing at Wayne County Community College in my home district. We are still fighting for affordable housing and pushing back against housing discrimination. From healthcare to housing to civil rights and beyond, Congressman Al Green is a leader who is always willing to stand up and fight back against injustice and oppression. We need more bold, courageous leadership like his in Congress so we can build a government that works for the people rather than billionaires. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Al Green | | | | | | | | | Together, we will not back down in the face of Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s illegal actions and attacks on our communities. We will resist fascism and instead work toward a truly multiracial democracy where everyone can thrive. Always serving you, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To fortify ourselves for the threats we face and for the fights ahead, it helps to look back on what we’ve already achieved — together. We’ve made great strides to defend the freedom to vote in the past several years. name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: The Democrats’ #1 target…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hundreds of petitions are forcing Republicans into public HUMILIATION show trials
| | [View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kEtv4jAUhX-NvSOyrx83WXjBQ9mMGI3E0K6N7RC3Tgh50fz7CkrZHn33nk_HNl2K1WIIbghAHf1AAIhYE4BpFG_2eNz3yyp84b_VTUC45wS2T3SGF9w6-xd305_3fNsMHxsVeX7rZv7Cx6ULL_hZmoXGxnRPcUe9kWB55WgwHCVwybSWtDZO2kIF553CyklReMWUF_oE6JCfmKDRAAPFBNdcKRQ688gLVKqwSovceU4kexRlVR_CWMf2M_TexrRk7tLQZOpx7IaHWEmgvPhT1k4uhWn4uXKXhkD5VCZQzgRK3FbH_9e2OFyJKB-jiR2Kbn9Yn_OG9sZ3t5hSHDQSyc6_b-hs4DsAAP__kzdtxg)

---

Patriots,
The Radical Left will do _anything_ to silence Republicans. They don’t want open dialogue. They don’t want real conversations.

They want **to ambush, humiliate, and shut us down.**
Across the country, my fellow Republican fighters are holding town halls to hear directly from _you_ , the American people. But the unhinged Left is **HELLBENT** on turning these gatherings into public attacks.
They don’t want answers. They want to **ATTACK, HUMILIATE, & SCREAM** at us for putting **AMERICA FIRST.**
The Left **hates free speech** unless it’s their own. They want Republicans subjected to public **show trials** while they scream like lunatics and turn civil discussion into **a SCREAM show.**
And now, they’re **launching hundreds of petitions** to ensure every Republican leader is dragged into these sick humiliation rituals.
**I will NOT let them get away with this.** But I need**YOU** in this fight because we are still at war for the soul of our country.
**The Left plays dirty, and they NEVER stop.** If we don’t fight back **NOW** , they will **cancel, silence, and crush us.**
**PLEASE STAND WITH ME AND FIGHT BACK NOW!**
[SIGN NOW to stand with me and other GOP members from the Woke Mob >](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJyEkkGPmzwQhn_NcAPhMWA4cNgNyh4-5VOlapveolnbSdwaYxk7Kf--AqFce338jF_PK9PorbkuPYh3QLwbNQMi8DdATJH_oM_PU1hy_Ud8y58c9coBD7v6wJfsJP0vhvTfuT2M86_32rD26R_spcfF65e8hxZ6JGNXKoZM9RUSu8pM90xUyKqyaars3lNNuqsq1Wopueq-RCeRVbzFjsuOM8xMjyXWJWcNq2vBm0IJ1om67qhueCsVg6rcgopr0DrejfutgyJjl0JOY2b7e4x-3h52BDzOWqagi6dxQavVADySc-QpWePIJkcr8Tb3Yfb5dnMep6e7k7X5HCl8TRQU8GOK4yXqMAIfrlExwGYlo1YmrWybDNpFsvvRPKUgNfDB-p1IGj2ZmwM-7EtWF_L28u_4fX5yUbsIfFCTo6gBGxqntBEsC6wBm7AuHIy7AR9iSKtzcdYo4EN9XrqP08_D-WOD2-_gg-D-9P3t1o5Z6JV_GmvN3AioytvW8lrqo8e_AQAA__9pkr-V)
Thank you & God Bless,
Anna Paulina Luna

And now, they’re launching hundreds of petitions to ensure every Republican leader is dragged into these sick humiliation rituals. I will NOT let them get away with this. But I needYOU in this fight because we are still at war for the soul of our country. The Left plays dirty, and they NEVER stop. If we don’t fight back NOW , they will cancel, silence, and crush us. PLEASE STAND WITH ME AND FIGHT BACK NOW! Thank you & God Bless, Anna Paulina Luna | PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS

# [Florida's Future is on the Line--We Need Gay Valimont in Congress](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159014766&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5MDE0NzY2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDIxNDEwMTcsImV4cCI6MTc0NDczMzAxNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.V0p8CWxXSF0o2hW4sTdNslSqcq0LUcAZiS4OK9vNSJ8)
### Electing Gay is the first step towards winning back the house before 2026--here's how you can help make that possible
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Mar 16
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159014766&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5MDE0NzY2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MjE0MTAxNywiZXhwIjoxNzQ0NzMzMDE3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vg6Zahelok7x6JGajdG1ZBx_sZ6YLuZmuGf1XBzkddg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159014766&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5MDE0NzY2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDIxNDEwMTcsImV4cCI6MTc0NDczMzAxNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.V0p8CWxXSF0o2hW4sTdNslSqcq0LUcAZiS4OK9vNSJ8&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=159014766&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5MDE0NzY2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDIxNDEwMTcsImV4cCI6MTc0NDczMzAxNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.V0p8CWxXSF0o2hW4sTdNslSqcq0LUcAZiS4OK9vNSJ8)

| | [](https://substack..sAEOGpAoDnid2wIFubtRHTJL98mu4-5KHwRep1qoGOc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/floridas-future-is-on-the-linewe?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Today I'm writing with good news--about what is right with our politics. And about how you can help protect our democracy from the onslaught of fascism, but only if we take action now.
In just a few weeks, voters in Florida's First Congressional District will have the chance to make history. This special election is more than just a race--it's a rare opportunity to flip a seat vacated by credibly accused statutory rapist Matt Gaetz, take a stand for working people, and send a powerful message to Washington. And best of all, you can help make that happen. Yes really. How? **Let 's Address This.**
Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..N3LBppxNrPNMeaK8jsfu5XIKJ1sZ0fK4kIFwHqmoL1o?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=159014766)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e1938c52-6ea7-4f82-947d-cdbcd2dc54c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Florida District 1 Democratic Congressional Candidate Gay Valimont, and her 13/10 rated doggo
While Republicans claim they have an overwhelming mandate to rule, the truth is they can afford to lose only 2 seats and still keep the House majority. If they lose 3 seats, the MAGA "mandate" is kaput, and Democrats take the House majority. Electing Gay Valimont is the first step to winning back the House and stopping the Republican assault on Social Security, Medicare, and veterans' benefits.
**This is the only electoral recourse we have before 2026 and we must capitalize on it.**
That's why I'm throwing my full support behind Gay Valimont, a fighter who will take on the corrupt politicians who are making life harder for everyday Floridians. Her opponent? A rubber stamp carpet bagger who has never lived in the district, flown in by Trump and Musk to advance their agenda of tax cuts to billionaires, benefits cuts to veterans, and gutting Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security. We cannot allow that to happen.
This race isn't just about winning a seat. It's about winning back our future. I share two critical points below. First, why we need Gay in Congress. Second, how you can help elect Gay, and why you should care that Gay is elected--even if you don't live in Florida.
* * *
### The Cost of Living Crisis--And Why Gay Valimont is the Only Choice
Florida's First District is struggling under skyrocketing costs--soaring housing prices, unaffordable homeowners' insurance, and an economy that is leaving too many people behind.
You know how we always hear about insurance companies making record profits and screwing over working Americans? Gay's opponent has sat on the state cabinet that oversees insurance and has done nothing to stop costs from spiraling out of control. He's literally the guy who is supposed to hold insurance companies accountable, but does the exact opposite. Floridians are being crushed under premiums that are double or triple what they paid just a few years ago. People are being forced out of their homes. Meanwhile, his silence has allowed insurance companies to rake in record profits.
Gay Valimont won't sit on the sidelines. She has a real plan to lower costs, hold insurance companies accountable, and make Florida livable again.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f993db70-beab-4f1e-8446-e475001d7cef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### Protecting Veterans and Retirees from Republican Attacks
Did you know that Florida's First District has the second-highest number of veterans in the entire country? These are the men and women who put their lives on the line for our freedom--and right now, their benefits are on the chopping block.
Make no mistake: Republicans are coming for Social Security, Medicaid, Medicare, and veterans' benefits. And Gay's opponent is voting right along with them--gutting VA funding, cutting federal employee benefits, and leaving veterans to fend for themselves.
Gay Valimont will fight to fully fund the VA, protect Social Security and Medicare from Republican attacks, and ensure that every veteran and retiree gets the care and dignity they earned.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/14fbde96-de44-4512-9c8a-e69c5fcb9b24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
## This Race is Bigger Than Florida--It's About Winning Back the House
This is one of only three special elections before 2026--and if we flip this seat, we are that much closer to flipping the House. And that's why you should care, whether you live in Gay's district or not. If her opponent can bring in dark PAC money from out of state to steal the election, then Gay can pull in support from honest hard working blue collar Americans to win the election on merit. And before you ask, yes, Gay is rejecting all corporate and dark PAC money. Gay is truly running for the People, and that's why We the People need to show up for Gay.
We cannot afford to sit this one out, and here's how you can help.
Every door knocked, every phone call made, and every dollar raised is a step toward stopping MAGA extremism in its tracks.
**Here 's how you can help:**
✅ Volunteer to help Gay win: [Sign up here](https://substack.com/redirect/8851a9b8-2979-423a-b746-b49121e1e636?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
✅ Apply to be a paid canvasser ($20-$21/hr): [Apply here](https://substack.com/redirect/128b43b3-645b-467a-8120-e73e38e9bf9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
✅ Donate what you can to elect Gay to Congress: [Donate here](https://substack.com/redirect/e4ced9c4-cd7c-4dd9-a7a2-0f4af6a7f441?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**And most of all, vote if you live in Florida District 1!**
* Vote-by-mail ends March 20
* Early voting runs from March 22-29
* Election Day is April 1.

**This is our shot. Let 's take it. Let's send Gay Valimont to Congress.**
