body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8mj9sbESB7nNXA2G78fALCvp4bnCE2iGl77N3mZ7PXwDd4o5JBL9gu5PQVPVkqfHg_09pfTgnKiv8Q_rgeU0NBHDIsR_e1LBO_dIOHd5rKqbTNOfmxmj6yCGVgNZ_XYwv8GvQBnFSheJj0rQHePO3kMuO5MLQdhXI1NNL9Lo9ST8RWmCO79r0woS0dhU5pMPf1k1Ug5-6__M-2A6YFqqqiS4Ec2j27Tq6mOxt7frPRYWF/4eu/ubEUDMiaRAyxNVAt7Bnmgg/h0/h001.GI1hS869Y16peSaXdDK-F2tQEixlrhEw-TC1Kb63QVM)
---
Dear Young Democrats,

We are thrilled to officially announce that the 2025 Young Democrats of America National Convention is happening **July 16-19, 2025,** at the******Sheraton Philadelphia Downtown****** hotel in Philadelphia, PA**!** The convention will **gavel in at noon on Wednesday, July 16, and gavel out after elections on Saturday, July 19**. Our official hotel block accommodates travel on border dates for those arriving early or staying later.
Our convention website is now live at **[yda.org/convention](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.g9_lkJd1ePo902lix9g-JVks1QvWc8aQG6nPBEsbR5522E1NXKvNup0HURC5btj9E4MoKpGbabbnQBAw9eH-reO7YjO5tA56Amun7ieYggMyxQhap5u4fayxM56ldJvv2YIzmHP3laiInlS3HqvsL2liyqL664_OCn4N6SPcM6MB6Qhz2Qtah4wULS8XzgqhBaxten18XGhn2oJgl4H23sFUkVytBiKFUXpNFHApx6eYg_Hrg4mjpsDijIeRS2z4gI7OFXyQCZfw_F67gbj_hw/4eu/ubEUDMiaRAyxNVAt7Bnmgg/h1/h001.NlakcgHDA2zn7DVV69qaBdfTyYnufo08LKKDsqdhBq8)** , where you can:

✅ Register for the convention
✅ Book your hotel room at our official venue
✅ Learn more about what’s in store for #YDAPhilly

Philadelphia is the birthplace of democracy, and as we celebrate **Philly 250: The Next Generation** , we’re making sure this convention reflects the future of our party and our movement. This year’s convention will also include a special milestone: we’ll be celebrating the **90th anniversary of the Pennsylvania Young Democrats** —one of the oldest and most storied Young Democrat organizations in the country! PAYD is ready to welcome you for an unforgettable week filled with campaign trainings, national party leaders, and networking with fellow Young Democrats from across the country.
As we highlighted in our bid, Philadelphia offers:
✨ A historic backdrop for the next generation of leadership
✨ Unmatched accessibility, with a central location and easy travel options
✨ A walkable, vibrant city with world-class food, culture, and history

This will be a convention **you won’t want to miss**. Secure your spot now at **[yda.org/convention](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.g9_lkJd1ePo902lix9g-JVks1QvWc8aQG6nPBEsbR57kjYD3kTnBqrOmQCg6bbGCOpFRby1a0JFo6U_j9oyIyYvKHmTRffCxjdl6J4G7Ak0MVugrYHsjwIUQhqS_Oo6gpGq1LkC1UkmWEIrzV0JcUb2OEDc6EH5RMM-KXrUPJmUe-61SsAUEt4Q3ZMRAwjLHc2pCKIDAfDQQ5_dYZrwsXb1_nHsA3EtcXtb8fQPhPBGvuVpR3lA0jOTYc_Tw1I5JG1gy1mPMdJoNM3wpEe9ZCA/4eu/ubEUDMiaRAyxNVAt7Bnmgg/h2/h001.0_ghZoPJgFOsZTAw69Gv6PUQLvtkUSkVlg26b8K3Qmw)** , and we’ll see you in Philly!

**Hans van Mol** _(he/him/his)_ President
Pennsylvania Young Democrats
---
| **_**The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats,[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtOGH5_bFk3IrGBdMpZrTnpvgveh37UcW4WHfZKrE1AMvuD2qM-Gl6stLkc5uNewoxpOM0k4PlvI1W-pNw3mbsYFoggtRhtOgoi5XNtpp4AxqScVXTyP-SFRPte50QLY3qb1HBx-M990eCvQNLdlJEDOrBGgZrGIJoEYzubEt4PTqMkpr_P04AB04iN4ZnJfNR6XF9C7iOWnbdHdupkvtNTKrmemC4T3WxyhGs-SkHbwZFKYaIhFM7W1Ebtm_zTEXdZRqqDBwkIItcMS_RdogFsF07d2OALcLxhLkWePYN5HA/4eu/ubEUDMiaRAyxNVAt7Bnmgg/h3/h001.D34HkHqpIxibbHnVmWb2poqSdm3SLE5Kv29mCQdLtFg)**[donate anything you can afford right now to YDA.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtOGH5_bFk3IrGBdMpZrTnpmIFgBn9rgK7g1xzpwkoLPdt8ynGnVKC8CT0qxTRk6VeAPHlClOzRkHvDWme982TXRrCsXJj4OLTd6T4hyYg6u4PHMaclU-4ySvGG66TkLrlyJsaEYuVYWcjjSdXPmYzFD3onULq3xIgkf4xMEA-1I6zhozXguhUaIERTcfElP9PrpRENg3XbyUIBNOpv2aTphO68h4n2xYqPS-5imH70KnG4PvqdKpmZNiHBVmd17gDP-trnY_3jryWKcucB0xiqCmFOAeIgFx_t2qHj5zALKcjKPZtGqrrJrEUBIOCNoy3S5ZipAwsulHuLUMmA3vFv/4eu/ubEUDMiaRAyxNVAt7Bnmgg/h4/h001.XeNlB0PKAH7OwGDjvqzhwjeUbH727jVqasU0kj25pFM)_**

clean_body: | | Dear Young Democrats, We are thrilled to officially announce that the 2025 Young Democrats of America National Convention is happening July 16-19, 2025, at the****Sheraton Philadelphia Downtown** hotel in Philadelphia, PA! The convention will gavel in at noon on Wednesday, July 16, and gavel out after elections on Saturday, July 19. Our official hotel block accommodates travel on border dates for those arriving early or staying later. Our convention website is now live at , where you can: ✅ Register for the convention ✅ Book your hotel room at our official venue ✅ Learn more about what’s in store for #YDAPhilly Philadelphia is the birthplace of democracy, and as we celebrate Philly 250: The Next Generation , we’re making sure this convention reflects the future of our party and our movement. This year’s convention will also include a special milestone: we’ll be celebrating the 90th anniversary of the Pennsylvania Young Democrats —one of the oldest and most storied Young Democrat organizations in the country! PAYD is ready to welcome you for an unforgettable week filled with campaign trainings, national party leaders, and networking with fellow Young Democrats from across the country. As we highlighted in our bid, Philadelphia offers: ✨ A historic backdrop for the next generation of leadership ✨ Unmatched accessibility, with a central location and easy travel options ✨ A walkable, vibrant city with world-class food, culture, and history This will be a convention you won’t want to miss. Secure your spot now at , and we’ll see you in Philly! Hans van Mol (he/him/his) President Pennsylvania Young Democrats | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats,** Monthly donations truly help sustain our work. If you're ready to support Young Democrats, please: Contributions or gifts to the Young Democrats of America are not tax | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . name: Ryan Zinke
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. | |
---
| | | | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1cc341be1e12481b9168c775afad29c4&_e=EADxM3kVxO0E03gvX2ogqrGxc4iR-vBuplPU8pQL74ZsrpHEYzNBg2O772S7ooMYfMQ7owZhSnGQUBqOb6S_RrBVlSVYGu1Nbm-98sPBcRsvyth3racLJ8zdCtcs0oqb7OFixImx_8y7_5oe7sHxHBzsXPbAtg_2WAU9nSgH2ux0KRpde-eT4dUZIC-coM4MSjvaeGI4RFlOAijeNB9Tg7jmM9lv23K8y4I7emwUhizwufja404W6jjE2-6JDeG-QJ6KyLzOTWlVoyW1PUJKVTAxQFf4WFVrgmSpT6YZX01f_qYCjSl0Yk1wB6uGexN7IGjEenRDFRiDbp9nnNNg7tEuXBnCNSGB_uuSyfKwPuGX8mAcbWNxXYK1t6XyiD5mfCGIB9DQ2HLBhWz-4OK_Bw%3D%3D)
---

**Closing the curtains on my campaign.**

I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat and DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrats impeaching Trump and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
**[Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1cc341be1e12481b9168c775afad29c4&_e=EADxM3kVxO0E03gvX2ogqrGxc4iR-vBuplPU8pQL74ZsrpHEYzNBg2O772S7ooMYfMQ7owZhSnGQUBqOb6S_RrBVlSVYGu1Nbm-98sPBcRsvyth3racLJ8zdCtcs0oqb7OFixImx_8y7_5oe7sHxHBzsXPbAtg_2WAU9nSgH2ux0KRpde-eT4dUZIC-coM4MSjvaeGI4RFlOAijeNB9Tg7jmM9lv23K8y4I7emwUhizwufja404W6jjE2-6JDeG-_M94p9xSDqzeTW_A17ue5_peoWqw4Pr4nePpDbJhVht4qoxpGxooeXqlw_T-NB9Cd2nu9qUOUxdTd4DBmeNO_11IZ0eG-dYXK9FQK8-2s7dquL2h_b574XB58V0JlvohuAK2BisVXk__orBfmfTxAg%3D%3D "Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.")**
_**In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.**_

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

_**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1cc341be1e12481b9168c775afad29c4&_e=EADxM3kVxO0E03gvX2ogqrGxc4iR-vBuplPU8pQL74ZsrpHEYzNBg2O772S7ooMYfMQ7owZhSnGQUBqOb6S_RrBVlSVYGu1Nbm-98sPBcRsvyth3racLJ8zdCtcs0oqb7OFixImx_8y7_5oe7sHxHBzsXPbAtg_2WAU9nSgH2ux0KRpde-eT4dUZIC-coM4MSjvaeGI4RFlOAijeNB9Tg7jmM9lv23K8y4I7emwUhizwufja404W6jjE2-6JDeG-_kwfiSG5HgtEPkItTv46m_MmP_YYMcHcMMBKiDhlYdD1iPt8-2X8eZIEhEOyBiOtHmOeKoRulpfg6IC-zPm4JVdeevJHf-vMFFKYN8u5WqqBqqObGYBxbfinJFcKZTbTe5WYfL6uXhmp9LHOx_2TIg%3D%3D "But if you can chip in just $5 right now")**_ , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

_****_

| | [DONATE TODAY](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1cc341be1e12481b9168c775afad29c4&_e=EADxM3kVxO0E03gvX2ogqrGxc4iR-vBuplPU8pQL74ZsrpHEYzNBg2O772S7ooMYfMQ7owZhSnGQUBqOb6S_RrBVlSVYGu1Nbm-98sPBcRsvyth3racLJ8zdCtcs0oqb7OFixImx_8y7_5oe7sHxHBzsXPbAtg_2WAU9nSgH2ux0KRpde-eT4dUZIC-coM4MSjvaeGI4RFlOAijeNB9Tg7jmM9lv23K8y4I7emwUhizwufja404W6jjE2-6JDeG-aB1JXs3Nw4RafAkq55ggNGGCSmAcSPL8UWeR_sC7V_bfF8nWaAGAfnOH2moSNEeAlPypcMOCoScXNaSPWErO3Dm9L-QvmQ0SRR3P6ijgVeuzR2dDUJwA-p6v_XELC_BELIZ5LMpvqSd3aStuXzIurg%3D%3D)

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, I'll always serve you proudly.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

clean_body: George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, it’s George. We keep thinking we’ve seen the worst of the Republican party, but they keep proving us wrong. On the brink of a government shutdown, Republicans passed a partisan funding bill that cuts critical services Americans rely on, while not including critical guardrails for federal spending. Meanwhile, Donald Trump’s reckless cuts to federal jobs and thoughtless trade wars are impacting the livelihoods of everyday Americans. Despite the constant chaos, my Democratic colleagues and I have been working across the aisle to deliver for the American people, but House Republicans would rather play partisan politics than work with us to find solutions. We were sent to Congress to govern, not play political games. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = – George Latimer * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: You are the reason this works.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
This movement runs on people, not big money.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103963672/533823327/1328794144?refcode=ea.662d4def-8102-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.662d4def-8102-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2MmQ0ZGVmLTgxMDItZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JdoeC5HMb5zxeaIx9FsmzTLfqrvo9piMkyA7cm_2omQ=&emci=9b62c145-0d01-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=662d4def-8102-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103963673/533823328/2105508926?refcode=ea.662d4def-8102-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.662d4def-8102-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2MmQ0ZGVmLTgxMDItZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JdoeC5HMb5zxeaIx9FsmzTLfqrvo9piMkyA7cm_2omQ=) I’ll be honest. I don’t love asking for money. It can feel a little uncomfortable, especially knowing you’re probably getting a dozen other emails from causes that matter to you. But here’s the thing — at JanePAC, we don’t see you as a piggy bank or an ATM. Whether or not you can give today, you are an indispensable part of this movement. This PAC doesn’t exist without grassroots supporters like you. Every dollar we raise goes directly toward electing leaders who will reject fossil fuel lobbyists, fight for clean energy, and make sure climate action isn’t just a talking point. And right now, with our first end-of-quarter deadline of the year approaching on March 31st, we need to go big. **Our goal is to raise $70,000 by March 31st — because that’s what it’ll take to elect leaders who will fight like hell for climate action.** **[Would you be willing to chip in a few dollars (of any amount that works for you) to help us reach our goal?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103963674/533823329/2105508926?refcode=ea.662d4def-8102-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.662d4def-8102-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2MmQ0ZGVmLTgxMDItZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JdoeC5HMb5zxeaIx9FsmzTLfqrvo9piMkyA7cm_2omQ=)** In 2024, grassroots supporters like you helped us elect over 100 climate leaders to city councils, state legislatures, and Congress. And this year, we’re picking up momentum — with **three huge special election victories already under our belt.** That’s proof that this works. That you matter in this fight. And with all the chaos in Washington right now, every dollar we raise helps us build the strongest possible firewall against Donald Trump and his political allies who would rather cozy up to fossil fuel CEOs than protect our planet. **[So if you’re able, I’m asking: Can you make a donation today to help us hit our $70,000 goal? clean_body: This movement runs on people, not big money. | = I’ll be honest. I don’t love asking for money. It can feel a little uncomfortable, especially knowing you’re probably getting a dozen other emails from causes that matter to you. But here’s the thing — at JanePAC, we don’t see you as a piggy bank or an ATM. Whether or not you can give today, you are an indispensable part of this movement. This PAC doesn’t exist without grassroots supporters like you. Every dollar we raise goes directly toward electing leaders who will reject fossil fuel lobbyists, fight for clean energy, and make sure climate action isn’t just a talking point. And right now, with our first end-of-quarter deadline of the year approaching on March 31st, we need to go big. Our goal is to raise $70,000 by March 31st — because that’s what it’ll take to elect leaders who will fight like hell for climate action. = In 2024, grassroots supporters like you helped us elect over 100 climate leaders to city councils, state legislatures, and Congress. And this year, we’re picking up momentum — with three huge special election victories already under our belt. That’s proof that this works. That you matter in this fight. And with all the chaos in Washington right now, every dollar we raise helps us build the strongest possible firewall against Donald Trump and his political allies who would rather cozy up to fossil fuel CEOs than protect our planet. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With gratitude, Jane Fonda = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
The news ain’t great lately. No doubt. But if you look closely, you’ll notice something.
#
Peter:
The news ain’t great lately. No doubt.
But if you look closely, you’ll notice something.
In the House, VoteVets members are poking Trump in the eye and working to block him and Elon. In the Senate, it’s VoteVets members taking fire — and sending it back. VoteVets backed Attorneys General are at the forefront of the legal challenges to the worst excesses of this administration. Around the country, it’s Veterans taking on Republicans in these town halls.
VoteVets members are on point. We’re leading. And we are not backing down.
It’s easy to feel dejected, but as a VoteVets supporter, you’re in a unique position. Just by reading these emails, by staying in the loop, you’re helping us keep up the fight. When you chip in, your donations help us support our members. When you sustain our organization, you help us recruit the next generation of leaders.
We need more leaders like Mark Kelly, Ruben Gallego, and Elissa Slotkin. With your support, we’re going to find them. We’re putting a million dollars into that effort, and it’s going to pay off.

name: Sen. Tim Sheehy
subject: Support Hamas? Lose your visa
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA _
body:
Anti-Jewish hatred should never be tolerated in the United States |
---
__

Peter,

As a newly sworn-in U.S. Senator, I know that time is short, and there is more news to consume than possible in a day, but I’m writing to ensure you saw a piece that caught my eye this morning in the WSJ, which every major news outlet in the country has now picked up.

In short, President Trump and Secretary of State Marco Rubio have revoked the green card of a Columbia University student who led the pro-Hamas movement on campus. These student-led “protests” in support of radical Islamic terrorism have destabilized the New York City university since October 2023.

You shouldn’t be able to come to this great nation and reap the benefits of a world-class education while spreading anti-Jewish hatred and openly supporting a terrorist organization, yet some of my colleagues on the other side of the aisle have taken to social media to decry the move by the administration as an attack on free speech; **it’s their new cause celebre.**

clean_body: Anti-Jewish hatred should never be tolerated in the United States | Peter, As a newly sworn-in U.S. Senator, I know that time is short, and there is more news to consume than possible in a day, but I’m writing to ensure you saw a piece that caught my eye this morning in the WSJ, which every major news outlet in the country has now picked up. In short, President Trump and Secretary of State Marco Rubio have revoked the green card of a Columbia University student who led the pro-Hamas movement on campus. These student-led “protests” in support of radical Islamic terrorism have destabilized the New York City university since October 2023. You shouldn’t be able to come to this great nation and reap the benefits of a world-class education while spreading anti-Jewish hatred and openly supporting a terrorist organization, yet some of my colleagues on the other side of the aisle have taken to social media to decry the move by the administration as an attack on free speech; it’s their new cause celebre. Thank you, Tim Sheehy United States Senator - Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. _

name: Kimberly Bretches
subject: Please don’t let my three children grow up without their father
body:
Up against a George Soros backed prosecutor| | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.
---
| |
---
Dear Patriot, That's me and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches in the picture I've sent you...
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=af65255948bf422fa19b4d45391b21ee&_e=iKJ-nWJFMFBkOndS7K2hGnV0ZNv1dmfseSdMwrPUWYkHymSpblFQFnvhGmY-naPT3EtUPNPQ6MSillyQCOSOSf8hZxyMBaL_SM0U3Td8YB85cffE_oVfnKnarMnQTKmlwlTdtRGRcd05et7mvW1VnjyP76Kptr-OBRkPjyFW9wLeYGVzzItpO9CTwH1MMjG8_16Egc_4VvAeHsIk-ZpXT0HSDSLNd8a6Y_t7gEi3tMwKDSHuqD4z1k-4RxnPPMK2TSGBftqSm62yTv0lYXR9dntJBQ0BmMA6wwUpHVxs_3nxJEMdDJ28wd0QRQ2qoMDX9hvL89QR1JCij_DHqgfO1D48o_NyHCOlODbZUTX_qGsgjePNqzf0exGvjohaxb6i)
---
...a picture we took on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because in July, the same city that gave Chance this award... ...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were "mostly peaceful." It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars, and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn't restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same "beanbag guns" that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before it got out of hand. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. What I didn’t know then was that this nightmare wasn't over for us. Far from it. Unknown to Chance and the other officers on duty that night, an anti-police protestor was hit by one of my husband's non-lethal rounds. They claimed they were injured and lost part of their finger. And for that... ...the county prosecutor charged my husband with "aggravated assault by a public servant" -- a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don't care if my husband is innocent. They'll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran. My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He's served on mission trips -- planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he's done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars and could be his "reward." Even if my husband's good name is cleared there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God's grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us -- the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policemen's best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes -- like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth -- without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they've agreed to help Chance. My friend, you've read my letter this far so I'm going to ask as boldly as I can: Will you help Chance, too? _**[Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have wrongly accused?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=af65255948bf422fa19b4d45391b21ee&_e=iKJ-nWJFMFBkOndS7K2hGnV0ZNv1dmfseSdMwrPUWYkHymSpblFQFnvhGmY-naPT3EtUPNPQ6MSillyQCOSOSf8hZxyMBaL_SM0U3Td8YB85cffE_oVfnKnarMnQTKmlwlTdtRGRcd05et7mvW1VnjyP76Kptr-OBRkPjyFW9wLeYGVzzItpO9CTwH1MMjG8_16Egc_4VvAeHsIk-ZpXT0HSDSLNd8a6Y_t7gEi3tMzZNYZA6lfPeuEQg9Pzr5-afJ2e15mF_jJ3aW4S_Pb0wciLzuY7OJePFxUnGffkqCWvLPpY_irmRFPjApJnvBInkpVN5WqdF1_vF9wE76RsMwbUNhWbGS_fPV3RofjkS_9vvvrxbnW2-bk7KY1zn9ut)**_** ** You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. _**[So with that in mind, please know that any contribution -- be it $35, $100, $500 or even $1,000 -- is tax-deductible.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=af65255948bf422fa19b4d45391b21ee&_e=iKJ-nWJFMFBkOndS7K2hGnV0ZNv1dmfseSdMwrPUWYkHymSpblFQFnvhGmY-naPT3EtUPNPQ6MSillyQCOSOSf8hZxyMBaL_SM0U3Td8YB85cffE_oVfnKnarMnQTKmlwlTdtRGRcd05et7mvW1VnjyP76Kptr-OBRkPjyFW9wLeYGVzzItpO9CTwH1MMjG8_16Egc_4VvAeHsIk-ZpXT0HSDSLNd8a6Y_t7gEi3tMyhdpCRbLuJvJwb1rPbXDPGDCL0ycBQAMdZ5y5Z3tEyjyBoNR1nJ5kNf1VJVhH7uCcF6zn1FM4rzluSPcjDkTSO5RiP-5KLSfYUYyN9d447_-UTHpSNVadGoMVWSioFYappI3BEPeLCQqTKBdEaa8el)**_ But whatever you feel led to give, please end it back quickly. Chance's trial starts on July 7th. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he'll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won't be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won't be able to walk our daughter down the aisle somebody... I can't bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. _**[So please, my friend, rush back your gift right away if possible.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=af65255948bf422fa19b4d45391b21ee&_e=iKJ-nWJFMFBkOndS7K2hGnV0ZNv1dmfseSdMwrPUWYkHymSpblFQFnvhGmY-naPT3EtUPNPQ6MSillyQCOSOSf8hZxyMBaL_SM0U3Td8YB85cffE_oVfnKnarMnQTKmlwlTdtRGRcd05et7mvW1VnjyP76Kptr-OBRkPjyFW9wLeYGVzzItpO9CTwH1MMjG8_16Egc_4VvAeHsIk-ZpXT0HSDSLNd8a6Y_t7gEi3tMykdIEUKNRwXCHLXPvxKJYDJ0O-dRQhPAB8b50Yo2Yrd_E6e8k8aez41yKzd4EIKPbo16Y_sV1nAu-eVvh109fWRgFiMQ8RWs0MKbWEbjy2VEpHMoOZWtntqzF4weHmHfD4QG4bz577Bzn-2A_HJu_N)**_ With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, _**[your gift of $35](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=af65255948bf422fa19b4d45391b21ee&_e=iKJ-nWJFMFBkOndS7K2hGnV0ZNv1dmfseSdMwrPUWYkHymSpblFQFnvhGmY-naPT3EtUPNPQ6MSillyQCOSOSf8hZxyMBaL_SM0U3Td8YB85cffE_oVfnKnarMnQTKmlwlTdtRGRcd05et7mvW1VnjyP76Kptr-OBRkPjyFW9wLeYGVzzItpO9CTwH1MMjG8_16Egc_4VvAeHsIk-ZpXT0HSDSLNd8a6Y_t7gEi3tMymc7UMZdc_vums8cryN-8kgr2V9eYv2GcORjGZG0jO49MibXYVwMGG8boU3BnAY6lzI0RqKzC_eaGh8XEpxQM-kEHcKRKPdKZtTs-gsSIyHuTgMCa4x75TzLQ5I6wbJt4rWvW2e8kkwAu2K6WOrONU)**_ \-- or any amount -- could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you -- in advance -- for helping my husband fight back.
---
With hope and thanks,
---
Kimberly Bretches
---
P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his "reward."And to make things worse, we're up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance's trial begins. Chance and I have three children -- and one more on the way. Please don't let them grow up without their father. _**[Thank you for any help you can send to LELDF today.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=af65255948bf422fa19b4d45391b21ee&_e=iKJ-nWJFMFBkOndS7K2hGnV0ZNv1dmfseSdMwrPUWYkHymSpblFQFnvhGmY-naPT3EtUPNPQ6MSillyQCOSOSf8hZxyMBaL_SM0U3Td8YB85cffE_oVfnKnarMnQTKmlwlTdtRGRcd05et7mvW1VnjyP76Kptr-OBRkPjyFW9wLeYGVzzItpO9CTwH1MMjG8_16Egc_4VvAeHsIk-ZpXT0HSDSLNd8a6Y_t7gEi3tMyKqiP1Y5CwcFFJB3v_fRL9wrzPrspLY8orYCsqDffdX1NhQlTKYkrLtb5BRraOw2aK8eK2QiSd_qt5iUcfPUZEHKGsuHddmUZ3g1KAfSUlpQ5WwArBFM40aATIe7L09Yk5jgwU5bn2pfMLHqr8ikQi)**_
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=af65255948bf422fa19b4d45391b21ee&_e=iKJ-nWJFMFBkOndS7K2hGnV0ZNv1dmfseSdMwrPUWYkHymSpblFQFnvhGmY-naPT3EtUPNPQ6MSillyQCOSOSf8hZxyMBaL_SM0U3Td8YB85cffE_oVfnKnarMnQTKmlwlTdtRGRcd05et7mvW1VnjyP76Kptr-OBRkPjyFW9wLeYGVzzItpO9CTwH1MMjG8_16Egc_4VvAeHsIk-ZpXT0HSDSLNd8a6Y_t7gEi3tMwR8vBIBsrAgEE64yIGFysAAbsY4_-GQ75FfZjJSdcfKUQTDxiM6nQCmoSD7M0GkawekDicBmm8Gs3FFG78ewl47X2TrOD_x5TLP4zDjKAeL5tdc_gwGdcCKVnS7YY-sdH7KrNHE154uThM39_Czwh9)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---

They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. But whatever you feel led to give, please end it back quickly. Chance's trial starts on July 7th. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he'll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won't be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won't be able to walk our daughter down the aisle somebody... I can't bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, \-- or any amount -- could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you -- in advance -- for helping my husband fight back. With hope and thanks, Kimberly Bretches P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his "reward."And to make things worse, we're up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance's trial begins. Chance and I have three children -- and one more on the way. Please don't let them grow up without their father. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Oz is coming for Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1011&refcode=email-031625_v&akid=7851%2E5885482%2ERdMLsV ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

On Friday, Dr. Oz went before the Senate to make his case to lead the
Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS). And we’re in an all out
SPRINT to stop him.

As a TV show host, Dr. Oz promoted diet schemes, questionable wellness
products, and Big Pharma drugs. Now, he’s promoting “Medicare Advantage
for All” — a privatization scheme rife with fraud, abuse, and care denials
— all so insurance companies can profit.

After spending millions lobbying to expand Medicare Advantage to line
their own pockets, healthcare giants like UnitedHealthcare and CVS are
THRILLED.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1061&akid=7851%2E5885482%2ERdMLsV ][IMG]

Republicans have spent decades trying to slash and privatize Medicare, and
now they have their best chance yet with Dr. Oz. Our Revolution will NEVER
stop standing with Bernie to fight for Medicare for All, but first we have
to mount a massive mobilization to defeat Dr. Oz’s nomination.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-031625nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7851%2E5885482%2ERdMLsV ]Our Citizen Action team is working around the clock to overwhelm the
Senate with pressure to defeat Dr. Oz and his Medicare Advantage scheme.
Can you chip in to help us mobilize like never before?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-031625nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7851%2E5885482%2ERdMLsV ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-031625nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7851%2E5885482%2ERdMLsV ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-031625nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7851%2E5885482%2ERdMLsV ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-031625nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7851%2E5885482%2ERdMLsV ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-031625nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7851%2E5885482%2ERdMLsV ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-031625nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7851%2E5885482%2ERdMLsV ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

If confirmed, Oz’s role at CMS will allow him to make decisions to enrich
himself, the insurance corporations he has investments in, the Big Pharma
companies he has partnerships with, and the CEOs who are making millions
while denying care to people. “Medicare Advantage for All” would be a
complete disaster, leading to even more denials, suffering, and fraud.

For years, Bernie has been leading the fight to save Medicare from the
corporations desperate to gut it. And he’s just introduced a bill to
EXPAND it:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1060&akid=7851%2E5885482%2ERdMLsV ][IMG]

In a recent survey, Our Revolution heard from thousands of members who are
terrified that their Medicare coverage could disappear. One told us: “As a
disabled Californian, I live in terror about potential cuts to Medicaid,
Medicare and social security. These three earned benefits are all that are
keeping me alive.”

It’s completely outrageous – we live in the richest country on earth, yet
force millions to worry that their healthcare coverage could be taken away
in an instant. That’s why it’s SO important we mobilize in massive numbers
to show the Senate we will NOT stand by while the GOP destroys Medicare.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-031625nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=7851%2E5885482%2ERdMLsV ]Can you donate now to activate our Citizen Action Team to save Medicare?
We’re 100% funded by grassroots donations from the people, which is how we
can stand up to corporate-backed hacks like Dr. Oz in the first place. Are
you in?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Trump and Musk’s illegal attack on the Department of Education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Trump and Musk are putting kids last, while they line their pockets. We must fight back.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250316-4855-footer&t=1&akid=4855%2E420207%2Elt8D1h)
Peter, it's Pramila Jayapal.
Here’s the truth about what’s happening right now: **Donald Trump and Elon Musk are illegally dismantling the Department of Education.** They’re slashing the workforce by 50%, stealing from our kids to enrich themselves.
This isn’t about saving money or making the government more efficient — **it’s about prioritizing billionaires over the future of our children.**
**[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20240316-1?refcode2=4855_420207_lt8D1h&akid=4855%2E420207%2Elt8D1h) **
Right now, Democrats are working to fight back in Congress and in the courts. Here’s how we push forward:
✅**Use our power in Congress** : We may not have the votes to move bills right now, but we will continue to hold the GOP accountable.
✅ **Win in the courts** : We’re already securing important victories to push back on Trump’s illegal executive overreach.
✅ **Organize for change** : We must build a lasting movement to protect public education and our children’s future.
[**Peter, If you’re with me in this fight, will you pitch in $3 to support my work — both inside and outside of Congress — today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20240316-1?refcode=em20250316-4855&amount=3&refcode2=4855_420207_lt8D1h&akid=4855%2E420207%2Elt8D1h)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20240316-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250316-4855&refcode2=4855_420207_lt8D1h&akid=4855%2E420207%2Elt8D1h)**
Your contribution ensures we can continue this battle and stop Trump and Musk’s illegal and unconstitutional attacks on public education. And together, we’ll build a government that serves everyone — not just the rich and powerful.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

Here’s the truth about what’s happening right now: Donald Trump and Elon Musk are illegally dismantling the Department of Education. They’re slashing the workforce by 50%, stealing from our kids to enrich themselves. This isn’t about saving money or making the government more efficient — it’s about prioritizing billionaires over the future of our children. Right now, Democrats are working to fight back in Congress and in the courts. Here’s how we push forward: ✅Use our power in Congress : We may not have the votes to move bills right now, but we will continue to hold the GOP accountable. ✅ Win in the courts : We’re already securing important victories to push back on Trump’s illegal executive overreach. ✅ Organize for change : We must build a lasting movement to protect public education and our children’s future. Your contribution ensures we can continue this battle and stop Trump and Musk’s illegal and unconstitutional attacks on public education. And together, we’ll build a government that serves everyone — not just the rich and powerful. In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Team ITT
subject: Andy banned conversion therapy. Republicans want it back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
This practice is dangerous, discredited, and deeply harmful.
Peter,

Last year, Gov. Andy Beshear banned conversion therapy for minors because the evidence is overwhelming:**this practice is dangerous, discredited, and deeply harmful.**

Medical and mental health experts have condemned it as a form of psychological abuse that increases the risk of depression, anxiety, self-harm, and suicide among LGBTQ+ youth. Andy did the right thing by ensuring no child in Kentucky would be forced to endure it.

But now, Kentucky Republicans are trying to undo that progress with House Bill 495. The GOP is fighting to bring conversion therapy back — _not because it helps anyone, not because it’s rooted in science (it isn’t), but because they want to stand against Andy at any cost_ — **even if that cost is the well-being of our children.**

Let’s be perfectly clear:

Conversion therapy is not real therapy, it’s abuse. It does not change a person’s identity, but it does leave lasting trauma. Banning it is what’s best for Kentucky kids, regardless of politics. No child should be told they are broken. No young person should be forced into a discredited practice that has been proven to cause lasting harm. **But that’s exactly what will happen if HB 495 passes.**

**[The time to act is NOW, Peter. Add your name to our petition to demand Kentucky lawmakers stop HB 495 and keep conversion therapy OUT of our state. Every signature sends a clear message: We will not stand by while extremists play politics with kids’ lives.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103967892/533834727/1282433013?ms=em25_250316_therap_adv_gq_act___teamitt_ettx&&&&refcode=em25_250316_therap_adv_gq_act___teamitt_ettx&&&&source=em25_250316_therap_adv_gq_act___teamitt_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250316_therap_adv_gq_act___teamitt_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&contactdata=kn6oFgvnx10wxSZk2mbI2gQGoK9KWJsQeLfZHVTedcRkQ4uV39T4oB7K2kKyDK6wozNVzhqnW/D3QxRJ3eCJb4g4yq8enl2iL3ncDhA9Attf+11uXdgY3p8aTVrDLuXDM5WFrVYhgA4haykar01BipW+ZBGk4o90QzGPrcAAdSE+vDnIDwD36AhyMM9vebns&&&&refcode2=c8ef52f7-8d02-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzhlZjUyZjctOGQwMi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dAXSA6PwSyVwNcpdFKnKdvGNF2FRqJ8vt7TI9noaJIk=&emci=ed9b38c7-f800-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c8ef52f7-8d02-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=17458827)** [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103967893/533834728/1282433013?ms=em25_250316_therap_adv_gq_act___teamitt_ettx&refcode=em25_250316_therap_adv_gq_act___teamitt_ettx&source=em25_250316_therap_adv_gq_act___teamitt_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250316_therap_adv_gq_act___teamitt_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=kn6oFgvnx10wxSZk2mbI2gQGoK9KWJsQeLfZHVTedcRkQ4uV39T4oB7K2kKyDK6wozNVzhqnW/D3QxRJ3eCJb4g4yq8enl2iL3ncDhA9Attf+11uXdgY3p8aTVrDLuXDM5WFrVYhgA4haykar01BipW+ZBGk4o90QzGPrcAAdSE+vDnIDwD36AhyMM9vebns&refcode2=c8ef52f7-8d02-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzhlZjUyZjctOGQwMi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dAXSA6PwSyVwNcpdFKnKdvGNF2FRqJ8vt7TI9noaJIk=&emci=ed9b38c7-f800-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c8ef52f7-8d02-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=17458827)

name: Bill Gray
subject: Why chemistry?
body:
A tough question

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4b3cd8c760e64838b9f8f1e2a457fdb0&_e=09J061VZsR-skTgDFtjKSV4ovAjwwJp-neVaA0pzjdegRBG4-T0uIbDaTq0tIlrB0zjdjBKpVegjk6kugMiOREJ9M90J4oTNBNHRLgXqknCnqVOeXSC5pXYRrCZKnEvaFg4f12l9tVZJn7jmgAgFW3AfIk_FAw8m2fHSxomGNO_yVasGYTYhCQEDsavlJz0LUEMOTi_3UBG5emq6km3n85vWXxIzClstS6l3iYTlh6nxe0qKycsH0WMxgo_r3rAzlDjQ-7OTLy_aeshJTPsWe3j9dddL3Sv-5NE5APhR87kl3BSJb28_C0dfmmGZb8pSUmaif_gl9VCbE8bB81cSEp3MjhHuOxq8OtQBFzMycKGWTFBCxL3Obb01HBR7VdI_9P_Ebg0r36rjzAz0yuhxVg%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4b3cd8c760e64838b9f8f1e2a457fdb0&_e=09J061VZsR-skTgDFtjKSV4ovAjwwJp-neVaA0pzjdegRBG4-T0uIbDaTq0tIlrB0zjdjBKpVegjk6kugMiOREJ9M90J4oTNBNHRLgXqknCnqVOeXSC5pXYRrCZKnEvaFg4f12l9tVZJn7jmgAgFW3AfIk_FAw8m2fHSxomGNO_yVasGYTYhCQEDsavlJz0LUEMOTi_3UBG5emq6km3n85vWXxIzClstS6l3iYTlh6nxe0qKycsH0WMxgo_r3rAzg1d9qoDr_ltezZ8qJncvh9CKAKExnQBF5Ytci44UzfDQUG-b5GUJqAQ_ykKsE6WY_ocKXTIxjmXVpHyMpJBE_6nmSpVReBYL6858C8rg3Qj0A9Pg45u-F155BzSUadFkJzO4bTCgn9npIp1SP1inhA%3D%3D)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=4b3cd8c760e64838b9f8f1e2a457fdb0&_t=YNGV29KA2Kz5gE06_H2sEJuUmLG-l7ccMxfGr0aYRbOtQP9rvaRsqzdfISnIRVe7BMKwR-9hDB_G1CHcKpuxOAGTY9ry61QdFmSlXI1ZfjIETjVFN44y8pKN91Zua8-s)

---

name: Ernest Lineberger
subject: Update from Ernest Lineberger, March 15, 2025
body:
Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress!

Almost two months after the presidential inauguration.

‘People’s needs before Party Politics and wealthy greed’ is my theme for
the 2026 election.

I’m not sure how to more plainly state that if elected to be your
representative, I will be there to work for the people’s needs of our
community. That is my priority. No party politics. No culture wars. No
ridiculous issues that simply divide us or fill us with hate and disrespect.

Our government has a lot to do. Taking it apart is not the answer.

Where we can streamline, remove some excess, let’s do it. But the people’s
needs come first.

What do I want from my federal government?
Maintain a strong defense, including strong positive
international relationships with allies and partners.

Keep watch on the environment, keeping it safe for us to breathe
the air, drink the water, eat the food.

Stabilize the economy so we can earn, plan and live quality lives.

Provide a strong social safety net helping all to live quality
lives regardless of economic standing.

Regulate business to ensure fairness and safety.

Help everyone to reach their full potential.

And do all of this with a balanced budget that we can live and
work with for a long time.

The United States has gone through several periods of trying different
economic strategies and the results are clear. When we allow the majority
of wealth to accumulate in the control of a few, we lose as a country.
When we require the wealthy to pay their fair share in taxes and support
those in the lower economic positions, the economy grows in ways that
enrich us all. Communities become safer and more productive. Small
businesses thrive.

Unfortunately, I heard recently that LovePacs of Denton is closing its
doors. LovePacs is an organization that collects donated food, coordinates
volunteers to box it and deliver it to schools and other places for
distribution to those in need. Losing this organization will hurt our
community.

I have been trying to get to know more about and participate with the
helpful organizations in our community (the large 26th congressional
district).
I’ve become acquainted with many churches and the good works they
are doing. United Way of Denton County casts a wide net, supporting many
varied community service organizations.
CCA, Christian Community Action, in Lewisville does so much good
with their food pantry, job skills training, counseling and more. Christian
Community Action – Christian Community Action <https://www.ccahelps.org/>
Span – Meals on Wheels of Denton County provides and delivers
daily meals to seniors, along with food for their pets, a quick check in on
how they are doing, plus available transportation services. Span and Meals
on Wheels <https://span-transit.org/>
Our Daily Bread is Denton County’s only all-purpose homeless
shelter with so many services to support those in need with the goal to get
them back to stable housed independence. Our Daily Bread
<https://www.ourdailybreaddenton.org/>
Serve Denton / Serve Lewisville provide safe affordable locations
for community service organizations to provide services in a central
location. Serve Denton Homepage <https://www.servedenton.org/> Serve
Lewisville <https://www.servelewisville.org/>
Children’s Advocacy Center for North Texas brings hope and
healing to children victimized by abuse in Denton, Wise and Jack
counties. Children's Advocacy Center for North Texas
<https://cacnorthtexas.org/>
And there are many more, but their funding is at risk and they
need our support.

Since I’m not in congress yet, I’m engaging with these local heroes to do
what I can from here. *I’m asking for your support in two ways;* (1)
Engage and support these organizations, Participate with them as they do
their good work, (2) Support my run for US House to help emphasize
‘People’s needs before Party Politics’, visit my website,
https://www.linebergerforuscongress.com/ , share my message, and donate so
we can reach more voters.

Here are a couple events that are coming soon to help support some of these
organizations.
SPAN – Meals on Wheels of Denton County is hosting a fundraising ‘80’s
Dance Party on May 17th at the Flower Mound Courtyard by Marriott. They
also have a Sponsor a senior program, where you can enable Meals on Wheels
to service another senior who is currently on the waiting list.
Events - Span and Meals on Wheels
<https://span-transit.org/events/>

Serve Denton / Serve Lewisville are hosting ‘A Night in Old Havana’ on
April 12th at Circle R ranch.
serve.salsalabs.org/anightinoldhavanaservelewisville/index.html

CCA is partnering with Cerulean Blue Coffee House in Flower Mound Parker
Square on March 20th.
Bring a friend and join us at Cerulean Blue Coffee House in Parker Square
for a meaningful evening. We will also be collecting items for Bags of
Blessings to support 1,000 kids this summer through CCA’s Kids Eat Free
Summer Feeding Program. Your support makes a difference!

📍Cerulean Blue Coffee House, 420 Parker Square Rd, Parker Square | Flower
Mound

📅Thursday, March 20th

⏰6:30 - 8:00 pm

☕Enjoy complimentary drinks and food, provided by Collective Way.

🎫Raffle for Stars & Ranger Tickets

❤️Help us collect items for our Bags of Blessings to feed 1,000 kids this
summer.

• Pop-Tarts Toaster Pastries, Breakfast Foods, Kids Snacks, Variety Pack

• Bring a Chef Boyardee Beef Ravioli in Pasta Sauce Microwave Food, 7.5 OZ
Microwaveable Bowl

• Goldfish Crackers Big Smiles Variety Pack with Cheddar, Colors, and
Pretzels, Snack Packs
(1) Cerulean Blue - CCA Event | Facebook
<https://www.facebook.com/events/993427915454167/>

Thank You all for everything you do to make life better for those in our
community!

People’s needs before party politics!

Ernest Lineberger

For US House, Texas CD26

LinebergerforUScongress.com

PS: Local Elections are May 3rd with a lot of School Board and City Council
seats in the mix. Look up your sample ballot using VoteDenton.gov or
similar website in your county, check out the candidates, and help us make
the best choices this election. Early voting will be April 22 – 29. Stay
Engaged.
clean_body: Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress! Almost two months after the presidential inauguration. ‘People’s needs before Party Politics and wealthy greed’ is my theme for the 2026 election. I’m not sure how to more plainly state that if elected to be your representative, I will be there to work for the people’s needs of our community. That is my priority. No party politics. No culture wars. No ridiculous issues that simply divide us or fill us with hate and disrespect. Our government has a lot to do. Taking it apart is not the answer. Where we can streamline, remove some excess, let’s do it. But the people’s needs come first. What do I want from my federal government? Maintain a strong defense, including strong positive international relationships with allies and partners. Keep watch on the environment, keeping it safe for us to breathe the air, drink the water, eat the food. Stabilize the economy so we can earn, plan and live quality lives. Provide a strong social safety net helping all to live quality lives regardless of economic standing. Regulate business to ensure fairness and safety. Help everyone to reach their full potential. And do all of this with a balanced budget that we can live and work with for a long time. The United States has gone through several periods of trying different economic strategies and the results are clear. When we allow the majority of wealth to accumulate in the control of a few, we lose as a country. When we require the wealthy to pay their fair share in taxes and support those in the lower economic positions, the economy grows in ways that enrich us all. Communities become safer and more productive. Small businesses thrive. Unfortunately, I heard recently that LovePacs of Denton is closing its doors. LovePacs is an organization that collects donated food, coordinates volunteers to box it and deliver it to schools and other places for distribution to those in need. Losing this organization will hurt our community. I have been trying to get to know more about and participate with the helpful organizations in our community (the large 26th congressional district). I’ve become acquainted with many churches and the good works they are doing. United Way of Denton County casts a wide net, supporting many varied community service organizations. CCA, Christian Community Action, in Lewisville does so much good with their food pantry, job skills training, counseling and more. Since I’m not in congress yet, I’m engaging with these local heroes to do what I can from here. I’m asking for your support in two ways; (1) Engage and support these organizations, Participate with them as they do their good work, (2) Support my run for US House to help emphasize ‘People’s needs before Party Politics’, visit my website, , share my message, and donate so we can reach more voters. Here are a couple events that are coming soon to help support some of these organizations. name: Mark Pukita, GFI
subject: 📣 Act Now Stop Ohio's $2.5B Bond Issue
body:
📣 Help us fight against this damaging bond issue. | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7385c88e64&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=dc3910eb87&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | ** **
**CALL TO ACTION!
$2.5B BOND ISSUE ON
OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT
WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW!
WE MUST GET THE WORD OUT!**

---
|
We [**PREVIOUSLY**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=46495b454e&e=5c740fa3e2) made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! **EARLY VOTING STARTS IN ABOUT 2 WEEKS!**

**HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP!**

1) PLEASE **forward this message** to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
2) PLEASE download **[THIS GRAPHIC](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c237437f60&e=5c740fa3e2) (same as below)** to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, **especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=accdfa1236&e=5c740fa3e2)

**BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE**

It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can!
Thank you!

**EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f799d62d93&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
| | ** **
**HB78 UPDATE!
DANGEROUS DIGITAL
OHIO DRIVER'S LICENSE
VOTER ID LEGISLATION!**

---
| **UPDATE ON HB78!**

**Thank you** for participating in last week's call to action on HB78! **It worked!**

We have agreement from one of the bill's sponsors, Ohio House of Representatives Member Thomas Hall (R), to work with a crack team of Ohio's election integrity activist community to rewrite the bill to completely & unquestionably (meaning if challenged in court) exclude digital driver's licenses from being used as an approved form of voter ID in Ohio.

**Now we'll be watching to make sure Ohio legislators don't try to pull a fast one & sneak HB78 language into the massive state budget bill currently being debated.**

If you're new to this topic, check out last week's newsletter [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=cb48044f3e&e=5c740fa3e2) and watch this video:

**EPISODE: "Ohio Republicans are Pushing Surveillance-State Legislation"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=741d9b2ea0&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
| |
**PLEASE BE SURE YOU'RE
RECEIVING GFI'S
TEXT ALERTS!**

---
| **JOIN OUR FREE TEXT ALERT SERVICE!

Didn't know** we had a **text alert** capability for informative & urgent communication?

Not receiving our texts?

Want to be on our text service?

It's simple and **FREE**.

**Text "JOIN" to 833-935-4657 and you're on the list.**

Pass the word on to everyone you know so they can stay informed too!

**Do it now!**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=558fd89dba&e=5c740fa3e2)

(Download image above [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f81946ef34&e=5c740fa3e2))

---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=01923c2d97&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)
[GFIOhio.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4c948c6f4c&e=5c740fa3e2)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2025 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=c4c4464a27) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=c4c4464a27).

name: Ted Lieu
subject: HUMILIATING defeat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter,

I only reach out when it’s important, so hear me when I say: this is as important as it gets:

My friend Raja Krishnamoorthi is just 11 hours away from his midnight deadline -- and as of 1pm, he still needs 600 gifts to reach his goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

That’s why I’m rallying Democrats from coast to coast today to help Raja reach his critical goal, close this fundraising gap, and hand Republicans a HUMILIATING defeat. Can I count on you before midnight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter, let me explain:

Raja is working night and day to:

-- Defend healthcare access from Republican attacks
-- Protect our communities from gun violence
-- Grow our economy and create good-paying jobs from coast to coast
-- And so much more

Meanwhile, MAGA Republicans are busy defending insurrectionists, calling for a MASSIVE tax increase on the middle class, and pushing baseless investigations against our Democrats.

Simply put, it’s never been more clear that Raja is exactly the kind of leader we need to keep in Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

That’s why I’m proud to stand by Raja, Peter. But he still needs 600 gifts to reach his goal. Will you stand with Raja and rush in $14 before midnight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Chip in $14 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Chip in $19 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=19]
Chip in $24 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=24]
Chip in $50 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=50]
Chip in $100 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=100]
Or chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=25]

Thank you, TedRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?refcode=footer]
Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
Friends of Raja for Congress
PO Box 681202
Schaumburg, IL 60168
United States

name: Katherine Clark
subject: The GOP’s plot to rip off the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Shot PAC
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103968822/533837486/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250316_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmJmNWI5ZS05MDAyLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkA2jaGce4ct5MRdNT01iaO0XwgezKAjiE2K4hq--ec=)
---
Peter, House Republicans have made it abundantly clear where their priorities lie: | - | Starting trade wars with our allies, no matter the cost to American families.
---|---
- | Laying off thousands of federal employees in the name of “efficiency.”
- | Pushing forward a funding bill that cuts health care, housing, and $23 billion in veterans' benefits.
**This is how Republicans are using their majority, Peter — slashing critical services people rely on in order to siphon more money to their wealthy donors.**
Every day, their plot to rip off the American people has been exposed and reiterated. And every day, my fellow Democrats and I are pushing back using every resource we have.
House Democrats reintroduced legislation to revitalize the Voting Rights Act of 1965, strengthening legal protections against discriminatory voting policies, and stood strong in voting NO on the House GOP’s harmful funding bill.
**But to build a strong coalition that can retake the majority in 2026, we need your support:**
**[Can you chip in any amount to help Fair Shot build the resources we need to flip GOP-held seats and elect Democratic champions for working people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103968823/533837487/1381410798?amount=&refcode=AU_FSP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250316_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmJmNWI5ZS05MDAyLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkA2jaGce4ct5MRdNT01iaO0XwgezKAjiE2K4hq--ec=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | = Peter, House Republicans have made it abundantly clear where their priorities lie: | - | Starting trade wars with our allies, no matter the cost to American families. ---|--- - | Laying off thousands of federal employees in the name of “efficiency.” - | Pushing forward a funding bill that cuts health care, housing, and $23 billion in veterans' benefits. This is how Republicans are using their majority, Peter — slashing critical services people rely on in order to siphon more money to their wealthy donors. Every day, their plot to rip off the American people has been exposed and reiterated. And every day, my fellow Democrats and I are pushing back using every resource we have. House Democrats reintroduced legislation to revitalize the Voting Rights Act of 1965, strengthening legal protections against discriminatory voting policies, and stood strong in voting NO on the House GOP’s harmful funding bill. But to build a strong coalition that can retake the majority in 2026, we need your support: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Together, we can lay the groundwork to retake the House majority and ensure every family has a fair shot. * * *
In yet another unprecedented stunt, convicted felon and fraudster Donald Trump, threatened free speech and the free market by reading a sales pitch for Elon Musk’s tanking Tesla cars and threatening protestors in front of the White House.
Trump is turning the White House into grifter HQ. He falsely claimed that it is illegal to boycott Tesla, and he labeled Tesla protestors as "domestic terrorists" who if caught would “go through hell.”
This rhetoric aims to stifle dissent and distract from the real issues affecting our communities.
**In these challenging times, Local Democracy Project stands firm in its dedication to building democracy from the ground up and protecting our First Amendment rights from any attacks.**
******[Your support is crucial in countering these divisive tactics. name: Jess @ All On The Line
subject: A mapper’s perspective on the Supreme Court’s big upcoming redistricting case
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We must draw lines that reflect our values.
|
---

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103969293/533839065/-766669867?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_OTDLA3_email_20250316-AOTL-Tier1-OTDLA3-JW_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250316-AOTL-Tier1-OTDLA3-JW_&utm_campaign=OTDLA3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxZDg5MjdiLTkwMDItZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hmwX8iwxgPTkKiH89Lgm8iRUaC-C7KDGp0vULo43vmA=)
---
Hi Peter: as the Deputy Director of Geospatial Analytics at All On The Line, I live and breathe maps.
This isn’t a job I clock in and out of — it’s work that I’m passionate about, because making electoral maps more fair means more voters can make their voices heard.
In college, when I first learned about the power of redistricting, I got to use my Geographic Information System (GIS) skills for a project that showed the effects of prison gerrymandering. Now I get to work with the All On The Line campaign to analyze the fairness of maps and work towards our goal of a truly representative democracy.
So, with the U.S. Supreme Court set to hear oral arguments in a case that centers on Louisiana’s congressional map, I wanted to reach out to give a mapper’s perspective.
**See, maps are never neutral documents — they express our basic values and vision for society. When maps create a level playing field for elections, they reflect the fundamental belief that voters should pick their politicians, not the other way around.**
**The maps at the center of this case tell a story about representation, equality, and the ongoing struggle for justice in our country.**
After the 2020 census, which showed that Black Louisianans were about one-third of the state’s population, the legislature passed a congressional map that made Black voters a majority in only one of the state's six congressional districts. The rest of the state’s Black voters were held below 33% in each of the other five districts, where Black Louisianans could not elect a candidate of their choice.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103969294/533839066/-766669867?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_OTDLA3_email_20250316-AOTL-Tier1-OTDLA3-JW_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250316-AOTL-Tier1-OTDLA3-JW_&utm_campaign=OTDLA3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxZDg5MjdiLTkwMDItZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hmwX8iwxgPTkKiH89Lgm8iRUaC-C7KDGp0vULo43vmA=)
---
_This map heavily concentrates Black voters into the 2nd District._
Our affiliate supported voters in successfully challenging Louisiana’s gerrymandered congressional map in court, alleging it violated the Voting Rights Act (VRA).
Ultimately, Louisiana was required to put in place a new map that includes two Black opportunity districts and follows the VRA.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103969295/533839067/-766669867?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_OTDLA3_email_20250316-AOTL-Tier1-OTDLA3-JW_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250316-AOTL-Tier1-OTDLA3-JW_&utm_campaign=OTDLA3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxZDg5MjdiLTkwMDItZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hmwX8iwxgPTkKiH89Lgm8iRUaC-C7KDGp0vULo43vmA=)
---
_In this map, Congressional Districts 2 and 6 are now both Black opportunity districts._
But shortly afterward, a new lawsuit was filed and a lower court wrongly struck down Louisiana’s VRA-compliant map. The U.S. Supreme Court ordered the fair and representative map to remain in place during the rest of the legal proceedings. As a result, Black Louisianians had the opportunity to elect candidates of their choice in two of the state’s six congressional districts in the 2024 election.
**Now, the U.S. Supreme Court will not only determine whether Black Louisianians are able to make their voices heard in a fair congressional map, but the ruling could also impact the future of critical VRA protections.** This could have far-reaching consequences for how we evaluate fairness in map-making for years to come.
For those of us who believe in the power of maps to shape society for the better, this case reminds us of our shared responsibility. We must draw lines that reflect our democratic values — ensuring equal representation for all those who have been unjustly denied it.
[**I’m grateful that you support this work, and I hope you’ll continue to fight back against gerrymandering by supporting All On The Line’s critical work in Louisiana and across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103969296/533839068/-766669867?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_OTDLA3_email_20250316-AOTL-Tier1-OTDLA3-JW_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250316-AOTL-Tier1-OTDLA3-JW_&utm_campaign=OTDLA3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxZDg5MjdiLTkwMDItZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hmwX8iwxgPTkKiH89Lgm8iRUaC-C7KDGp0vULo43vmA=)
Thanks,
Jess
Jess Weiss
Deputy Director of Geospatial Analytics, All On The Line

Team: Ignore the Teslas on the south lawn of the White House and pay attention to the words.Why? When we called out a frightening bill, last known as H.R. 9495, **that already passed the House and would give President Donald Trump broad powers to target his political foes,** a lot of our supporters replied that the bill would only truly apply to terrorist groups and that we were overreacting.Well, yesterday, right outside the White House, President Trump said people vandalizing Tesla brand cars would be branded domestic terrorists and "go through hell." We're not condoning vandalism, but it shows how quickly and abruptly Donald Trump will escalate against people he sees as his opponents. So we ask again -- **what would stop President Trump from doing the same to nonprofits like ours?** We have to defend the freedom of speech and our right to protest wrongs against us. **[Team, pitch in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop Congress from passing this bill and silencing our right to protest>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103969427/533839625/1723810624?amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjYzliZjcxLTkxMDItZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_2opV7ng3iaJTesbvxb-m48s-vVJW8DtZxRUG4gjBf4=&emci=e1fc7f28-7f02-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2cc9bf71-9102-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=33603084)**
