| | To refresh your memory, this so-called "nonprofit killer" bill would empower the Treasury secretary to unilaterally designate any nonprofit as a “terrorist supporting organization” and revoke its tax-exempt status, effectively killing the group. **The bill could give presidential administrations a tool to crack down on organizations for political reasons. ** “ _Authoritarianism is not born overnight — it creeps in_ ,” Rep. Lloyd Doggett said on the House floor. “ _A tyrant tightens his grip not just by seizing power, but when he demands new powers and when those who can stop him willingly cede and bend to his will_.”“ _A sixth grader would know this is unconstitutional_ ,” added Rep. Jamie Raskin. Unconstitutional and authoritarian or not, this bill has passed the House once and has a good chance of passing both houses of Congress now that opponents of voting rights have total control of our government. **That's why we're working now** to prevent this bill from ever becoming law. **[Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stop this bill and protect the ability of people-powered groups to advocate for our rights? We need every supporter of voting rights with us>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/103969434/533839632/1723810624?amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjYzliZjcxLTkxMDItZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_2opV7ng3iaJTesbvxb-m48s-vVJW8DtZxRUG4gjBf4=&emci=e1fc7f28-7f02-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2cc9bf71-9102-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=33603084)**

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. clean_body: Reuters: Trump says violence against Tesla is domestic terrorism| | | | | Team: Ignore the Teslas on the south lawn of the White House and pay attention to the words.Why? When we called out a frightening bill, last known as H.R. 9495, that already passed the House and would give President Donald Trump broad powers to target his political foes, a lot of our supporters replied that the bill would only truly apply to terrorist groups and that we were overreacting.Well, yesterday, right outside the White House, President Trump said people vandalizing Tesla brand cars would be branded domestic terrorists and "go through hell." We're not condoning vandalism, but it shows how quickly and abruptly Donald Trump will escalate against people he sees as his opponents. So we ask again -- what would stop President Trump from doing the same to nonprofits like ours? We have to defend the freedom of speech and our right to protest wrongs against us. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | To refresh your memory, this so-called "nonprofit killer" bill would empower the Treasury secretary to unilaterally designate any nonprofit as a “terrorist supporting organization” and revoke its tax-exempt status, effectively killing the group. The bill could give presidential administrations a tool to crack down on organizations for political reasons. “ Authoritarianism is not born overnight — it creeps in ,” Rep. Lloyd Doggett said on the House floor. “ A tyrant tightens his grip not just by seizing power, but when he demands new powers and when those who can stop him willingly cede and bend to his will.”“ A sixth grader would know this is unconstitutional ,” added Rep. Jamie Raskin. Unconstitutional and authoritarian or not, this bill has passed the House once and has a good chance of passing both houses of Congress now that opponents of voting rights have total control of our government. That's why we're working now to prevent this bill from ever becoming law. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Fellow American,

**That's a significant amount of money, making me the Democrats' #1 target going forward. Now, I'm up for re-election, and the Left is ready to put up a serious challenge against me.**

name: Kimberly Bretches
subject: Please don’t let my three children grow up without their father
body:
Up against a George Soros backed prosecutor| | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.
---
| |
---
Dear Peter, That's me and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches in the picture I've sent you...
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=29747bb371ef4ca08b0a82cd59874a27&_e=WSnPaXelGB8sdxNA3YTInyHSh3ifvK5o5JP0CKmBMsjjEXGXURxzfQ2FOjDBwIfcsXB4RYP03KK24o3yo-Uc4FO2t6yfgMuFDPzTU0EvIN96uvD4EXRhNjUkyYfejfElAQhBcc4DeYRzEIAtKtp221ywJES_YDcuduQZey0JqErdVfx9BinHSxH9to_XRqDQjHTjAKepDsePdyiCjMlQ3D_-qpEPy1nKb_IJdvcVVSmsdQi6oclGZyDvtMbTwZMO2tk-eQYQ5okT19NrF6l63QnX8tGpmjBb1xi6aDwzMd3MGcSEV-PXzUT-wDuuyZ1Mk3sgze67YpfVwYsy9xnOG9vXfrTtw0RFUFDsEvK8X3wynputq3lcm0BkYnDK7tvm)
---
...a picture we took on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because in July, the same city that gave Chance this award... ...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were "mostly peaceful." It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars, and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn't restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same "beanbag guns" that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before it got out of hand. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. What I didn’t know then was that this nightmare wasn't over for us. Far from it. Unknown to Chance and the other officers on duty that night, an anti-police protestor was hit by one of my husband's non-lethal rounds. They claimed they were injured and lost part of their finger. And for that... ...the county prosecutor charged my husband with "aggravated assault by a public servant" -- a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don't care if my husband is innocent. They'll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran. My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He's served on mission trips -- planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he's done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars and could be his "reward." Even if my husband's good name is cleared there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God's grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us -- the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policemen's best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes -- like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth -- without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they've agreed to help Chance. My friend, you've read my letter this far so I'm going to ask as boldly as I can: Will you help Chance, too? _**[Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have wrongly accused?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=29747bb371ef4ca08b0a82cd59874a27&_e=WSnPaXelGB8sdxNA3YTInyHSh3ifvK5o5JP0CKmBMsjjEXGXURxzfQ2FOjDBwIfcsXB4RYP03KK24o3yo-Uc4FO2t6yfgMuFDPzTU0EvIN96uvD4EXRhNjUkyYfejfElAQhBcc4DeYRzEIAtKtp221ywJES_YDcuduQZey0JqErdVfx9BinHSxH9to_XRqDQjHTjAKepDsePdyiCjMlQ3D_-qpEPy1nKb_IJdvcVVSm-DNwjrm-p4CKgq9EGRMagHtNEE7RUFv8yoAxYbpy4EdsYvhB6PhXj-2SVnduyHRzGXNCYJaI7sBxZYe6JQ6ZEvu04azHjcJLbCJQ7d6moirQNZV9BoY0lSSlIVs3gfKWbafFQc2DuVy1F_X3lGgS8)**_** ** You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. _**[So with that in mind, please know that any contribution -- be it $35, $100, $500 or even $1,000 -- is tax-deductible.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=29747bb371ef4ca08b0a82cd59874a27&_e=WSnPaXelGB8sdxNA3YTInyHSh3ifvK5o5JP0CKmBMsjjEXGXURxzfQ2FOjDBwIfcsXB4RYP03KK24o3yo-Uc4FO2t6yfgMuFDPzTU0EvIN96uvD4EXRhNjUkyYfejfElAQhBcc4DeYRzEIAtKtp221ywJES_YDcuduQZey0JqErdVfx9BinHSxH9to_XRqDQjHTjAKepDsePdyiCjMlQ3D_-qpEPy1nKb_IJdvcVVSnvwLxCfuEhgTrVS48loXkAtqr-U3o0fheX5UxKrsAdaQCyVuwGQDVOooVLK5NjzxZYq__2i5NhpDxqrSIapHlnClcCa-3a-joIq7JzRBGvf-nhU-RnlFkdSOstMO9NPFIqGVLW-8Kw7Y1BsknzLu7v)**_ But whatever you feel led to give, please end it back quickly. Chance's trial starts on July 7th. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he'll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won't be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won't be able to walk our daughter down the aisle somebody... I can't bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. _**[So please, my friend, rush back your gift right away if possible.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=29747bb371ef4ca08b0a82cd59874a27&_e=WSnPaXelGB8sdxNA3YTInyHSh3ifvK5o5JP0CKmBMsjjEXGXURxzfQ2FOjDBwIfcsXB4RYP03KK24o3yo-Uc4FO2t6yfgMuFDPzTU0EvIN96uvD4EXRhNjUkyYfejfElAQhBcc4DeYRzEIAtKtp221ywJES_YDcuduQZey0JqErdVfx9BinHSxH9to_XRqDQjHTjAKepDsePdyiCjMlQ3D_-qpEPy1nKb_IJdvcVVSnp0HYJRPjkXSsRg02jx2ZvP5IjBVOp_ELW6kedylhsxWXMT2B5dM3u3Xa8Wq681jXhqNW9TjjTqvi1e0prtjVSoB3T_nqOiyVTb5jvymmvmSw_6IUHqIrwyjf_8-_ZtiB7PThiRFXi_V0lpyeW11oT)**_ With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, _**[your gift of $35](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=29747bb371ef4ca08b0a82cd59874a27&_e=WSnPaXelGB8sdxNA3YTInyHSh3ifvK5o5JP0CKmBMsjjEXGXURxzfQ2FOjDBwIfcsXB4RYP03KK24o3yo-Uc4FO2t6yfgMuFDPzTU0EvIN96uvD4EXRhNjUkyYfejfElAQhBcc4DeYRzEIAtKtp221ywJES_YDcuduQZey0JqErdVfx9BinHSxH9to_XRqDQjHTjAKepDsePdyiCjMlQ3D_-qpEPy1nKb_IJdvcVVSnxnHkR8r8KDPqQQjxcFi63GQXcjHhGVG8lG_Wiw1X15PF0CWRK8q-oAxquTmiVM7BepJFMB-DCblNKu_66bs2Xcql2hlujpLta8vEkvZCk3GG1V5OfXxYZsJplTHm_dwfsDNn7Ul6rk3wMlW3sNtRu)**_ \-- or any amount -- could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you -- in advance -- for helping my husband fight back.
---
With hope and thanks,
---
Kimberly Bretches
---
P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his "reward."And to make things worse, we're up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance's trial begins. Chance and I have three children -- and one more on the way. Please don't let them grow up without their father. _**[Thank you for any help you can send to LELDF today.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=29747bb371ef4ca08b0a82cd59874a27&_e=WSnPaXelGB8sdxNA3YTInyHSh3ifvK5o5JP0CKmBMsjjEXGXURxzfQ2FOjDBwIfcsXB4RYP03KK24o3yo-Uc4FO2t6yfgMuFDPzTU0EvIN96uvD4EXRhNjUkyYfejfElAQhBcc4DeYRzEIAtKtp221ywJES_YDcuduQZey0JqErdVfx9BinHSxH9to_XRqDQjHTjAKepDsePdyiCjMlQ3D_-qpEPy1nKb_IJdvcVVSn3QEtVH0Opkb-QeG-iJ9G4gO2PoG9zhAQXi26wYrc6drw3liKXoZWBUIXNIeNa1c0VxuEbK_2Hs1_iHWeWK1fWE3Q1Iw1kKzggNgn6SCSrLhZhkJ81INLFCyxd9ThYUacJIuY2nsD0nF9o5FHojJaE)**_
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=29747bb371ef4ca08b0a82cd59874a27&_e=WSnPaXelGB8sdxNA3YTInyHSh3ifvK5o5JP0CKmBMsjjEXGXURxzfQ2FOjDBwIfcsXB4RYP03KK24o3yo-Uc4FO2t6yfgMuFDPzTU0EvIN96uvD4EXRhNjUkyYfejfElAQhBcc4DeYRzEIAtKtp221ywJES_YDcuduQZey0JqErdVfx9BinHSxH9to_XRqDQjHTjAKepDsePdyiCjMlQ3D_-qpEPy1nKb_IJdvcVVSnL4jM784z177gJzH1FiJVYDBFxPZIDP2HBVrsUgJtC6ANvT8Vdw6CJu1BbDaCPUkkTcymr4IVV_qSzOX6s7iOktSm0KoEoMcwC2jyYEI2HxbZiHkRhEAlesj3bqRLFDb8g-3jphJp2W9Jja5b5WqTz)

name: Senator Ted Budd
subject: Will you spare a moment?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
I know your inbox is full, but please.

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=c16f20a5e4ad4590871d81e786d98bda&_e=e0LE2JZsEbN1-1CpIW4vZpjoWvw3sjFs0n9yajbrWBC7iitM0ZNeKrr9gUyXbFlZLd0xP3S97fwJJWyMb7QAgC3l-9G1JKZZDMrM-ohZ4-eQuDcWcG7igmJ86MHOjI2yqgW30xlsqetcU7GvQKm_o8p2N7y52A_-VdfGeQETQEvJDRmFSWxqu0KshfzzNSssLtA44I_L3jHI79yxiLOFGMmZHA9yRZQuwRcsYOsbwS3s7CH7OV2MHSFKYDZS4w6qYdoZXbs2oOy3Yj1tLoLN94BwlL1MxHTgNo4_Rj1Vz64HUsGSWzUGw82b2juKfe5jf5m6ElKd5V1G-CJlXdGT2w%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

_I know your inbox is full of emails, but I need you to take a moment to read this._

name: Team Kaptur
subject: We hear this question a lot
body:
So let us explain, friend, why your support matters just as much right now as ever.

| |
---
We hear the question a lot, team: _**"The next election isn't for a year and a half. Why do you need my support now?"**_ It's a fair question, and the answer has to do with the nitty-gritty details of our campaign finance system. Since the disastrous Citizens United Supreme Court decision, our elections have been flooded with spending from corporations, billionaires, and special interest groups. Much of these "dark money" donations are untraceable and unlimited, and they're targeted at just a few battleground seats. **It's this dark money spending that made our race one of the most expensive in the country last election, friend — and 2026 is expected to be no different. Mike Johnson and the NRCC have already launched their first attack ad targeting Marcy.** Most Americans aren't paying attention to Congressional races yet. But super PACs and special interest groups are already scouring campaign finance reports, looking for any sign of weakness. They're ready to pour millions of dollars into races like ours. And our first FEC report of 2025 is due at the end of this month. **[That's why it's so important that we meet our fundraising goals early. Defending this critical blue seat starts right now. | 🚨BREAKING NEWS IN THE VIRGINIA GOVERNOR’S RACE 🚨 Virginia’s Earle-Sears drops first attack ad against opponent Abigail Spanberger [We need all hands on deck to respond and set the record straight on this misleading attack on Abigail’s record. Will you rush a contribution to Abigail’s campaign and Blue Amp Action now so we can respond and flip the Governor’s office blue in November?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbeae075a-ab89-4d4e-8377-aacccb76c583/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| We knew this was coming, and it’s just the beginning. As we head into the next few months, the attacks will only intensify as we get closer and closer to our November election. We know dark money groups and national Republicans from Donald Trump to Elon Musk will do whatever it takes to keep this seat in Republican hands. But we’ve seen what happens with Republicans in charge, and Virginia is ready for change. Abigail’s been a champion for Virginia families, standing up for healthcare, jobs, and our veterans—and we can’t let misleading attacks derail the progress she’s made. Her vision for the future — one filled with hope and empathy — is exactly what we need right now. We can’t afford to let our opponents define this race — especially this early in the campaign. Together, we can set the record straight and make sure Abigail wins in November, but we need the resources to do it. [Will you split a contribution today between Abigail’s campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us push back and flip this seat blue?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1a15f35-eec7-4dff-886c-75c9e24bd0fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13c280f3-8d11-48b9-b3b6-6f3e586adc08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

After such a historic speech from President Trump the other night, we thought surely every patriot would have verified their voter profile by now.

But as of our latest review, our records indicate your profile is still marked **[UNVERIFIED.](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=a0f48a6d34cb41deaf8c5ae8009de2a0&_e=keP5D3jG2JfAC90AXiMg-FM57mZfkNZqUJy3f4U7XBJTOnVHOHCMzjoz990wzmLlthJYyX-AhLcoH6O0lZCwdfJp9Ns8R4gEhRLHTTwSw40W1AN4smkcYAbH_cjbs45uWzAu4V01tQnTpjXzdgMpaW0OXq9k1Endr8ON7pZm0IkwVyc9aQKOIsGRYNHuZj0X4f6Phx7Nf8nPumwCnKeBh8YB06k68lffIHmqKTlWNMFp2NUPhU2Pi15VUcwC8XHNBAXjx27Bk4n3h39XdU3HhL3PO37xn8y4_esV3y_xN1cF7yCe6uF421TxZ4HNUZXG8ljg56HbH8N29IuoyvU7xQYHClO0qklZXcaP9hP57HE58GC-RzxIhDWg0fX-x8hWUSaV6c63JoOV6RUVV2U4M8KyzHqm1dl7-qnNGQAFS0lm9CuezN2jvAQEVXJXAIFWqUUGARoNrWITAfH0lW3c7g%3D%3D)**

name: Gay Valimont
subject: I’ll Fight Like Hell—for ALL of Us
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend,
At my recent town hall, I looked out at a room full of people—Republicans, Democrats, Independents—and I meant every word when I said I’ll fight like hell for all of you. Because let’s be honest: looking up to our elected officials? That feels like a thing of the past. Taking the high road? That road has been under construction for years —with no end in sight.
We have 15 days to shape up or shape out, and this election needs all hands on deck.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/69625876553036485343366875495956623054344B6E54696B492F6F78393877437863434656486B76417759495075653837546133336E2B754D58674C334F58/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-01%20at%2011.47.06%E2%80%AFAM.png]
I’m not here for politics as usual. I’m here to take on the big fights—the ones that shake up the system and force Washington to finally work for the people again.
And speaking of dysfunction, here’s some irony for you: with Congress in absolute chaos, Matt Gaetz’s vacant seat might be the very thing that saves the Department of Education. Imagine that.
We have 15 days left to prove that this campaign isn’t about party lines—it’s about real leadership. The kind that fights for ALL Floridians, no matter their politics. But I can’t do this alone.
Chip in $15 today—one dollar for every day left in this race—and let’s send a message loud and clear: We’re done waiting for change. We’re making it happen. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/69625876553036485343366875495956623054344B6E54696B492F6F78393877437863434656486B76417759495075653837546133336E2B754D58674C334F58/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-28%20at%209.15.29%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Washington isn’t ready for the power of the people. Let’s bring it.
With you in this fight,
Gay Valimont
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/107746/images/GaySignoff.png]
Paid For By Gay Valimont
Gay Valimont For Congress
PO Box 1258
Gulf Breeze, FL 32562
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/4390MfsWIkGbMKjh9qfKIA2?unsubscribedata=F8pfVnT%2FkZHTzOemt7%2FsEOmH68%2FJmp7NZPwtrqy6QbdWGf74twHa2sd1KW6xW6Cq55lr%2BfpU9WQ%2FfKoHjj0bkk6nOdFAonUHE7Xg99URkLEcF0DzvToxWA9K%2FQm56p841UG80tjz8CZCoosDl0V1ZguSInEpQCfoDpzkD59RpWS2OgeBQmTx5l8Quu%2BR08C9ZDk0eFMbJP4ram2TiF3C7IkTBMn7cWzDWGdbLqPUhVDHzcgYl69St4vALEOZnA99FVksJ9lrIdR72xZFYIqYXpIUkFnGqA1KOeos5xpJujEH1rIiL3r2ZOHBStnXIbLv8saZjunilFMiutgt1OaUgHkFQeTp%2Bfp1mjTIJKyE3PjFzYmFcYS4BBW%2Bt9w5OeIWGlA9DlSpYAuAuSlwT96nhP%2FXZ6S%2FlyHvBl5D96HU1wm5TeJK7lEA2R6t58Bwo9ya .

US ‘Peace’ Activists Host Event With Terror-Linked Anti-Israel
Speakers

A U.S.-based charity hosted an event Wednesday to proclaim the
innocence of a Palestinian criminal recently freed through an

Shapiro’s agenda and paving the way for far-right attacks on voting, abortion access, and workers’ rights. | | | | | ---|--- Democrats are facing a must-win special election in Pennsylvania this month. If we win, we’ll defend our hard-won majority in the PA House and fend off a right-wing takeover of the chamber. If we lose, the GOP will take full control of the legislature, blocking Democratic Gov. Shapiro’s agenda and paving the way for far-right attacks on voting, abortion access, and workers’ rights.With a Republican trifecta in D.C., we cannot risk losing ground in the states. name: TOP PAC
subject: We know this is devastating
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=JCFm25Fq0F%2Fk%2Bs4i1o2BxlFlb3mADpXZ9mMB4gQtrr0je1yvAfki9twKvziQxa%2BQj7cl1DxymxfHO2RYJujF%2Brzi3VaAhV2wEsF3w7q0PMDL%2BmwbjN%2FEPiSgW1DEloz2BXKtWtalisvErCfwBPN3OjIZIre8%2Fh7xmbL5WAJNU2QVbZ55jEMhO30bO%2FVcYqPB%2BLxxL9dvSOTm2%2B6UC%2BGGEcWE8b%2BNaMALznKlcnSQNpDDP2%2Fqs7PMKUkTDcysjJ4LfbeDsxonbkdq1dn6i72AJQCjvi4ie1oJ7z5Lf6QAT9o%2BGqt%2BuD6bpu7aUnkbfOv5sZPlY7Yd5dkdMCcEdxF79aGmEqTeWbiUgZ27G%2B7nZ12CZmFRGreLMsX29vXLwb3vbfUxI7xfxpN8%2FCGkCMqS7h8jd80tqiowpEJtuL4mzxg%3D]

Recent reporting from ProPublica shows that since abortion bans took hold in our state, Pregnancy has become far more dangerous. While the national maternal mortality rate dropped, it rose in Texas.

Peter, we know news like this is devastating to receive. But we have to keep the faith and focus on what we can do going forward. Now is not the time to give up. Women deserve better. The Black and Latino families that this disproportionately affects deserve better. Texas deserves better.

At the Texas Organizing Project PAC, we take news like this seriously. That’s why we’re working every day to combat these attacks on reproductive healthcare access and elect pro-choice progressives. With your help, we can keep doing the work that needs to be done to protect reproductive rights.

When you chip in, you bring us closer to electing progressives who will defend all of our freedoms in the face of an administration hellbent on taking them away. Now is the time for us to stand up. Are you with us?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-march25?amount=10&refcode=sbd_top_em_fr_031625_headline_res

Thank you, Peter.

Texas Organizing Project PAC

I've been looking for you. It's Tom from House GOP.

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103972144/533848464/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdkOWIyYi05ZTAyLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDj6zy66BNF-iY7fK0ZDXakmZK-Ld2_XBkji4BuDcxg=) Team, the Trump administration is continuing its crusade to slash NIH — including funding for lifesaving cancer research. Let’s be clear about what’s happening here: cancer patients who are already enrolled in clinical trials are suddenly losing access to the treatments that may save their lives. Research projects across the country to pursue cancer prevention, treatments, and cures are getting canceled. And the purpose of all these cuts to medical research? To give billionaires a giant tax break. **Team, we _know_ that when the American people understand that Trump is screwing over cancer patients just to help billionaires like Elon Musk get even richer, what’s happening will be beyond unpopular.** The backlash will be immense — because helping people survive cancer is not a partisan issue. It’s an issue that has affected virtually every single person in our nation, in deeply personal and painful ways. **[But we need your help to get the message out. We need to show Trump that the American people overwhelmingly OPPOSE his cuts to NIH-funded cancer research. If you’re with us, please take just a second to sign Andrea’s petition calling on the Trump Administration to IMMEDIATELY restore funding for this research that so many lives and families depend on.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103972145/533848465/-275424600?refcode=email_031425_NIH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdkOWIyYi05ZTAyLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDj6zy66BNF-iY7fK0ZDXakmZK-Ld2_XBkji4BuDcxg=&emci=a697112f-e200-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=557d9b2b-9e02-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5643047)** | | [Add Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103972146/533848466/-275424600?refcode=email_031425_NIH&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdkOWIyYi05ZTAyLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDj6zy66BNF-iY7fK0ZDXakmZK-Ld2_XBkji4BuDcxg=&emci=a697112f-e200-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=557d9b2b-9e02-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5643047)

Peter, I was debating on whether or not to send this email. But with Donald Trump and Elon Musk unleashing daily attacks against programs and departments that benefit millions of North Carolinians, the stakes are too high to ignore.

We just fell short of our mid-month fundraising deadline to help Congresswoman Foushee team up with her Democratic colleagues to defend public education, Social Security, and many other vital services that North Carolina depends on.

Luckily, we’re CLOSE to reaching our goal of raising $5,000 in grassroots support. So we decided to extend the deadline by one day and reach out to our strongest supporters to help us get there. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I want you to hear this directly from me:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment.
I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment.

Hi, it’s Vivek Ramaswamy.

I wanted you to hear this directly from me: _I JUST announced my
candidacy for Governor of Ohio. _

#
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf/?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&ex_tid=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

IN A MOMENT, I’M GOING TO ASK YOU TO BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR TO
THIS HISTORIC CAMPAIGN – BUT FIRST, I’D LIKE TO EXPLAIN WHY IF
YOU’LL INDULGE ME FOR A MOMENT.
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf/?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&ex_tid=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

WHY RUN NOW?

President Trump winning re-election in November was not just another
political victory – it was a seismic realignment for our country. He
won every swing state. He improved his vote share of minorities and
young voters. We won the House AND Senate. And heck, he even won the
popular vote.

[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf/?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&ex_tid=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

It was the honor of a lifetime to rally voters in battleground
states, campaign on college campuses to turn out Gen-Z for Trump, and
promote his America First vision at rally after rally.

[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf/?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&ex_tid=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real,
lasting change to the country we know and love. It’s an opportunity
to not just ticker around the edges of the Federal Government, but to
upend it completely.

This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone
connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH
the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the
GOLDEN AGE for America!

But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life.
They’re resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake – we
can’t afford to squander this historic opportunity. That’s why
President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT
NOW!

WHY OHIO?

This one’s easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State
and graduated from St. Xavier – a Catholic high school in
Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our
two boys here. I’ve started multiple businesses in Ohio. I’ve also
known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our
excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno.

[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf/?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&ex_tid=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

The people here are honest, have steel in their spines, and embody
the City on a Hill spirit that our country was founded upon. As
Governor, I’d be honored to represent them and the values they stand
for.
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf/?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&ex_tid=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf/?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&ex_tid=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

WHY GOVERNOR?

Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of
politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get
cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only
gets done with buy-in at the executive level.

[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf/?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&ex_tid=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

We saw up close and personal the failure of Democrat rule with Joe
Biden in control of the Federal Government. We also see Democrat
governors like Gavin Newsom and Kathy Hochul drive their states into
ruin. On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and
decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving
to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the
Deep State. True leadership can change everything.

[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf/?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&ex_tid=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

That’s why I’m running for Governor in my home state of Ohio. I
will partner with President Trump – just like I did on the campaign
trail – at the state level to Make America Great Again. I will be a
change agent for our state and set an example of efficient,
conservative governance for the rest of the country.
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf/?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&ex_tid=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

So there you have it. That’s the “why” behind my run for
Governor.

IT WOULD BE THE HONOR OF A LIFETIME TO HAVE YOUR SUPPORT NOW THAT
I’VE OFFICIALLY LAUNCHED MY CAMPAIGN. I’M HUMBLY ASKING YOU TO
BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR TODAY WITH A GIFT OF ANY SIZE.
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf/?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&ex_tid=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

CONTRIBUTE $4 HERE
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&ex_tid=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=4]

CONTRIBUTE $40 HERE
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&ex_tid=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=40]

CONTRIBUTE $400 HERE
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&ex_tid=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=400]

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT
[https://secure.winred.com/vivek-ramaswamy-for-ohio/im-running-sf/?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&ex_tid=20250311_WA90.116684_t1613105-3623&utm_term=lrm-active]

Thanks for taking a minute to read this email. I appreciate your
time.

God bless you and God bless America,
Vivek Ramaswamy

clean_body: I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment. I’d like to explain why if you’ll indulge me for a moment. Hi, it’s Vivek Ramaswamy. I wanted you to hear this directly from me: I JUST announced my candidacy for Governor of Ohio. [] IN A MOMENT, I’M GOING TO ASK YOU TO BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR TO THIS HISTORIC CAMPAIGN – BUT FIRST, I’D LIKE TO EXPLAIN WHY IF YOU’LL INDULGE ME FOR A MOMENT. [] WHY RUN NOW? President Trump winning re-election in November was not just another political victory – it was a seismic realignment for our country. He won every swing state. He improved his vote share of minorities and young voters. We won the House AND Senate. And heck, he even won the popular vote. [] It was the honor of a lifetime to rally voters in battleground states, campaign on college campuses to turn out Gen-Z for Trump, and promote his America First vision at rally after rally. [] Right now, we have a once-in-a-generation chance to make real, lasting change to the country we know and love. It’s an opportunity to not just ticker around the edges of the Federal Government, but to upend it completely. This is our moment to GUT the managerial bureaucracy, FIRE anyone connected to the weaponization of our own government against us, SLASH the size and scope of the administrative state, and usher in the GOLDEN AGE for America! But the Deep State is already putting up the fight of its life. They’re resisting change at every turn. Make no mistake – we can’t afford to squander this historic opportunity. That’s why President Trump needs trusted partnerships at the state level RIGHT NOW! WHY OHIO? This one’s easy. I was born and raised here in the Buckeye State and graduated from St. Xavier – a Catholic high school in Cincinnati. My wife, Apporva, and I live outside Columbus, raising our two boys here. I’ve started multiple businesses in Ohio. I’ve also known JD Vance since college and campaigned all over the state for our excellent new Senator, Bernie Moreno. [] The people here are honest, have steel in their spines, and embody the City on a Hill spirit that our country was founded upon. As Governor, I’d be honored to represent them and the values they stand for. [] [] WHY GOVERNOR? Having traveled across the country, met with hundreds of politicians, ran multiple businesses, and seen how deals really get cut in The Swamp, I have never been more certain that REAL change only gets done with buy-in at the executive level. [] We saw up close and personal the failure of Democrat rule with Joe Biden in control of the Federal Government. We also see Democrat governors like Gavin Newsom and Kathy Hochul drive their states into ruin. On the other hand, we now see President Trump act quickly and decisively to fix our country by deporting illegal criminals, moving to cut taxes, securing our border, gutting DEI, and obliterating the Deep State. True leadership can change everything. [] That’s why I’m running for Governor in my home state of Ohio. I will partner with President Trump – just like I did on the campaign trail – at the state level to Make America Great Again. I will be a change agent for our state and set an example of efficient, conservative governance for the rest of the country. [] So there you have it. That’s the “why” behind my run for Governor. IT WOULD BE THE HONOR OF A LIFETIME TO HAVE YOUR SUPPORT NOW THAT I’VE OFFICIALLY LAUNCHED MY CAMPAIGN. I’M HUMBLY ASKING YOU TO BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR TODAY WITH A GIFT OF ANY SIZE. [] CONTRIBUTE $4 HERE [] CONTRIBUTE $40 HERE [] CONTRIBUTE $400 HERE [] CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT [] Thanks for taking a minute to read this email. I appreciate your time. God bless you and God bless America, Vivek Ramaswamy PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

Will you rush a contribution to Abigail’s campaign and State Democrats Committee now so we can respond and flip the Governor’s office blue in November?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87083?refcode=em20250316-8826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8826%2E614464%2ETk5tuo)** **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87083?refcode=em20250316-8826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8826%2E614464%2ETk5tuo)**

We knew this was coming, and it’s just the beginning. As we head into the next few months, the attacks will only intensify as we get closer and closer to our November election. We know dark money groups and national Republicans from Donald Trump to Elon Musk will do whatever it takes to keep this seat in Republican hands.
But we’ve seen what happens with Republicans in charge, and Virginia is ready for change. Abigail’s been a champion for Virginia families, standing up for healthcare, jobs, and our veterans—and we can’t let misleading attacks derail the progress she’s made. Her vision for the future—one filled with hope and empathy—is exactly what we need right now.
**We can’t afford to let our opponents define this race—especially this early in the campaign. Together, we can set the record straight and make sure Abigail wins in November, but we need the resources to do it.[Will you split a contribution today between Abigail’s campaign and State Democrats Committee to help us push back and flip this seat blue?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87083?refcode=em20250316-8826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8826%2E614464%2ETk5tuo)**

name: Mark Jacob || COURIER
subject: The legacy media is taking MAGA liars at their word
body:
It's not cluelessness. It's complicity.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103972841/533850992/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzc0OWQzNWYtYTUwMi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=62-X3XZP7-FcWEf1Zrj5_h19jQyugA6j7kFWlJCM1lI=&emci=7349d35f-a502-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7749d35f-a502-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14016711)
Hey, Peter, it's Mark Jacob with COURIER.
Last week, _The New York Times_ ran a story treating Elon Musk like a reformer, claiming his goal is to fight “waste, fraud, and abuse.” But let’s be real—Musk is consolidating power, dodging accountability, and using his influence to secure massive government contracts, and the media is letting him get away with it.
This week, I’m breaking down how mainstream outlets like _The New York Times_ and _Politico_ keep falling for right-wing spin—repeating past mistakes and letting Trump and his allies off the hook.
[**Take a moment to read my piece below—and if you support journalism that calls out the media’s failures, chip in $25 or whatever you can to help COURIER keep publishing these critical stories.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103972842/533850993/2081197767?refcode=20250316-MJ-Media-Failure&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzc0OWQzNWYtYTUwMi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=62-X3XZP7-FcWEf1Zrj5_h19jQyugA6j7kFWlJCM1lI=)
* * *
**When the media take MAGA liars at their word**
_Whether it’s cluelessness or complicity, it’s toxic to democracy._
There was a remarkable statement in a recent New York Times story about tensions between Elon Musk and Trump Cabinet members:
_“Cabinet officials almost uniformly like the concept of what Mr. Musk set out to do — reducing waste, fraud and abuse in government — but have been frustrated by the chain saw approach to upending the government and the lack of consistent coordination.”_
**“Reducing waste, fraud and abuse.” Is that really what NYT reporters Jonathon Swan and Maggie Haberman think Musk is trying to do?**
Seems to me Musk is trying to seize political power without accountability, suck up citizens’ personal data, kill investigations of his companies and grab a huge federal contract from a competitor.
He’s oligarching.
**When veteran journalists like Swan and Haberman embrace right-wing spin like Musk’s, is it cluelessness or complicity? That question, which has lingered over political coverage for a very long time, has grown in relevance since Trump took his ride down the escalator in 2015.**
**[HELP COURIER FIGHT BACK!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103972843/533850994/-1581427288?refcode=20250316-MJ-Media-Failure&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzc0OWQzNWYtYTUwMi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=62-X3XZP7-FcWEf1Zrj5_h19jQyugA6j7kFWlJCM1lI=)**
That’s when Trump transformed politics with a spigot of hate and lies. The outrageousness of it took Republican politicians by surprise. They knew hate and lies played well with many of their voters. But they didn’t know anyone could express it so shamelessly and survive in American politics. When they learned they could, they jumped aboard the Trump train because they cared more about getting elected than being decent human beings.
Trump took journalists by surprise, too, and they’ve been much slower to react than Republican politicians were. By and large, the news industry has failed to learn from its mistakes and develop countermeasures against the lies. The media have shown the agility of a three-toed sloth.
**Journalism’s bad habits and gullibility have been badly exploited by the right.**
One especially embarrassing example came last October when Politico wrote a story headlined “Trump team preps list of banned staffers” about how a second Trump administration supposedly would refuse to hire people involved in the radical Project 2025. At the time, Trump was desperately trying to distance himself from Project 2025, which was a loser with the voting public.
“Clearly people working on Project 2025 are blacklisted,” an unidentified Trump insider told Politico.
But, surprise, surprise: Project 2025 authors are now in key positions in the Trump regime. Russell Vought is director of the Office of Management and Budget, aggressively undermining the power of Congress. Tom Homan is “border czar,” terrorizing immigrant communities and threatening cities that don’t submit to his will. John Ratcliffe is CIA director, helping Trump betray Ukraine and cozy up to Russia. Brendan Carr is Federal Communications Commission chair, in charge of harassing the news media.
**They took power with the help of Politico.**
In its October article, Politico said its unnamed sources who distanced Trump from Project 2025 “were granted anonymity to discuss private transition operations.” But when it became clear that their sources lied, did Politico “out” them? No. Will Politico stop using those sources in the future? I’m guessing not.
**Cluelessness or complicity? You decide.**
**[Contribute now to support journalism like this ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/103972844/533850995/-1581427288?refcode=20250316-MJ-Media-Failure&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzc0OWQzNWYtYTUwMi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=62-X3XZP7-FcWEf1Zrj5_h19jQyugA6j7kFWlJCM1lI=)**
Over this decade-long Trump nightmare, the tsunami of corruption has been accompanied by a near-total lack of a learning curve in the news business. If a politician lied to you in every public appearance, you wouldn’t believe anything they said without documented proof, right? Yet, when Trump says something today, too many journalists act as if he might be telling the truth this one time.
**I don’t think this is cluelessness. I think it’s a false posture of “fairness.” It’s complicity.**
Giving Trump the benefit of the doubt was common after his election in 2016, even though he had already shown who he was by boasting about grabbing women's private parts, calling former prisoner of war Sen. John McCain a coward, mocking a disabled person, trying to ban Muslims from coming to this country, and planting a bogus rumor in the press linking Ted Cruz’s father to John F. Kennedy’s assassination.
Yet at the start of Trump 1.0, celebrities ranging from Dave Chapelle to Mark Cuban to Charles Barkley said we should “give Trump a chance.” Nicholas Kristof of the New York Times wrote: “We are not Weimar Germany. ... Let’s give him a chance.”
Of course, the comparison to pre-Hitler Germany seems especially valid now. Maybe we’re even beyond the Weimar Republic, into the early days of an emerging dictatorship. Yet even after Trump won a second term, journalists were doing a memory wipe and hoping he’d grow into the job.
According to media writer Oliver Darcy, CNN’s CEO Mark Thompson told his top journalists in January to “be forward-thinking and to avoid pre-judging Trump,” as Darcy summarized it. Thompson instructed them not to remind viewers that Trump was a twice-impeached convicted felon.
In other words, he ordered his journalists to forget what they know – to fail to have a learning curve.
Last December, USA Today columnist Ingrid Jacques urged Americans to keep an open mind about Trump. This was after Trump had tried and failed to install Matt Gaetz as attorney general despite credible allegations that Gaetz had paid a 17-year-old for sex. Nevertheless, Jacques wrote that “given everything Trump has overcome to once again become president of this great country, all I am saying is, let’s give him a chance.”
**Sure, Ingrid, let bygones be bygones. It’s possible that Donald Trump will turn into Abraham Lincoln any minute now.**
**Mark Jacob**

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Republicans are a bunch of overgrown schoolyard bullies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Our constituents shouldn’t have to suffer because Republicans want to act like children.
| Hi friend, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride. VPP said I could reach out because you have what it takes to stand up in critical moments — and this is one of them.

**Yet another GOP politician decided to get his own 15 Minutes of Twitter Fame at my expense.**

At a subcommittee hearing, the Republican chairman referred to me as “Mr. McBride.” And when Rep. Bill Keating defended me, the chair _adjourned the hearing_ to avoid acknowledging his own immaturity. **Republicans are a bunch of overgrown schoolyard bullies.** Our constituents shouldn’t have to suffer because Republicans want to act like children. **This pettiness needs to end.** I was there ready to ask questions on nuclear non-proliferation and US support for our democratic allies in Europe.

**I ran for Congress to roll up my sleeves and do the job.** No matter what they throw at me, I’m 100% focused on delivering for Delawareans. And if that means listening to their childish insults, _so be it._

[ Friend, I’m proud to have the Voter Protection Project’s support at this moment, but we need you with us. Can you split an urgent $10 contribution to help us cut through the noise and keep up the fight for all of us? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87965?t=6&akid=19256%2E878179%2EPVQcTW) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sarah McBride and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/87966?t=7&akid=19256%2E878179%2EPVQcTW)

clean_body: Our constituents shouldn’t have to suffer because Republicans want to act like children. | Hi friend, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride. VPP said I could reach out because you have what it takes to stand up in critical moments — and this is one of them. Yet another GOP politician decided to get his own 15 Minutes of Twitter Fame at my expense. At a subcommittee hearing, the Republican chairman referred to me as “Mr. McBride.” And when Rep. Bill Keating defended me, the chair adjourned the hearing to avoid acknowledging his own immaturity. Republicans are a bunch of overgrown schoolyard bullies. Our constituents shouldn’t have to suffer because Republicans want to act like children. This pettiness needs to end. I was there ready to ask questions on nuclear non-proliferation and US support for our democratic allies in Europe. I ran for Congress to roll up my sleeves and do the job. No matter what they throw at me, I’m 100% focused on delivering for Delawareans. And if that means listening to their childish insults, so be it. body:
Missing more than two could spell doom for everything we have built here. We are on the cusp and cannot affort to back down now.
| | | | Josh Weil is the Democratic Nominee to flip Florida's 6th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Josh and for stopping the chaos and harm over the next four years. However if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.
---
| | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014kCDL5h2O4-iklhyZwQkyDdCBKli2kWtxsxSj_ZckmyL9WqjkfX2kKY6LoOKBDZfdhBMKrZvo_VpCxNOM_HjGY9z76EkArOYhbvj-jay7_7o4IO5VtTzctOJJMDIhk2UFC9wbjBeVzI4z59FxvLT1Fhw__TCaEhUHb1axkNzmBCZA5Nml0diV6ROdnElM44PSBuU7SYP8dSmvm7jQ8hkTCCjNLm1EnVw&c=_iU6ZEYMxT2Cgk4CMTPdeir-zX0j0--OyRYREMddFYH-wUnBqUXbfA==&ch=BuHUVYKx01eokFdfnHUDCYXUUUtpG2nqNbewnUdw_4RxXPDkomfj6w==)

| | | | Team \- this is Josh Weil. I urgently need your attention for just one moment.
I trust my team--they are the best in the business. But when they told me we could turn this sleepy special election race in Florida into a multi-million dollar nationwide referendum against Trump and take the fight directly to Elon Musk, I was admittedly...skeptical.
After all, I have been a public school teacher my entire career. It upsets me that it takes this much money to run a successful congressional race against the MAGA machine.
We could do a whoooollllllle lot of good with the millions and billions of dollars we dump into politics if we instead invested it in our education system.
But the truth is, we can't. They won't let us. They want to ban books and dismantle public education. We can't stop them AND fully fund education if we don't win tough campaigns.
Giving up on elections is the same thing as giving up on a brighter future for our kids. It's simply not an option.
If we didn't compete and we didn't invest in a massive fundraising operation that can fight back against the smears and relentless attacks I have been getting from Trump's allies here, we would get creamed.
Since I have been so busy campaigning in my district, I don't usually get involved with the ins and outs of our fundraising operation. But when my team sounds the alarm and tells me we are at serious risk of going dark nearly two weeks before Election Day, I listen.
And unfortunately, it's time to break the glass and declare an emergency. 🚨
---

I'm worried. But that's where our supporters come in. And I need you now, Friend.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/43e032a7-20f9-4ec4-9549-33a1c60d9d9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The moment we are living in is no ordinary time. The old political order is crumbling under the weight of its own corruption, incompetence, and neglect. Billionaires and foreign interests buy our elections. Our economy works for the few while the many struggle. Wages stagnate while costs rise. Those in power play their games and let billionaires loose to gut our Constitutional republic and the essential services we rely on - and everyday Americans are abandoned to fend for themselves.
But we are not helpless. We are not spectators. We are the people this country was built for--and we are reclaiming our place in shaping its future.
We know that at the presidential level, a third party is not yet viable. The system is rigged against it, and the duopoly has entrenched itself in ways that make breaking through at the top nearly impossible--for now. But if we resign ourselves to that, if we accept that no new movement can rise to challenge the corruption and dysfunction, then we have already lost. We have to build something new. And we have to do it in places where victory is possible.
The American Party is not a third party--it is a movement to restore the promise of a nation truly governed of, by, and for the people. It is a home for the working class, for independents, for principled conservatives, for progressives who want real results, and for everyone who believes in liberty, justice, dignity, and responsibility. We believe that America is strongest when it honors both its founding principles and the lessons of its past. We acknowledge our failures--slavery, Indigenous displacement, Jim Crow, and systemic injustice--not to dwell in shame, but to ensure that such betrayals of human dignity are never repeated. And at the same time, we claim without hesitation the best of what America has always strived to be: a nation of **freedom, justice, opportunity, innovation, and shared prosperity**.
Here, in Washington's 9th District, we have already proven that this movement is real. Against a deeply entrenched, corrupt, bought-out Democratic incumbent, we ran the shortest possible campaign with a tiny fraction of his funding--and won over 90,000 votes. That doesn't happen by accident. That happens when people recognize the truth, when they see a vision worth fighting for, and when they begin to believe that something better is possible.
This district--this movement--is where we can _actually_ **win**. And winning here will prove something revolutionary: that a principled, people-powered movement can take on the establishment and win. This can be the turning point in American politics, the moment when we drive a wedge into the cracks of the system and open up new possibilities for **all of us**.
This is the platform I intend to run on in 2026. It is a bold, clear vision for an America that works for all its people. It is unapologetic in its commitment to working-class economic power, personal and intellectual freedom, and a government that serves its citizens--not corporations, lobbyists, or foreign powers.
I am sharing this now because this is not just my vision--it belongs to all of us. If this resonates with you, I want to hear your thoughts. What excites you? What's missing? What would make this stronger?
Because in 2026, when we take this fight to Congress, we will not be running alone. We will be carrying with us the voices, the ideas, and the energy of the people who still believe that America can be as great as it was meant to be.
This is where it begins. Let's build it together.

* * *
**The American Party Platform**
_A Fresh, Principled, and Unifying Vision for the Future_
### **I. First Principles: The Core of Who We Are**
1. **Anyone Who Believes in America is an American** - Full stop. _No matter your birthplace, background, or faith, if you uphold liberty, justice, and government of, by, and for the people, you belong_. This country is yours, and so is the responsibility and opportunity to shape our shared future.
2. **Liberty & Justice for All** - Everyone in America, regardless of background, deserves full civil and human rights. First Amendment rights and core freedoms of _thought, speech, religion, assembly, and opportunity_ are essential. The Constitution belongs to all of us, and we have no greater inheritance. We believe this is _true patriotism_ , and we claim it with a full heart.
3. **Learning from Our Past, Building Our Future** - We acknowledge the injustices of slavery, Jim Crow, Japanese internment, Indigenous displacement, and systemic racism, and we are dedicated to ensuring such wrongs are never repeated. At the same time, we proudly uphold the best of what America has always strived to be--a welcoming and courageous beacon of liberty, innovation, and opportunity. We move forward with full knowledge of our past, determined to build a future worthy of our ideals.

### **II. Vision and Values: The Roadmap for a Flourishing America**
1. **Economic Democracy & Worker Empowerment** - A fair economy means strong wages, union rights, and wealth shared through cooperative and public benefit models.
2. **Dignity & Human Rights** - Everyone deserves access to healthcare, housing, education, and a livable wage. We reject corporate exploitation and predatory capitalism, and stand for the rights of working people to a proper share in the wealth they create.
3. **Transparent & Accountable Government** - An end to dark money, corporate control, foreign influence, and backroom deals. We demand open governance and public accountability - _American government for the American people._
4. **Peace & Diplomacy First** - A commitment to diplomacy and multilateral cooperation over endless wars. A foreign policy rooted in human rights, self-determination, and sovereignty.
5. **Sustainability & Stewardship** - A thriving America means responsible use of resources, green jobs, and a commitment to planetary health. We honor Indigenous wisdom that teaches us to be stewards of the land for future generations.
6. **Unity Through Shared Prosperity** - Working people, immigrants, entrepreneurs, and all marginalized communities must have a seat at the table in shaping America's future.
7. **Moral Governance & Ethical Leadership** - A government that is truly for the people requires leaders of principle, courage, and service. We reject political cowardice, corruption, and influence peddling.
8. **Respect for Property & Personal Responsibility** - Hard work, entrepreneurship, and self-sufficiency are the backbone of a free society. We support small businesses, responsible ownership, and policies that reward effort and innovation.
9. **Empowerment of Women & Equal Opportunity** - Women have been at the forefront of every movement for justice in American history. We commit to policies that ensure equal pay, reproductive agency, support for motherhood, safety from violence, and full participation in leadership and decision-making.
10. **Intellectual Sovereignty & Freedom of Thought** - Free speech, diverse viewpoints, and the right to think independently without government overreach are the hallmarks of a strong republic.
11. **Standing Against Injustice** - America cannot be truly free unless all its people are free. We stand firmly against attitudes and policies that harm people, of any color, origin, religion, or class. We know that socially, economically, and culturally, diversity is our country's beauty and strength, and we'll work to ensure that every American has equal access to justice, opportunity, and security.

### **III. Pragmatics: A Blueprint for a Thriving America**
Our platform is built on policies that restore power to the American people and deliver tangible improvements to their lives. We prioritize policies that directly uplift working families, make life affordable, and ensure everyone has a path to dignity and success.
### **1\. Infrastructure & Public Investment:**
* A nationwide infrastructure revitalization plan that creates millions of well-paying jobs.
* High-speed rail, modernized roads, and clean energy grids.
* Affordable, universal broadband access as a basic right.

### **2\. Workforce Development & Economic Opportunity:**
* A federal jobs guarantee ensuring meaningful employment at livable wages.
* Universal paid family leave, sick leave, and vacation time.
* Support for small businesses and cooperatives over monopolistic corporations.
* Reinstating fair labor standards and breaking corporate union-busting.
* Respect for trades and skilled labor as honorable and vital parts of the economy.

### **3\. Cost of Living & Economic Security:**
* Universal healthcare that guarantees coverage for all while eliminating waste and price gouging.
* Affordable housing available to all, with meaningful protections to eliminate corporate control of housing markets.
* Student debt relief and tuition-free public college and vocational training.
* A living minimum wage indexed to inflation and the cost of living.
* Reducing government bureaucracy, red tape, and taxation that disproportionately harms small businesses and workers.

### **4\. Rights, Dignity, and Justice for All:**
* Full civil rights protections for everyone, period.
* Comprehensive criminal justice reform: Ending cash bail, mass incarceration, and the school-to-prison pipeline.
* Repeal of discriminatory laws that criminalize poverty and survival.
* Ensuring the rights of law-abiding gun owners while prioritizing responsible safety measures.

### **5\. Liberty, Transparency, and Courage in Government:**
* Public financing of elections and a constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United.
* Banning members of Congress from trading stocks.
* Ending government contracts for private prisons and detention centers.
* Open debate and intellectual rigor in policy-making, free from ideological censorship.

### **6\. Immigration: A Just and Fair System:**
* A clear, humane pathway to citizenship for all undocumented residents.
* Worker protections for all laborers, regardless of immigration status.
* Protection of asylum seekers and refugees from war, violence, and climate displacement.
* Immigration policies that recognize both security and human dignity as priorities.

### **7\. A Foreign Policy of Peace and Good Relations:**
* Ending the United States' role in unjust wars and military occupations.
* Reducing military budgets bloated by corporate profiteering and military adventurism that destroys other countries and damages America's standing abroad - while still ensuring a strong national defense.
* Diplomatic engagement and trade policies that benefit American workers and international partners fairly.

[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=158220999&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU4MjIwOTk5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDIxNTg4ODgsImV4cCI6MTc0NDc1MDg4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dtJruvwMj0hCj65xtVvOKqZ72X239yDd7J-K3Kp_yx8)
### **Conclusion: The American Party is the Future**
The American Party is here to fill the void left by two parties that have failed the people. We recognize that both Democrats and Republicans have been deceived and co-opted by billionaires, foreign lobbyists, and special interests - and most Americans believe neither party truly represents their values, needs, and interests.
We are a movement of **Americans for America** \- working people, immigrants, small business owners, families, and every American who believes in a just, free, and prosperous future. We stand for _principled leadership, fundamental American principles, real economic democracy, and a moral commitment to all people._
We believe in an America where all people are free to think, believe, love, learn, work hard, own property, build their families, and shape their futures with dignity and fairness. We honor both the lessons of history and the boundless potential of tomorrow.
We invite every American to join us in reclaiming our nation for the people. This is our country. This is our movement. This is the future we deserve.

We commit to policies that ensure equal pay, reproductive agency, support for motherhood, safety from violence, and full participation in leadership and decision-making. 10. Intellectual Sovereignty & Freedom of Thought - Free speech, diverse viewpoints, and the right to think independently without government overreach are the hallmarks of a strong republic. 11. Standing Against Injustice - America cannot be truly free unless all its people are free. We stand firmly against attitudes and policies that harm people, of any color, origin, religion, or class. We know that socially, economically, and culturally, diversity is our country's beauty and strength, and we'll work to ensure that every American has equal access to justice, opportunity, and security. III. Pragmatics: A Blueprint for a Thriving America Our platform is built on policies that restore power to the American people and deliver tangible improvements to their lives. We prioritize policies that directly uplift working families, make life affordable, and ensure everyone has a path to dignity and success. 1\. Infrastructure & Public Investment: A nationwide infrastructure revitalization plan that creates millions of well-paying jobs. High-speed rail, modernized roads, and clean energy grids. Affordable, universal broadband access as a basic right. 2\. Workforce Development & Economic Opportunity: A federal jobs guarantee ensuring meaningful employment at livable wages. Universal paid family leave, sick leave, and vacation time. Support for small businesses and cooperatives over monopolistic corporations. Reinstating fair labor standards and breaking corporate union-busting. Respect for trades and skilled labor as honorable and vital parts of the economy. 3\. Cost of Living & Economic Security: Universal healthcare that guarantees coverage for all while eliminating waste and price gouging. Affordable housing available to all, with meaningful protections to eliminate corporate control of housing markets. Student debt relief and tuition-free public college and vocational training. A living minimum wage indexed to inflation and the cost of living. Reducing government bureaucracy, red tape, and taxation that disproportionately harms small businesses and workers. 4\. Rights, Dignity, and Justice for All: Full civil rights protections for everyone, period. Comprehensive criminal justice reform: Ending cash bail, mass incarceration, and the school-to-prison pipeline. Repeal of discriminatory laws that criminalize poverty and survival. Ensuring the rights of law-abiding gun owners while prioritizing responsible safety measures. 5\. Liberty, Transparency, and Courage in Government: Public financing of elections and a constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United. Banning members of Congress from trading stocks. Ending government contracts for private prisons and detention centers. Open debate and intellectual rigor in policy-making, free from ideological censorship. 6\. Immigration: A Just and Fair System: A clear, humane pathway to citizenship for all undocumented residents. Worker protections for all laborers, regardless of immigration status. Protection of asylum seekers and refugees from war, violence, and climate displacement. Immigration policies that recognize both security and human dignity as priorities. 7\. A Foreign Policy of Peace and Good Relations: Ending the United States' role in unjust wars and military occupations. Reducing military budgets bloated by corporate profiteering and military adventurism that destroys other countries and damages America's standing abroad - while still ensuring a strong national defense. Diplomatic engagement and trade policies that benefit American workers and international partners fairly. Conclusion: The American Party is the Future The American Party is here to fill the void left by two parties that have failed the people. We recognize that both Democrats and Republicans have been deceived and co-opted by billionaires, foreign lobbyists, and special interests - and most Americans believe neither party truly represents their values, needs, and interests. We are a movement of Americans for America \- working people, immigrants, small business owners, families, and every American who believes in a just, free, and prosperous future. We stand for principled leadership, fundamental American principles, real economic democracy, and a moral commitment to all people. We believe in an America where all people are free to think, believe, love, learn, work hard, own property, build their families, and shape their futures with dignity and fairness. We honor both the lessons of history and the boundless potential of tomorrow. We invite every American to join us in reclaiming our nation for the people. This is our country. This is our movement. This is the future we deserve. ? "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry is a reader-supported publication. If that 's valuable to you, I respectfully ask you to consider becoming a paid subscriber - or!** This work takes time and effort (away from my two little children), and draws on over fifteen years' experience (well - fifty, if you include my husband) - including university studies I still carry student loans from. body:
Regarding your voter profile. Is this a mistake?
Peter,

After such a historic speech from President Trump the other night, we thought surely every patriot would have verified their voter profile by now.

But as of our latest review, our records indicate your profile is still marked **[UNVERIFIED.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed6d10844a26480c848690991b195486&_e=_b4kcxHwSlNuzl02-_tktTAE8zy0Cbgq2rruYA8gVwMaeE8QYPh8VPc4F98bC_fXjnvlyM3BoRR0NdBhAux_VZxL_OaSqz0MzzLSO0KhXjGKZPxQw4Cg0pTYX5u-CWDCMZCxtwGJM66oY6glFf7s2tJFY2DBTmvMfL9zs5PnqsmQBk4kONi0LKneL1PlBAB10XCNU9FCHQ4Hxor2QwGJwew-Q1mahB4_mP6pIODNNxieNaQ06N6UsZF_FNPPfsTnQRUEepkS_8Ar2TDCixRBl01jMCAnjNtx43_rZKXn_5HEVwIBjDXbelKZazgl2fNBJupG4aTrYGoUiB1dpK30Fu4j-O70ylquCrTvYZeCnhdFRhkDl2eo3uQsqvjNCBdZ2Ktx67sERupMUnHi3fFCkrGjhGY1-J_GEFyW_1gIBK7vv5iyYOLHCFgKy9SLwNeuTedfccxrj7cVBc0ZCp8Swhj8M7jUnUoMjbf0nbU_7gM%3D)**

_Is this some kind of mistake?_

You can imagine with polls like *__this__ * why we're so concerned about your profile:
**[NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS "REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE - _(from Gallup Polling)_](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed6d10844a26480c848690991b195486&_e=_b4kcxHwSlNuzl02-_tktTAE8zy0Cbgq2rruYA8gVwMaeE8QYPh8VPc4F98bC_fXjnvlyM3BoRR0NdBhAux_VZxL_OaSqz0MzzLSO0KhXjGKZPxQw4Cg0pTYX5u-CWDCMZCxtwGJM66oY6glFf7s2tJFY2DBTmvMfL9zs5PnqsmQBk4kONi0LKneL1PlBAB10XCNU9FCHQ4Hxor2QwGJwew-Q1mahB4_mP6pIODNNxieNaQ06N6UsZF_FNPPfsTnQRUEepkS_8Ar2TDCixRBl01jMCAnjNtx43_rZKXn_5HEVwIBjDXbelKZazgl2fNBJupG4aTrYGoUiB1dpK30FoNMatwlv8tIqOjD5yMTJ36oTEa_QneeFozGmF2UobOlcD0ws9NG5RokB7K5XeQJThc7yuPDLOzV54LR_OgERrlGKJOMCnWBZxeBbilekR9QD11XzAR12cSXkBT86P8fq-c5uZVHCZEHvUu9Hnv32lY%3D)**
Now more than ever, our Senate majority needs to know that YOU are still with us.

**[So please, privately complete (don't let someone view your screen) your Official 2025 Voter Questionnaire by midnight tonight.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ed6d10844a26480c848690991b195486&_e=_b4kcxHwSlNuzl02-_tktTAE8zy0Cbgq2rruYA8gVwMaeE8QYPh8VPc4F98bC_fXjnvlyM3BoRR0NdBhAux_VZxL_OaSqz0MzzLSO0KhXjGKZPxQw4Cg0pTYX5u-CWDCMZCxtwGJM66oY6glFf7s2tJFY2DBTmvMfL9zs5PnqsmQBk4kONi0LKneL1PlBAB10XCNU9FCHQ4Hxor2QwGJwew-Q1mahB4_mP6pIODNNxieNaQ06N6UsZF_FNPPfsTnQRUEepkS_8Ar2TDCixRBl01jMCAnjNtx43_rZKXn_5HEVwIBjDXbelKZazgl2fNBJupG4aTrYGoUiB1dpK30FoSC8_LZQtOw1UZULzKIGsm5tiQv7F4wX_9gZiq1xTU5EZp9NsnVV02pjYogE7QPgo3GxsBM6fGUSyPQtMSqDbNtCdaEFDL3D3M0o9_YKVJn4DF_WdHpKfrd8CuwetQQ3T9miHgw2g9r_-DPHuvNofg%3D)**

### The same old playbook isn't working anymore, and the Democrats can either go back to the drawing board or continue to lose...
Mar 16
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=159181740&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU5MTgxNzQwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MjE2MTM0MiwiZXhwIjoxNzQ0NzUzMzQyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.z1m3aOjtj9UDheVjqQU28RVekJ3kA00-6HeijB1xbJM&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
