[](https://substack.com/redirect/4ee53b1c-636b-4aa5-809c-f9ff95643d28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._aijXNnPulKKFZXt5p9i8h-xnYRbXSpgt8sbJtUfCCk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159181740)
The playbook on opposing all things Trump has changed since his first term, and look no further than this week's dismantling of BLM Plaza for a sign of the changing landscape here in Washington, DC.
Back in 2020 when I was getting pepper sprayed, billy clubbed, and losing my hearing from fireworks or flash bangs exploding at my feet, the prevailing idea that Trump's pro-police stance was laced with animus towards specifically black Americans was especially ridiculous given that he was running against Joe Biden--the author of the 1994 Crime Bill--and Kamala Harris--California's top cop. The aforementioned crime bill put more black Americans into jail than the number that were shackled by slavery at the outbreak of the Civil War, and Kamala Harris oversaw the incarceration of thousands of black Americans for non-violent, marijuana related crimes. But now that both Biden and Kamala are out of the Presidential picture, and now that it has become so painfully obvious that their policies did little or nothing to benefit black Americans.
The dismemberment of BLM Plaza is enigmatic of the sham that was foisted onto the American people in 2020. The press, Hollywood, and the DC establishment were all complicit in this sham, which was especially detestable given that it manipulated Americans' good intentions to support a movement driven by a charity that turned out to be a complete and utter fraud, a front used to enrich its founders with lavish houses and to employ family members with sweetheart jobs rather than giving the money to the grassroots BLM chapters that were mobilizing in the streets during the summer of 2020. The real goal of this movement was, for those at the keep Trump out of office for his second term.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._aijXNnPulKKFZXt5p9i8h-xnYRbXSpgt8sbJtUfCCk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159181740)
But, as the 2024 election showed, and as Obama stated, ""The arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends toward justice."
It is difficult for me to explain to folks how insane things were in DC's BLM Plaza during the height of the pandemic and the so-called "Summer of Love." The fact that the plaza was directly in front of the White House was no mistake. It might as well have been named OMB Plaza instead (Orange Man Bad).
I witnessed the genesis of the Plaza after CNN hyperbolically claimed that Trump personally ordered protesters to be "tear-gassed, shot with rubber bullets" ahead of his June 1st Bible photo-op in front of St. John's Church (I can be seen wearing my hockey helmet behind the CNN chyron). SPOILER ALERT: a year later, an IG investigation revealed that Trump had nothing to do with the order, it was Park Police who decided to clear the park and put up personnel fencing after the White House was nearly overrun during the riots that consumed downtown DC after the death of George Floyd. In fact, the Park Police used smoke grenades and pepper balls--small paintball-like plastic balls that are propelled by CO2 rather than explosive shells. As someone who has endured countless encounters with all of the above, I am here to say that comparing pepper balls and smoke grenades to rubber bullets and tear gas is akin to comparing a pool noodle to a baseball bat.
_**A brief message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d355f4c6-fb2e-4e92-ae49-66f5cbc10806?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

**How it works:**

No minimums. No hidden fees. Just peace of mind.

* * *
Yet the damage was already done. The apoplectic idea that Trump was dead set on using the fascist police as his personal anti-BLM brown shirts was set in stone within the first weekend after the death of George Floyd.
The rest of the year saw hundreds of demonstrations in BLM Plaza. I witnessed the following chronology of chaos:
-Mob attempted to take down Jackson Statue in Lafayette Park
[](https://substack.com/redirect/256e5845-95d8-42ad-b0d8-41fea409b4af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
-Columns of St. John's Church vandalized with BHAZ graffiti (Black House Autonomous Zone)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4e3a902a-172d-459a-ad0c-b3337e1b74d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
-Journalist suffered massive concussion after being sucker punched for filming the burning of an American flag
[](https://substack.com/redirect/722d3ccb-60f9-44d7-a6b4-1aded225097a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
-Protesters camping out and sleeping in BLM Plaza
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6b883a1f-0335-4e99-bf18-17c730b8c4a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
-Thousands of projectiles thrown at police
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6740fa1e-e58d-4847-8a8a-1d2acf8aa280?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
-Thousands of fireworks blasted in BLM Plaza
[](https://substack.com/redirect/47df6a0d-5195-434a-ba58-eada6c0faf7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
-Numerous Trump Supporters assaulted in BLM Plaza during Stop the Steal rallies
[](https://substack.com/redirect/333f9785-0529-4bc4-b553-adeee23249ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
-Countless insults lobbed at police officers for doing their jobs
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d6955936-06d6-4453-b923-c21effd2af2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
All of the above mentioned instances were tacitly endorsed by DC's Mayor Muriel Bowser, all so that she could gain notoriety by sticking her thumb in the eye of Trump. She justified the construction of BLM Plaza during the peak of the chaos to, in here words, "send a unifying and affirming message about what this time and the reaction to the killing of George Floyd means in our country."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._aijXNnPulKKFZXt5p9i8h-xnYRbXSpgt8sbJtUfCCk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159181740)
Well I was there and, for simply filming protests on what was allegedly still a public street, I was threatened and called every name in the book. Bowser's BLM was not "unifying". It was divisive. It was a message to the whole country to get onboard with the Black Lives Matter agenda, or else.
In the fall of 2020, I encountered a police officer walking in plain clothes in Northeast DC. This officer was a tall female with dyed hair and by all appearances she might be a protester rather than an enforcer of the the law. I had seen her accosted for being a "dyke" a "lesbian" and a "pig bitch" within the confines of the supposedly "unifying" state-sanctioned protest zone.
I asked her, "hey are you an MPD officer?"
At first she was terrified that if she answered yes I would heckle her just like I had seen out in BLM.
Noticing her hesitation I explained, "I work in news and I've seen all the abuse you endured out there in front of the White House, and I just want to say that I am thankful for all the work you're doing." The female officer immediately burst into tears, as if months of pent up sadness and frustration immediately burst forth from the tear ducts in her eyes.
It was still the pandemic so I the only thing I could think of next, "Can I give you a hug?" She nodded yes and accepted my embrace, clutching me tightly like a kid might do to a teddy bear after a bad dream.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._aijXNnPulKKFZXt5p9i8h-xnYRbXSpgt8sbJtUfCCk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159181740)
Though it seemed like it to both me and undoubtedly all the officers who were verbally and physically abused for the entire summer, it was not a bad dream.
As I look back, it does seem surreal. What is even stranger than fiction is the fact that the whole thing was sponsored by Democrat politicians in the cities that I visited to cover the unrest--from the lawless zone in CHAZ that ended in the shooting of two young black men, to the tear-gas soaked streets of Portland where riots persisted for over one hundred consecutive nights, to New York where protesters were allowed to camp out in an autonomous zone while religious services were banned, to Kenosha where I saw a man shot and killed because lawlessness was allowed to persist for multiple nights, in Minneapolis where George Floyd Square was a no-go-zone for cops, and where the riots caused hundreds of millions in damage and Philly, where I saw a looters utilize the increased police presence at a protest to loot the surrounding shopping malls--all of this was at the behest and the empowerment of the anti-Trump agenda. It wasn't a dream or a nightmare, it was real. Even though BLM is but a memory now, I implore Americans to never forget.

Back in 2020 when I was getting pepper sprayed, billy clubbed, and losing my hearing from fireworks or flash bangs exploding at my feet, the prevailing idea that Trump's pro-police stance was laced with animus towards specifically black Americans was especially ridiculous given that he was running against Joe Biden--the author of the 1994 Crime Bill--and Kamala Harris--California's top cop. The aforementioned crime bill put more black Americans into jail than the number that were shackled by slavery at the outbreak of the Civil War, and Kamala Harris oversaw the incarceration of thousands of black Americans for non-violent, marijuana related crimes. But now that both Biden and Kamala are out of the Presidential picture, and now that it has become so painfully obvious that their policies did little or nothing to benefit black Americans. The dismemberment of BLM Plaza is enigmatic of the sham that was foisted onto the American people in 2020. The press, Hollywood, and the DC establishment were all complicit in this sham, which was especially detestable given that it manipulated Americans' good intentions to support a movement driven by a charity that turned out to be a complete and utter fraud, a front used to enrich its founders with lavish houses and to employ family members with sweetheart jobs rather than giving the money to the grassroots BLM chapters that were mobilizing in the streets during the summer of 2020. The real goal of this movement was, for those at the keep Trump out of office for his second term. But, as the 2024 election showed, and as Obama stated, ""The arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends toward justice." It is difficult for me to explain to folks how insane things were in DC's BLM Plaza during the height of the pandemic and the so-called "Summer of Love." The fact that the plaza was directly in front of the White House was no mistake. It might as well have been named OMB Plaza instead (Orange Man Bad). I witnessed the genesis of the Plaza after CNN hyperbolically claimed that Trump personally ordered protesters to be "tear-gassed, shot with rubber bullets" ahead of his June 1st Bible photo-op in front of St. John's Church (I can be seen wearing my hockey helmet behind the CNN chyron). SPOILER ALERT: a year later, an IG investigation revealed that Trump had nothing to do with the order, it was Park Police who decided to clear the park and put up personnel fencing after the White House was nearly overrun during the riots that consumed downtown DC after the death of George Floyd. In fact, the Park Police used smoke grenades and pepper balls--small paintball-like plastic balls that are propelled by CO2 rather than explosive shells. As someone who has endured countless encounters with all of the above, I am here to say that comparing pepper balls and smoke grenades to rubber bullets and tear gas is akin to comparing a pool noodle to a baseball bat. A brief message from our sponsor (piece continues below) Hope Won't Fill Your Magazines... | | ---|---|--- Remember the ammo shortage of 2020? Empty shelves, sold-out stock--it was a nightmare. What if you never had to worry about that again? Introducing Since 2015, nearly 100,000 members have built personal ammo stockpiles--automatically and effortlessly. How it works: Sign up - Choose from 70+ calibers. Set your budget - Automate your ammo purchases. Pick shipping frequency - Get ammo when you need it. We store it - Secure, climate-controlled warehouses. No minimums. No hidden fees. Just peace of mind. Special Offer: Sign up today and get 75 rounds of 9mm practice ammo to jumpstart your reserve. Don't wait for the next shortage--because hope won't fill your magazines. Yet the damage was already done. The apoplectic idea that Trump was dead set on using the fascist police as his personal anti-BLM brown shirts was set in stone within the first weekend after the death of George Floyd. The rest of the year saw hundreds of demonstrations in BLM Plaza. I witnessed the following chronology of chaos: -Mob attempted to take down Jackson Statue in Lafayette Park -Columns of St. John's Church vandalized with BHAZ graffiti (Black House Autonomous Zone) -Journalist suffered massive concussion after being sucker punched for filming the burning of an American flag -Protesters camping out and sleeping in BLM Plaza -Thousands of projectiles thrown at police -Thousands of fireworks blasted in BLM Plaza -Numerous Trump Supporters assaulted in BLM Plaza during Stop the Steal rallies -Countless insults lobbed at police officers for doing their jobs All of the above mentioned instances were tacitly endorsed by DC's Mayor Muriel Bowser, all so that she could gain notoriety by sticking her thumb in the eye of Trump. She justified the construction of BLM Plaza during the peak of the chaos to, in here words, "send a unifying and affirming message about what this time and the reaction to the killing of George Floyd means in our country." Well I was there and, for simply filming protests on what was allegedly still a public street, I was threatened and called every name in the book. Bowser's BLM was not "unifying". It was divisive. It was a message to the whole country to get onboard with the Black Lives Matter agenda, or else. In the fall of 2020, I encountered a police officer walking in plain clothes in Northeast DC. This officer was a tall female with dyed hair and by all appearances she might be a protester rather than an enforcer of the the law. I had seen her accosted for being a "dyke" a "lesbian" and a "pig bitch" within the confines of the supposedly "unifying" state-sanctioned protest zone. I asked her, "hey are you an MPD officer?" At first she was terrified that if she answered yes I would heckle her just like I had seen out in BLM. Noticing her hesitation I explained, "I work in news and I've seen all the abuse you endured out there in front of the White House, and I just want to say that I am thankful for all the work you're doing." The female officer immediately burst into tears, as if months of pent up sadness and frustration immediately burst forth from the tear ducts in her eyes. It was still the pandemic so I the only thing I could think of next, "Can I give you a hug?" She nodded yes and accepted my embrace, clutching me tightly like a kid might do to a teddy bear after a bad dream. Though it seemed like it to both me and undoubtedly all the officers who were verbally and physically abused for the entire summer, it was not a bad dream. As I look back, it does seem surreal. What is even stranger than fiction is the fact that the whole thing was sponsored by Democrat politicians in the cities that I visited to cover the unrest--from the lawless zone in CHAZ that ended in the shooting of two young black men, to the tear-gas soaked streets of Portland where riots persisted for over one hundred consecutive nights, to New York where protesters were allowed to camp out in an autonomous zone while religious services were banned, to Kenosha where I saw a man shot and killed because lawlessness was allowed to persist for multiple nights, in Minneapolis where George Floyd Square was a no-go-zone for cops, and where the riots caused hundreds of millions in damage and Philly, where I saw a looters utilize the increased police presence at a protest to loot the surrounding shopping malls--all of this was at the behest and the empowerment of the anti-Trump agenda. It wasn't a dream or a nightmare, it was real. Even though BLM is but a memory now, I implore Americans to never forget. * PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. name: Research Team [Voter Action Project]
subject: Supporter survey: Poll taxes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=qO6b+To+iy5nWFpo18Wn1O2NeO+NaZhG+FKf3t5gLmaAQQQTMcqlBSWoL0nfJrPLbAb6+Gsby8ohUYScNStNBBlf5lHULDwVun1ul9U1qL4=]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Folks,
The Twenty-fourth Amendment, ratified in 1964, prohibits both Congress and the states from conditioning the right to vote in federal elections on payment of a poll tax or any other type of tax . Poll taxes for State and local elections were declared unconstitutional by the Supreme Court in the case Harper vs. Virginia State Board of Elections . However, supporters of voting rights allege that voter identification requirements passed in recent legislation amount to a modern-day poll tax.
Texas, for example, requires photo ID to vote, yet each of those methods -- a Texas Driver's License, Texas Personal Identification Card, or Texas Handgun License -- cost money to acquire. In addition, their other acceptable forms of ID have a cost -- both a United States Passport and United States Citizenship Certificate must be purchased, and a United States Military Identification Card requires military service or work as a contractor.
We're looking to see how our supporters feel about this issue. Please take our quick survey:
Team: Do you believe states like Texas are violating laws regarding poll taxes by requiring paid forms of ID to vote?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

Folks, The Twenty-fourth Amendment, ratified in 1964, prohibits both Congress and the states from conditioning the right to vote in federal elections on payment of a poll tax or any other type of tax . name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12926484?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **NEWSLETTER FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

The first week of the 2025 Legislative Session was a great success! In today’s newsletter, I want to share with you a recap of the week and what my team and I have been up to in Tallahassee. As session gets underway, I look forward to keeping the district updated on the status of my bills and important news from the Capital City. Stay tuned!
---
|
---
| As always, my office is here to serve you! Please do not hesitate to [contact my team](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=1364147095&e=d1c1b9864f) if you need assistance with anything. We would be happy to help in any way we can!
---
| | **Monday, March 3 - Pre-Session Kick Off at the Governor’s Mansion**
---
|
---
| It is always great to have my wife with me in Tallahassee! A highlight is the final pre-session kick off at the Governor’s Mansion.
---
| | **Tuesday, March 4 - Opening Day of Session**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| On Tuesday, March 4, we welcomed the opening day of the 2025 Legislative Session. We heard from the Speaker of the House, Senate President, and Governor Ron DeSantis for the Joint Session and State of the State speech.
---
| | **Wednesday, March 5 - Property Tax Press Conference**
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| On Wednesday, I held a press conference and announced the Beginning of the End to Property Taxes in the State of Florida. Thanks to everyone who drove up to stand in support! Here are a few pictures from the conference, but a full video is coming soon.

Get ready, Florida! The days of paying rent to the government and NEVER OWNING YOUR HOME are coming to an end. (Be sure to follow us on Facebook for up to date info and go to [www.endpropertytaxnow.com](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=455b3b5cd8&e=d1c1b9864f).)
---
| | **Saturday, March 8 - Stone Creek Republicans Club Event**
---
|
---
| Over last weekend, I had the opportunity to join the Stone Creek Republicans for an event alongside Senator Stan McClain and County Commissioner Matt McClain. The club’s president, Greg Ratliff, always puts on a great event. The house was packed!
---
| | **Week 1 Committee Meetings**
---
| In addition to the opening day of session and my press conference, my week was filled with the following committee meetings:
* **Human Services Subcommittee**
* Considered [HB 47 - Child Care and Early Learning Providers](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=04acc1b1cd&e=d1c1b9864f) by Rep. McFarland and [HB 259 - Special Observances](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=23b7b85be9&e=d1c1b9864f) by Rep. Gerwig.
* **Economic Infrastructure Subcommittee**
* Considered [HB 11 - Municipal Water and Sewer Utility Rates](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=74b7b58ebe&e=d1c1b9864f) by Rep. Robinson and listened to a panel discussion on Utility Use of the Public Right-of-Way.
* **Justice Budget Subcommittee**
* Took a site visit to the Wakulla Correctional Institution.
* **Intergovernmental Affairs Subcommittee** , where we considered the following bill(s):
* [HB 69 - Regulation of Presidential Libraries](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=2de27bcf61&e=d1c1b9864f) by Rep. Andrade
* [HB 623 - Pub. Rec./County and City Administrators and Managers](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=05fff07d96&e=d1c1b9864f) by Reps. Gerwig and Cassel
* [HB 4009 - St. Augustine-St. Johns County Airport Authority, St. Johns County](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=3a72172dc0&e=d1c1b9864f) by Rep. Kendall
* [HB 4017 - Bermont Drainage District, Charlotte County](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=197fe2d27d&e=d1c1b9864f) by Rep. Oliver
* [HB 4023 - Officers and Employees of North Springs Improvement District, Broward County](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=5c6de1257e&e=d1c1b9864f) by Rep. Hunschofsky
* [HB 4045 - City Pension Fund for Firefighters and Police Officers in the City of Tampa, Hillsborough County](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=4ede9e7ac2&e=d1c1b9864f) by Rep. Alvarez, D.

---
| | **Receptions Attended in Tallahassee**
---
| Me, my wife, Jenny, and my legislative aide, Ben, attended various events during the first week of session, including:
* **Police Benevolent Association Pre-Session BBQ**
* **State of the State Reception**
* **Rubin Turnbull Kickoff Reception**
* **Take Stock in Children Legislative Reception**
* **Session Kickoff Republican Member Social**
* **Palm Beach County Day Reception**
* **Technology Days Reception**
* **Florida Realtors Block Party**
* **AIF Reception**

---
| | **Florida House of Representatives: Week in Review**
---
| During session, I want to ensure the district stays informed and knows that the Florida House is working hard for all Floridians. Please click [here](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=ed8e5e63aa&e=d1c1b9864f) to read the Florida House’s latest Week in Review newsletter.
---
|
---
| | Thank you for reading, and I look forward to sharing with you again soon.

Have a great weekend!

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=6efdd1974f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=6efdd1974f).

---

name: President Trump
subject: Dinner at Mar-a-Lago? You’re invited!
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9exwzg3ukdtpu4pw5hh9znagiy6oczpne4r5gpnqgr7nxtwc5th4v865nvcn02hlgi8je3fk3mjagzafw&__stmp=st8l4p&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st8l4p&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfu137i3ah9k4zzhmh0hprq2bfq7e9k6ajvu6807yun3js64rl7yebkz9xbb467dglntt0sl7isqho6n02fb8a67ajyq72oro3gnf5od433adnruv3qa6n4b08cyx9yhw8nljnpdjg5o474vjnti&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st8l4p&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st8l4p&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st8l4p&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st8l4p&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfu137i3ah9k4zzhmh0hprq2lssa01i1sgcjhqpgegikdci266gel9r5s4fqwdyfcipftvigmwmc7ri5f7jwhmrkpgrp40zr8gb6zzppsv57294bx0umfmckb60w236riu1obe0dehh1xi7gglj6&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st8l4p&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=st8l4p&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Gay Valimont
subject: We don’t do KINGS.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Folks,

Donald Trump says a lot of crazy stuff but watching him lean in to proclaiming himself King is scary - and so gross.

Gross because he is ACTING like a king - flaunting the Constitution and the Rule of Law - in ways that are going to hurt every working American, seniors, veterans, you name it.

This is America and in America: WE DON’T DO KINGS.

I’m Gay Valimont, running for the 1st Congressional District seat in Florida’s Panhandle vacated by the sleazebag Matt Gaetz (who DEFINITELY would see Trump wear a crown).

To fight back against this talk of kings, I need your help-the special election is on April 1st! Can you help me defeat my Republican opponent - who will ALWAYS BEND THE KNEE to Donald Trump?

Can you give $15, $45, or even $100 today -- split evenly with Seth Moulton -- to help me WIN this crucial seat? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

We are told time and again that when Trump says this crazy crap he’s just trolling the libs, etc. etc. But haven’t you seen enough? The guy poops on a gold toilet! He has vassals and estates! He thinks himself ABOVE the law! He just does what he wants.

That seems rather KINGLY to me, and this is America: WE DON’T DO KINGS. Most of our ancestors came from the lands of princes and paupers to create a Constitution and a society where every man and woman is equal in their citizenship.

Let’s stop the Trump kingdom in its tracks: Donate $25 or whatever you can afford today -- split evenly with Seth Moulton! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]I’ve been running for this seat for almost two years and NOT ONCE has anyone I’ve talked to spoken of the need for a president to act more like a king.

Here, everyone is concerned about the cost of homeowners insurance and eggs. Whether their Medicaid, Medicare or Social Security benefits are going to be slashed to pay for billionaires who live like kings.

Please, let’s all stand up to this just like the patriots before us.

With contempt for kings,

Gay Valimont
Democratic Nominee, FL-01

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

name: Josh Weil (via Path to Progress)
subject: President Putin calling the shots
body:
| |
---
Donald Trump is on track to win Russia’s highest honors at America’s expense. | [View in browser](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend2.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ5MDY5MDI4MTcwNjYzODY5LFwiclwiOjE0OTA2OTEyNzc4MzI4NjA5M30iLCJzIjoiYTk5Mjc1OTQ0OTZjMjY2NCJ9)

---
|
---
Friend,

Josh Weil here, the Dem nominee running in the critical Florida special election on April 1st.

When Ukrainian President Zelenskyy came to the White House last week, there is no reason he should have been treated as anything other than what he is: a _hero_.

Ukrainians have been opposing Russia’s unprovoked aggression and placing Vladimir Putin in check for years. They are fighting for their survival as a nation and a people. They are fighting for their lives.

Like so many of us, I was utterly ashamed at the childish show that Donald Trump and JD Vance put on during Zelenskyy’s visit to Washington. __America should be a beacon for freedom__ —not supporting murderous dictators.

Take it from me: as a lifelong public school teacher who has worked with kids at some of their most difficult moments, **Trump and Vance’s bullying of Ukraine’s president would be _unacceptable_ in any classroom in America**—much less in the Oval Office of the White House.

It’s pathetic and embarrassing—**but I am optimistic because right now we can actually do something about it.**

The House stands at 215 (D) to 217 (R). **_This special election could tip the balance of power in Washington, D.C. and put a stop to Trump’s strongman act._**
|
---
_**[We need your help to do this. We have less than three weeks to accomplish this feat. But we can do it. Can you make a split donation between Path to Progress and my campaign to rally the nation to our fight and stop Trump and Vance from selling out the soul of America?](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend2.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ5MDY5MDI4MTc5MDUyNDgwLFwiclwiOjE0OTA2OTEyNzc4MzI4NjA5M30iLCJzIjoiYmUyNGQ3Y2JmYTRjZDJkYSJ9)**_
|
---

---
|
---
Thank you,

Josh Weil
Democratic Nominee
FL-06 __
|

name: The Democrats
subject: We need your help in Florida
body:
Democrats’ road to winning back Congress starts right here.
---
Derek, In just a few weeks, crucial special elections will take place in Florida for two previously Republican-held House seats. With Republicans only holding a slim congressional majority, these elections could have major implications. If Democrats can flip both seats, it will make it that much harder for Trump and his allies to pass disastrous legislation. **With the stakes this high, we’re asking for your help.** [**Can we count on you to split a $10 donation between the DNC and the Florida Democratic Party?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-fl-split-march-2025?amount=10&refcode=em_20250316_2948_fr&refcode2=2948_22930333_otHH_D&akid=2948%2E22930333%2EotHH_D) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Florida Democratic Party and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-fl-split-march-2025?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20250316_2948_fr&refcode2=2948_22930333_otHH_D&akid=2948%2E22930333%2EotHH_D)**

body:
I'm excited to endorse Vivek Ramaswamy for Governor of Ohio. Will you join me in supporting his critical campaign?

| |
---
| | | Friend,

As the fight rages against the managerial bureaucracy, government waste, and the Deep State, we can't lose sight of the fact that states play an essential role.

President Trump needs strategic partners in key states across the country in order to win once and for all.

As one of the co-founders of DOGE, I can't think of a better man for the job than my buddy Vivek Ramaswamy. **[That's why I'm excited to endorse Vivek Ramaswamy for Governor of Ohio. Will you join me in supporting his critical campaign?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/-00zPgIzFP1VJWqnqMqYIBZUX6OJX_Owsjm9xfzoSoKqMLW2gnQHpiRfJO546-EvspbFFyD_xdnlgX6-TNxMVAa5FmTRF-MyfllFsa75OTBKnDYi9bR4ca4khb9151N4aB1aGxkSMy6rpyPWRT2ymeIzb4k5lYnkK_4yKg3pVGOZ-p9wgO8o0zXMApDjNbCMG9RjK35zp6D-UEVp9g2h_X0pj5t-Hlp8DZ1jiKR2RKExLtK-Cm5Pccj5TaSNvO1cX9igZOVBCX3N82i1-iSaxUGKpXk47FLrWkakCuxP055QO5nYSQLzww460PaNH8mW2Gf5QsSfvM7lcWCjbC1C6Y1plNn4eBrpgnAb47GZWJhWGsP92vI36vaUyQtMx_NCG6gY0gw2Cr0frVv6czTjNphHpCu1xeAEOIPuqGu-GTST4O4OnW2c8KladLjFI0Qj-33B5YmFz3t8n2r2cv7l_uVhiIQ8UxCQQQFSFGsG6V7DabrLo7Yld0pO9EeMDIwRc9SdJG05aVXDlJW9A8E/HIFBRdr7SiLumBlClsJvGJ12_rVotPih/7 "That's why I'm excited to endorse Vivek Ramaswamy for Governor of Ohio. Will you join me in supporting his critical campaign?")**

| | Friend,As a strong conservative senior, I’m hoping that you will side with AMAC Action rather than with _the left-leaning AARP..._ By now you’ve probably heard of **billionaire globalist George Soros** and his support for the most radical leftist ideas on the planet.He’s injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, and our justice system. In the past few years, Soros has channeled millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys—including New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. What I’m about to tell you will make your blood boil—**[**but I hope it will inspire you to take action!**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/lEwkPqgEBPHfqNBBrpycbZxhyU7uwDDH-3lDHYDm-K_Ld0cALHbJ2ljvvRTYYY4BHASUocVSfyPM6t0y9PparBvJPdSp-DB_sIOCyVxtNIW8hXI78Vgq2CXiCbhIYb4KDppRNTCXN0vbqzpzKLVzvVuZd5_-afNl60K7qVyIMOQn7TVCiaDD4mDrTAw25l0CewykCsuJdgMqwoXnfs_QWN8MhXNPQ2-rWiDhVSkaBs9I2vkiTLTwo0kgD-tM17p5y4mKS1mmrHQ_dxgd4m-WL65YqoQ4H-6s5E0MFX_NBi8zEVtVXX8gZ2KsxI_6FMpWZ83nnn_3bxTzg_q7RiTMINJ4cAspwbFzw3oReBUGAlNzwlaxUFSz_V5jhXmNSjNoSiUqu5jVsavy8QkDq-3G9l6Za_nyzWknWQ/sX1sZLouK9us-LZpgmB8X0OZA55WMEEA/7)** According to public tax filings, the left-leaning AARP accepted over **10 MILLION DOLLARS** —in just three years—from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.” **You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’** And the AARP is taking multi-millions from this group funded by the man whose life mission is to destroy our nation. It’s not hard to see why the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine, calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s “changing the world, $100 million at a time.”Friend, it makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.And listen to this...Of all age groups (including 18-29-year-olds!), when asked **“Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of Donald Trump?”** —seniors aged 65 and older are the ONLY age group in America with a decreasing approval rating of President Trump.**Coincidence or Soros-backed AARP influence?****And so today I’m writing to sound the alarm.** To help President Trump usher in the **Golden Age of America** , AMAC Action must double and even triple our efforts against these radicals and George Soros’ network of prosecutors and Attorneys General who are obstructing President Trump’s America First Agenda.**_We can’t do it without brave patriots like you._** **[That’s why I’m asking you to follow this link to make a critical one-time donation today.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/HSs6sA7NFHvJUMIfNwjpHkI2f-Z5ek3mBS-MLSO-NsaSmBbZLM-n2EmCbOeb5pJMLFT0ZSIiz_xDv4nNmmdGVk7f9JieI4ShxQNMlAH8XMtG8TovItShmTKrSj8AiD1ZNr-PJpvirQNMiZRUYlBg9mTNP_1xLH8J6wDFHd2WzkR0TuQkN_bnAcJ4tqPcqawXRO0dW6Dy97Er1n2VqrdX4gc3b4CwOLxjQx6oAM3zIyy7mLh8cgZDmIjVtBWCJbjC_E1DtKZCEpZ2LJ6AVxUBLZFKNdIGCYwdEJtZx9lSi19Ty8nFeF62nxx1yn7G8lvPy7KxIzMirgpeiq1XVonA9jgSIaFGh--t5ZrLJJZThxgjN6HfjKrepP1Nd8uIwpdO_gcbk7MfhjIEHykdjFSmKTOvilOuVjO90Q/tj2J3bZcr7_nJrt7d6TQD6-N_vbGcFlV/7)****My friend, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action.** With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to the left-leaning AARP. And our 82 chapters and 348 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. With the support of conservative seniors like you, AMAC Action has confronted the radical left at every turn. And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him. And I know that together, we can counter the poisonous ideas he’s spreading through groups like the Tides Foundation and the AARP. **Just look at what we accomplished together in 2024 alone:**
---
* **We bombarded** members of Congress, state legislators, corporate executives, and the White House with a tidal wave of emails, comments, and phone calls showing that America’s conservative seniors would not back down in the face of an overreaching Biden Admin.
* **We mobilized** seniors to get out and vote early in the battleground states, resulting in a win for President Trump in all seven swing states.
* **We organized** a massive “Hands Off My Medicare” Petition Drive to stop the Democrats’ horrible “Medicare for All” scheme from giving undocumented immigrants the same healthcare you get.
* **Together with Donald Trump, Jr.,** we united thousands of Americans around our **“Make America Strong Again”**
* **In Missouri and Kentucky,** we helped pass commonsense measures to stop non-citizens from voting in our elections.
* **We defeated** a radical pro-abortion amendment in Florida.
* **In Ohio,** we protected young girls from boys in their sports and in their bathrooms.
* **We stopped** left-wing financial institutions from “de-banking” conservatives in Tennessee simply because they don’t like their politics.

---
And our efforts are so effective that President Trump himself has put out the call for seniors to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who are ruining our country! AMAC Action isn’t going to back down and let the Left obstruct President Trump’s America First agenda. If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But we’re going to shout it from the rooftops so unsuspecting seniors know the truth!** We can’t do any of this critical work without you. **[Today—right now—when so much is at stake—will you please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500 or more?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/N1d7q8xIH7UDRoh1KIeCN01ZfsTBlXG0IT5rRPVbVgDotNpE2Li81qgQiHZcdlEfTs6A0ZjBzstPcxIFIxM4rlCdjWPn9BL_eEUjDF6iN3M7pi0lsLc1ZWe5HUOLV5GoLjUxvEeevYMhTaGcQdHpiuEuYBPI0Uuej71VrXOwE3cAhvuxztFEQXyGoo9jNZqjc0F133U_KkTDCXaidas1gN03bkKtZ7MQqkUDnhElrmiQd6j6UWNV2GuNIDNNemIREzd-RscPwGD3YVDCLGYJMJ0CABbcHf20esrfL_4ORfIW06RnAZlFP0DBtYucIwPxhCukb9ctWCVK3-MOxLSmEPeTi9JXOFP1AyDeuPWg29dnjEjE3IUk6JdvEZYYn6WnTFsrNLGhtoyPktBYiPKpWs2CsKCDY8GWFg/hyJVstyx8k1n45_mQIEamJKCTRjHPvVn/7)** The radical Left isn’t letting up for one minute, and neither are we.**Your AMAC Action is taking every step possible to protect the interests of you and your family—but we can’t do it without you.** We already have a full agenda for the rest of this critical year that needs financing. And now that Soros has unleashed his radical D.A.s, our fights will multiply across the nation. But please know that **ANY amount** that you can contribute, whether it’s smaller or larger, is greatly appreciated. **[**Whatever you decide, please donate within the next 72 hours so we know what resources we have to work with.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/DKFob_kXqrYAUGtW8IJgsx6gXmUd29yTkYy14p-JY4UsIr9-zw-KZIBh5P3_gzAAsNOosylsHlkzvkuBzVM7Ws3gZmxGcGzGzj_zw1zPtCCmWYFvR5DnSL7U8h5Lh6gh41UGcF4ubCRfNgRfsV54HjhXbZVB-GtWblT2BvMQ3-CiQgo8A0GgfMZ8uq8l5UW4EvkSWyi-TETXK7VIO0e2OvVv7vEyKkAI_tH-JH13rpMaWEmZHH3goz0l7b7r1uMP5GQlKAiDl9oRY1vFLAa_Jjx7vgJr-NpClcU8jL7xiYnHaEGFxOAEoKQFTi3bCbjzIk5I0TL1GzwDgyoVyFawB_Dm_xXMPEF203ko8UHLluM47FYKBuwDzFTe9-Ma-164kXUC6bEsIaHQZZEBiaVWpHSHFv-T9tWIVw/Grla8zijjdcv6mfAU9R3Lj-0wDZNs5Au/7)** If we allow radical leftists like George Soros to continue without opposition, every one of us will suffer. Thank you for standing with us.

clean_body: As a strong conservative senior, I’m hoping that you will side with AMAC Action rather than with the left-leaning AARP... | | | | Soros has channeled millions into electing hand-picked radicals. | | | | Friend,As a strong conservative senior, I’m hoping that you will side with AMAC Action rather than with the left-leaning AARP... By now you’ve probably heard of billionaire globalist George Soros and his support for the most radical leftist ideas on the planet.He’s injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, and our justice system. In the past few years, Soros has channeled millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys—including New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. What I’m about to tell you will make your blood boil— According to public tax filings, the left-leaning AARP accepted over 10 MILLION DOLLARS —in just three years—from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.” You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’ And the AARP is taking multi-millions from this group funded by the man whose life mission is to destroy our nation. It’s not hard to see why the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine, calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s “changing the world, $100 million at a time.”Friend, it makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.And listen to this...Of all age groups (including 18-29-year-olds!), when asked “Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of Donald Trump?” —seniors aged 65 and older are the ONLY age group in America with a decreasing approval rating of President Trump.Coincidence or Soros-backed AARP influence?And so today I’m writing to sound the alarm. To help President Trump usher in the Golden Age of America , AMAC Action must double and even triple our efforts against these radicals and George Soros’ network of prosecutors and Attorneys General who are obstructing President Trump’s America First Agenda.We can’t do it without brave patriots like you. friend, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to the left-leaning AARP. And our 82 chapters and 348 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. With the support of conservative seniors like you, AMAC Action has confronted the radical left at every turn. And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him. And I know that together, we can counter the poisonous ideas he’s spreading through groups like the Tides Foundation and the AARP. Just look at what we accomplished together in 2024 alone: We bombarded members of Congress, state legislators, corporate executives, and the White House with a tidal wave of emails, comments, and phone calls showing that America’s conservative seniors would not back down in the face of an overreaching Biden Admin. We mobilized seniors to get out and vote early in the battleground states, resulting in a win for President Trump in all seven swing states. We organized a massive “Hands Off My Medicare” Petition Drive to stop the Democrats’ horrible “Medicare for All” scheme from giving undocumented immigrants the same healthcare you get. Together with Donald Trump, Jr., we united thousands of Americans around our “Make America Strong Again” In Missouri and Kentucky, we helped pass commonsense measures to stop non-citizens from voting in our elections. We defeated a radical pro-abortion amendment in Florida. In Ohio, we protected young girls from boys in their sports and in their bathrooms. We stopped left-wing financial institutions from “de-banking” conservatives in Tennessee simply because they don’t like their politics. And our efforts are so effective that President Trump himself has put out the call for seniors to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who are ruining our country! AMAC Action isn’t going to back down and let the Left obstruct President Trump’s America First agenda. If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. But we’re going to shout it from the rooftops so unsuspecting seniors know the truth! We can’t do any of this critical work without you. The radical Left isn’t letting up for one minute, and neither are we.Your AMAC Action is taking every step possible to protect the interests of you and your family—but we can’t do it without you. We already have a full agenda for the rest of this critical year that needs financing. And now that Soros has unleashed his radical D.A.s, our fights will multiply across the nation. But please know that ANY amount that you can contribute, whether it’s smaller or larger, is greatly appreciated. If we allow radical leftists like George Soros to continue without opposition, every one of us will suffer. Thank you for standing with us. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Pop Acta Media | Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Sign up for our free online course, "Totalitarian Novels," taught by Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn.

In this course, Dr. Arnn explores the oppressive nature of totalitarian governments by looking at some of the best literature on the subject: George Orwell's _1984_ , Aldous Huxley's _Brave New World_ , Arthur Koestler's _Darkness at Noon_ , and C.S. Lewis's _That Hideous Strength._

In the seventh lecture, Dr. Arnn examines the perversion of science for wicked political purposes in C.S. Lewis's _That Hideous Strength_.

**Closing the curtains on my campaign.**

I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat and DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection.
